<div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-5 animate-fade-up">
    <div>
        <h1 class="font-display text-2xl font-extrabold text-tx-1 tracking-tight flex items-center gap-3">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-tags text-teal-400"></i>
            <span>Staff Category Settings</span>
        </h1>
        <p class="text-[0.7rem] text-tx-3 mt-1 uppercase tracking-widest font-mono">Enable or disable staff categories system-wide</p>
    </div>
</div>

<div class="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-3 gap-4 mb-[80px]">
    <% (settings||[]).forEach(function(cat) { 
        var staffCount = countMap[cat.category] || 0;
    %>
    <div class="glass-card hover:border-teal-500/20 transition-colors border border-transparent animate-fade-up" id="cat-<%= cat._id %>">
        <div class="px-4 py-3 flex items-center gap-3">
            <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center shrink-0" style="background: <%= cat.color %>22; border: 1px solid <%= cat.color %>44;">
                <i class="fa-solid <%= cat.icon || 'fa-user' %> text-base" style="color: <%= cat.color %>"></i>
            </div>
            <div class="flex-1 min-w-0">
                <div class="text-sm font-bold text-tx-1 truncate"><%= cat.category %></div>
                <div class="text-[0.6rem] text-tx-3 truncate"><%= cat.description || 'â€”' %></div>
            </div>
            <!-- Toggle Switch -->
            <div class="shrink-0">
                <label class="relative inline-flex items-center cursor-pointer" title="<%= cat.is_enabled ? 'Disable' : 'Enable' %> category">
                    <input type="checkbox" class="sr-only category-toggle" data-category="<%= cat.category %>" 
                        <%= cat.is_enabled ? 'checked' : '' %> onchange="toggleCategory('<%= cat.category %>', this.checked)">
                    <div class="w-10 h-5 rounded-full transition-colors duration-200 category-track <%= cat.is_enabled ? 'bg-emerald-600' : 'bg-white/10' %> relative">
                        <div class="w-4 h-4 rounded-full bg-white absolute top-0.5 transition-transform duration-200 <%= cat.is_enabled ? 'translate-x-5' : 'translate-x-0.5' %>"></div>
                    </div>
                </label>
            </div>
        </div>
        <div class="px-4 pb-4">
            <div class="flex items-center justify-between text-[0.6rem] font-mono">
                <span class="text-tx-3"><%= staffCount %> staff member<%= staffCount !== 1 ? 's' : '' %></span>
                <span class="<%= cat.is_enabled ? 'text-emerald-400' : 'text-tx-3 opacity-50' %> font-bold uppercase tracking-widest">
                    <%= cat.is_enabled ? 'ACTIVE' : 'DISABLED' %>
                </span>
            </div>
            <% if (!cat.is_enabled) { %>
                <div class="mt-2 text-[0.6rem] text-orange-400/70 font-mono border border-orange-500/20 bg-orange-500/5 px-2 py-1 rounded-lg">
                    <i class="fa-solid fa-triangle-exclamation text-[0.5rem] mr-1"></i>
                    Category hidden from staff registration
                </div>
            <% } %>
        </div>
    </div>
    <% }); %>
</div>

<script>
async function toggleCategory(category, enabled) {
    try {
        const res = await fetch('/portal/admin/category-settings', {
            method: 'PUT',
            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
            body: JSON.stringify({ category, is_enabled: enabled })
        });
        const data = await res.json();
        if (data.success) {
            showToast(`${category} ${enabled ? 'enabled' : 'disabled'}`, enabled ? 'success' : 'info');
            // Update UI inline
            setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 800);
        } else {
            showToast(data.error || 'Error', 'error');
        }
    } catch(e) {
        showToast('Failed to update category', 'error');
    }
}
</script>

    </div>
    <div class="overflow-x-auto">
      <table class="data-table">
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th>Event</th>
            <th>Date</th>
            <th>Location</th>
            <th>Pay</th>
            <th>Status</th>
            <th>Payment</th>
            <th class="text-center">Actions</th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          <% if (assignments && assignments.length > 0) { %>
            <% assignments.forEach(function(assignment) { %>
              <tr>
                <td>
                  <div class="flex items-center gap-2">
                    <span class="font-semibold text-tx-1"><%= assignment.title %></span>
                    <% if (assignment.vip_flag) { %>
                      <span class="badge-gold text-[0.6rem] font-bold px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full"><i class="fa-solid fa-crown text-[0.5rem]"></i></span>
                    <% } %>
                  </div>
                </td>
                <td><%= new Date(assignment.date).toLocaleDateString('en-KE', {month:'short', day:'numeric'}) %></td>
                <td class="text-tx-3"><%= assignment.location %></td>
                <td class="font-semibold">KSh <%= (assignment.pay_rate || 0).toLocaleString() %></td>
                <td>
                  <span class="<%= assignment.status === 'Active' ? 'badge-emerald' : assignment.status === 'Completed' ? 'badge-blue' : 'badge-gold' %> text-[0.65rem] font-bold px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full">
                    <%= assignment.status %>
                  </span>
                </td>
                <td>
                  <select onchange="updatePaymentStatus('<%= assignment._id %>', this.value)"
                    class="form-input form-select text-xs py-1 px-2 w-28">
                    <option value="Pending"  <%= assignment.payment_status === 'Pending'  ? 'selected' : '' %>>Pending</option>
                    <option value="Sent"     <%= assignment.payment_status === 'Sent'     ? 'selected' : '' %>>Sent</option>
                    <option value="Received" <%= assignment.payment_status === 'Received' ? 'selected' : '' %>>Received</option>
                    <option value="Disputed" <%= assignment.payment_status === 'Disputed' ? 'selected' : '' %>>Disputed</option>
                  </select>
                </td>
                <td class="text-center">
                  <div class="flex gap-1.5 justify-center">
                    <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-xs" onclick="openEditAssignment('<%= assignment._id %>','<%= assignment.title %>','<%= assignment.location %>','<%= new Date(assignment.date).toISOString().split('T')[0] %>','<%= assignment.start_time %>','<%= assignment.end_time %>','<%= assignment.pay_rate %>','<%= assignment.vip_flag %>','<%= (assignment.special_instructions||'').replace(/'/g,'') %>','<%= (assignment.dress_code||'').replace(/'/g,'') %>')">
                      <i class="fa-solid fa-pen-to-square"></i>
                    </button>
                    <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-xs" onclick="viewEventReport('<%= assignment._id %>')">
                      <i class="fa-solid fa-chart-line"></i>
                    </button>
                  </div>
                </td>
              </tr>
            <% }) %>
          <% } else { %>
            <tr><td colspan="7" class="text-center py-8 text-tx-3">No assignments yet.</td></tr>
          <% } %>
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Live Activity Feed -->
  <div class="animate-fade-up delay-4">
    <%- include('../components/live-feed', {
      items: metrics.recentAuditLogs || [],
      title: 'Live Activity',
      feedId: 'liveFeed'
    }) %>
  </div>

</div>

<div class="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-5 mb-6">

        <i class="fa-solid fa-user-minus text-red-400"></i> Replacement Requests

      <% if (pendingReplacements && pendingReplacements.length) { %>
        <span class="badge-red text-[0.6rem] font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full"><%= pendingReplacements.length %></span>

    <div class="overflow-x-auto">

        <thead><tr><th>Event</th><th>By</th><th>Remove</th><th>Replace</th><th class="text-center">Actions</th></tr></thead>

          <% if (pendingReplacements && pendingReplacements.length > 0) { %>
            <% pendingReplacements.forEach(function(req) { %>
              <tr>
                <td class="font-semibold text-tx-1"><%= req.event_id ? req.event_id.title : 'Unknown' %></td>
                <td><%= req.submitted_by ? req.submitted_by.name : 'Unknown' %></td>
                <td class="text-red-400"><%= req.member_to_remove ? req.member_to_remove.name : '' %></td>
                <td class="text-emerald-400"><%= req.suggested_replacement ? req.suggested_replacement.name : 'None' %></td>
                <td class="text-center">
                  <div class="flex gap-2 justify-center">
                    <button class="btn btn-primary btn-xs" onclick="processReplacement('<%= req._id %>','approve')">Approve</button>
                    <button class="btn btn-outline btn-xs text-red-400 border-red-400/30" onclick="processReplacement('<%= req._id %>','reject')">Reject</button>
                  </div>
                </td>
              </tr>
            <% }) %>
          <% } else { %>
            <tr><td colspan="5" class="text-center py-6 text-tx-3 text-sm">No pending requests</td></tr>
          <% } %>
        </tbody>
      </table>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<!-- â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
     SCRIPTS â€” All original functionality preserved
     â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• -->
<script>
const _csrf = document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '';

// â”€â”€ Add Staff â”€â”€
function submitStaff(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  const form = e.target;
  const fd = new FormData(form);
  fetch('/portal/admin-staff/staff', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'CSRF-Token': _csrf }, body: fd })
    .then(r => r.json()).then(res => {
      if (res.success) {
        const creds = document.getElementById('staffCreds');
        creds.classList.remove('hidden');
        creds.innerHTML = '<strong>Account Created!</strong><br>Welcome email with login credentials sent to <strong>' + res.data.email + '</strong>.<br><br><small>Staff must change password on first login.</small>';
        form.reset();
        showToast('Staff account created!', 'success');
      } else showToast(res.error, 'error');
    }).catch(err => showToast('Error: ' + err.message, 'error'));
}

// â”€â”€ Create Assignment â”€â”€
function submitAssignment(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  const fd = new FormData(e.target);
  const data = Object.fromEntries(fd.entries());
  data.vip_flag = !!data.vip_flag;
  fetch('/portal/admin-staff/assignments', { method: 'POST', body: JSON.stringify(data), headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'CSRF-Token': _csrf } })
    .then(r => r.json()).then(res => {
      if (res.success) { showToast('Assignment broadcasted!', 'success'); closeModal('newAssignModal'); setTimeout(() => window.location.reload(), 800); }
      else showToast(res.error, 'error');
    });
}

// â”€â”€ Edit Assignment â”€â”€
function openEditAssignment(id,title,location,date,start,end,pay,vip,instructions,dress) {
  document.getElementById('editAssignId').value = id;
  document.getElementById('editAssignTitle').value = title;
  document.getElementById('editAssignLocation').value = location;
  document.getElementById('editAssignDate').value = date;
  document.getElementById('editAssignStart').value = start;
  document.getElementById('editAssignEnd').value = end;
  document.getElementById('editAssignPay').value = pay;
  document.getElementById('editAssignVip').checked = vip === 'true';
  document.getElementById('editAssignInstructions').value = instructions;
  document.getElementById('editAssignDress').value = dress;
  openModal('editAssignModal');
}

function submitEditAssignment(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  const id = document.getElementById('editAssignId').value;
  const data = {
    title: document.getElementById('editAssignTitle').value,
    location: document.getElementById('editAssignLocation').value,
    date: document.getElementById('editAssignDate').value,
    start_time: document.getElementById('editAssignStart').value,
    end_time: document.getElementById('editAssignEnd').value,
    pay_rate: document.getElementById('editAssignPay').value,
    vip_flag: document.getElementById('editAssignVip').checked,
    special_instructions: document.getElementById('editAssignInstructions').value,
    dress_code: document.getElementById('editAssignDress').value
  };
  fetch('/portal/admin-staff/assignments/' + id, { method: 'PUT', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'CSRF-Token': _csrf }, body: JSON.stringify(data) })
    .then(r => r.json()).then(res => {
      if (res.success) { showToast('Assignment updated!', 'success'); closeModal('editAssignModal'); setTimeout(() => window.location.reload(), 800); }
      else showToast(res.error, 'error');
    });
}

// â”€â”€ Payment Status â”€â”€
function updatePaymentStatus(id, newStatus) {
  fetch('/portal/admin-staff/assignments/' + id + '/payment', {
    method: 'PUT', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'CSRF-Token': _csrf },
    body: JSON.stringify({ payment_status: newStatus })
  }).then(r => r.json()).then(res => {
    if (res.success) showToast('Payment status updated', 'success');
    else showToast(res.error || 'Failed', 'error');
  });
}

// â”€â”€ Replacement Requests â”€â”€
function processReplacement(reqId, action) {
  if (confirm('Are you sure you want to ' + action + ' this replacement request?')) {
    fetch('/portal/admin-staff/replacements/' + reqId + '/' + action, { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'CSRF-Token': _csrf } })
      .then(r => r.json()).then(res => {
        if (res.success) { showToast('Request ' + action + 'd!', 'success'); setTimeout(() => window.location.reload(), 800); }
        else showToast(res.error, 'error');
      });
  }
}

// â”€â”€ Event Report â”€â”€
function viewEventReport(assignmentId) {
  openModal('reportModal');
  document.getElementById('reportContent').innerHTML = '<div class="text-center py-8"><i class="fa-solid fa-spinner animate-spin text-2xl text-emerald-400"></i></div>';
  document.getElementById('exportPdfBtn').href = '/portal/admin-staff/assignments/' + assignmentId + '/report/export?format=pdf';
  document.getElementById('exportCsvBtn').href = '/portal/admin-staff/assignments/' + assignmentId + '/report/export?format=csv';
  document.getElementById('reportExportBtns').classList.remove('hidden');

  fetch('/portal/admin-staff/assignments/' + assignmentId + '/report').then(r => r.json()).then(res => {
    if (!res.success) { document.getElementById('reportContent').innerHTML = '<p class="text-red-400">Error: ' + res.error + '</p>'; return; }
    const d = res.data;
    const readinessLabel = d.team_readiness === 0 ? 'Waiting' : d.team_readiness < 50 ? 'Incomplete' : d.team_readiness < 100 ? 'Ready' : 'Deployed';
    document.getElementById('reportContent').innerHTML =
      '<div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4 mb-6">' +
        '<div class="space-y-1 text-sm"><p><span class="text-tx-3">Event:</span> <strong class="text-tx-1">' + d.event_title + '</strong></p><p><span class="text-tx-3">Date:</span> ' + new Date(d.date).toLocaleDateString() + '</p><p><span class="text-tx-3">Location:</span> ' + d.location + '</p></div>' +
        '<div class="space-y-1 text-sm"><p><span class="text-tx-3">Supervisor:</span> ' + d.supervisor + '</p><p><span class="text-tx-3">Readiness:</span> <span class="badge-emerald text-xs px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full">' + d.team_readiness + '% ' + readinessLabel + '</span></p><p><span class="text-tx-3">Staff:</span> ' + d.total_accepted + '/' + d.total_assigned + ' accepted</p></div>' +
      '</div>' +
      '<h4 class="text-sm font-bold text-tx-1 mb-2 pb-1 border-b border-white/5">Attendance</h4>' +
      '<table class="data-table mb-6"><thead><tr><th>Staff</th><th>In</th><th>Out</th><th>Hrs</th><th>Status</th></tr></thead><tbody>' +
      (d.attendances.length ? d.attendances.map(a => '<tr><td>' + a.staff + '</td><td>' + (a.clock_in ? new Date(a.clock_in).toLocaleTimeString() : 'N/A') + '</td><td>' + (a.clock_out ? new Date(a.clock_out).toLocaleTimeString() : 'N/A') + '</td><td>' + (a.total_hours || 0) + '</td><td class="' + (a.status === 'Late' ? 'text-red-400' : 'text-emerald-400') + '">' + (a.status || 'N/A') + '</td></tr>').join('') : '<tr><td colspan="5" class="text-center py-4 text-tx-3">No records</td></tr>') +
      '</tbody></table>';
  });
}

// â”€â”€ Edit Staff â”€â”€
function openEditStaff(id,name,email,role,phone,dept,shiftStart,shiftEnd,skills) {
  document.getElementById('editStaffId').value = id;
  document.getElementById('editStaffName').value = name;
  document.getElementById('editStaffEmail').value = email;
  document.getElementById('editStaffRole').value = role;
  document.getElementById('editStaffPhone').value = phone;
  document.getElementById('editStaffDept').value = dept;
  document.getElementById('editStaffShiftStart').value = shiftStart;
  document.getElementById('editStaffShiftEnd').value = shiftEnd;
  document.getElementById('editStaffSkills').value = skills || '';
  openModal('editStaffModal');
}

function submitEditStaff(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  const id = document.getElementById('editStaffId').value;
  const fd = new FormData();
  fd.append('name', document.getElementById('editStaffName').value);
  fd.append('email', document.getElementById('editStaffEmail').value);
  fd.append('role', document.getElementById('editStaffRole').value);
  fd.append('phone', document.getElementById('editStaffPhone').value);
  fd.append('department', document.getElementById('editStaffDept').value);
  fd.append('skills', document.getElementById('editStaffSkills').value);
  fd.append('shift_start', document.getElementById('editStaffShiftStart').value);
  fd.append('shift_end', document.getElementById('editStaffShiftEnd').value);
  const photoFile = document.getElementById('editStaffPhoto').files[0];
  if (photoFile) fd.append('photo', photoFile);
  fetch('/portal/admin-staff/staff/' + id, { method: 'PUT', headers: { 'CSRF-Token': _csrf }, body: fd })
    .then(r => r.json()).then(res => {
      if (res.success) { closeModal('editStaffModal'); showToast('Staff updated!', 'success'); }
      else showToast(res.error, 'error');
    });
}

function toggleSuspend(id) {
  fetch('/portal/admin-staff/staff/' + id + '/suspend', { method: 'PUT', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'CSRF-Token': _csrf } })
    .then(r => r.json()).then(res => {
      if (res.success) { showToast('Account: ' + res.status, 'success'); }
      else showToast(res.error, 'error');
    });
}

function adminResetPassword(id, name) {
  if (!confirm('Reset password for ' + name + '?')) return;
  fetch('/portal/admin-staff/staff/' + id + '/reset-password', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'CSRF-Token': _csrf } })
    .then(r => r.json()).then(res => {
      if (res.success) showToast(res.message, 'success');
      else showToast(res.error, 'error');
    });
}

function deleteStaff(id, name) {
  if (!confirm('PERMANENTLY DELETE ' + name + '?')) return;
  fetch('/portal/admin-staff/staff/' + id, { method: 'DELETE', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'CSRF-Token': _csrf } })
    .then(r => r.json()).then(res => {
      if (res.success) showToast('Deleted.', 'success');
      else showToast(res.error, 'error');
    });
}

// â”€â”€ Live Feed â”€â”€
function addFeedItem(msg, icon, color) {
  const feed = document.getElementById('liveFeed');
  if (!feed) return;
  const waiting = feed.querySelector('.text-center');
  if (waiting) waiting.remove();
  const item = document.createElement('div');
  item.className = 'flex items-start gap-3 py-2 animate-slide-right';
  item.innerHTML = '<div class="w-7 h-7 rounded-lg flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0 text-xs" style="background:' + color + '15;color:' + color + '"><i class="' + icon + '"></i></div>' +
    '<div class="flex-1"><div class="text-xs text-slate-300">' + msg + '</div><div class="text-[0.65rem] text-slate-600 mt-0.5">Just now</div></div>';
  feed.prepend(item);
  while (feed.children.length > 20) feed.removeChild(feed.lastChild);
}

// â”€â”€ Socket Live Updates â”€â”€
try {
  const socket = io();

  socket.on('metricUpdate', function(d) {
    ['totalStaff','availableStaff','busyStaff','activeAssignments','clockedInStaff','pendingPayments'].forEach(k => {
      if (typeof d[k] !== 'undefined') {
        const els = document.querySelectorAll('[data-count]');
        // Update metric card values when available
      }
    });
  });

  socket.on('assignmentResponse', d => addFeedItem(d.staff + ' ' + d.response + ' "' + d.assignment + '"', 'fa-solid fa-reply', d.response === 'accepted' ? '#10b981' : '#ef4444'));
  socket.on('staffAttendance', d => addFeedItem(d.staff + ' ' + d.action + ' for "' + d.assignment + '"', 'fa-solid fa-fingerprint', d.status === 'Late' ? '#ea580c' : '#10b981'));
  socket.on('paymentConfirmed', d => addFeedItem(d.staff + ' confirmed payment for "' + d.assignment + '"', 'fa-solid fa-check-circle', '#10b981'));
  socket.on('paymentDisputed', d => addFeedItem('DISPUTED: ' + d.staff + ' flagged "' + d.assignment + '"', 'fa-solid fa-triangle-exclamation', '#ef4444'));
  socket.on('replacementRequest', d => addFeedItem('Replacement: ' + d.supervisor + ' â†’ remove ' + d.member, 'fa-solid fa-user-minus', '#ef4444'));

  // Staffing Alert Toast
  socket.on('staffingAlert', function(d) {
    const suggestions = d.suggestedReplacements.map(r => r.name).join(', ') || 'None';
    const toast = document.createElement('div');
    toast.className = 'glass-card p-4 animate-slide-right border-l-4 border-gold-500';
    toast.innerHTML = '<div class="flex justify-between items-start"><div><div class="text-sm font-bold text-gold-400 mb-1"><i class="fa-solid fa-triangle-exclamation"></i> Staffing Alert</div><p class="text-xs text-tx-2"><strong>' + d.assignmentTitle + '</strong></p><p class="text-xs text-tx-3">' + d.acceptedCount + '/' + d.assignedCount + ' confirmed. ' + d.declinedBy + ' declined.</p><p class="text-xs text-tx-2 mt-1"><strong>Suggested:</strong> ' + suggestions + '</p></div><button onclick="this.parentElement.parentElement.remove()" class="text-tx-3 hover:text-tx-1"><i class="fa-solid fa-xmark"></i></button></div>';
    document.getElementById('staffingAlertContainer').prepend(toast);
    addFeedItem('STAFFING ALERT: "' + d.assignmentTitle + '" - ' + d.acceptedCount + '/' + d.assignedCount, 'fa-solid fa-triangle-exclamation', '#f59e0b');
  });

  // Live Arrivals
  socket.on('clockInVerification', function(d) {
    const isLate = d.status === 'Late';
    const panel = document.getElementById('liveArrivalsPanel');
    const placeholder = panel.querySelector('.text-center');
    if (placeholder) placeholder.remove();
    const card = document.createElement('div');
    card.className = 'glass-card p-3 w-52 flex-shrink-0 animate-scale-in';
    card.style.borderLeft = '3px solid ' + (isLate ? '#fb923c' : '#22c55e');
    const selfieHtml = d.selfie ? '<img src="' + d.selfie + '" class="w-full aspect-square object-cover rounded-lg mb-2">' : '';
    card.innerHTML = '<span class="' + (isLate ? 'badge-gold' : 'badge-emerald') + ' text-[0.6rem] font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full mb-2 inline-block">' + (isLate ? 'LATE' : 'ON TIME') + '</span>' + selfieHtml + '<div class="text-sm font-bold text-tx-1">' + d.staffName + '</div><div class="text-xs text-tx-3">' + d.assignmentTitle + '</div><div class="text-sm font-semibold mt-1 ' + (isLate ? 'text-amber-400' : 'text-emerald-400') + '">' + d.clockInTime + '</div><button onclick="this.parentElement.remove()" class="btn btn-ghost btn-xs w-full mt-2">Dismiss</button>';
    panel.prepend(card);
  });
} catch(e) {}
</script>

<script>
async function generateETR(eventId) {
    try {
        const btn = event.currentTarget;
        btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fa-solid fa-circle-notch animate-spin mr-1"></i> ...';
        const r = await fetch(`/portal/admin-staff/etr/${eventId}/generate`, {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: { 'CSRF-Token': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '' }
        });
        const data = await r.json();
        if (data.success) {
            showToast('ETR Generated successfully', 'success');
            setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 800);
        } else {
            btn.innerHTML = 'Generate';
            showToast(data.error || 'Failed to generate', 'error');
        }
    } catch (err) {
        showToast('Network fault', 'error');
    }
}

async function resendETR(eventId) {
    try {
        const btn = event.currentTarget;
        btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fa-solid fa-circle-notch animate-spin"></i>';
        const r = await fetch(`/portal/admin-staff/etr/${eventId}/resend`, {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: { 'CSRF-Token': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '' }
        });
        const data = await r.json();
        if (data.success) {
            showToast('ETR Resent to Client', 'success');
            setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 800);
        } else {
            btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fa-solid fa-paper-plane"></i>';
            showToast(data.error || 'Failed to resend', 'error');
        }
    } catch (err) {
        showToast('Network fault', 'error');
    }
}
</script>

</div>

<script>
async function resendETR(eventId) {
    try {
        const btn = event.currentTarget;
        const oHtml = btn.innerHTML;
        btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fa-solid fa-circle-notch animate-spin mr-2"></i> Transmitting...';
        const r = await fetch(`/portal/admin-staff/etr/${eventId}/resend`, {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: { 'CSRF-Token': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '' }
        });
        const data = await r.json();
        if (data.success) {
            showToast('ETR Resent to Client', 'success');
            setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 1000);
        } else {
            btn.innerHTML = oHtml;
            showToast(data.error || 'Failed to resend', 'error');
        }
    } catch (err) {
        showToast('Network fault', 'error');
    }
}
</script>

          <select name="status" id="ev_status" class="form-input form-select font-bold">
            <option value="Active" class="text-emerald-400">Active</option>
            <option value="Completed" class="text-blue-400">Completed</option>
            <option value="Cancelled" class="text-red-400">Cancelled</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        
        <input type="hidden" name="_csrf" value="<%= csrfToken %>">
        <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary w-full mt-4 shadow-glow-gold bg-gradient-to-r from-gold-600 to-amber-500 border-none font-bold text-dark-bg transition-all hover:scale-[1.01]">
          Commence Recalibration
        </button>
      </form>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Assign Supervisor Modal -->
<div class="modal-overlay" id="assignEventSupervisorModal">
  <div class="modal-content max-w-sm">
    <div class="modal-header border-b border-gold-500/20 pb-3">
      <h3 class="text-base font-bold text-tx-1 flex items-center gap-2"><div class="w-7 h-7 rounded bg-gold-500/20 text-gold-400 flex items-center justify-center text-xs"><i class="fa-solid fa-user-tie"></i></div>Assign Supervisor</h3>
      <button class="text-tx-3 hover:text-tx-1" onclick="closeModal('assignEventSupervisorModal')"><i class="fa-solid fa-xmark"></i></button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body pt-4">
      <p id="assignSupervisorEventName" class="text-sm font-bold text-emerald-400 mb-4 pb-2 border-b border-white/5 truncate"></p>
      <input type="hidden" id="assignSupervisorEventId">
      <div class="space-y-4">
        <div>
          <label class="form-label text-tx-2">Select Command Authority</label>
          <select id="supervisorSelect" class="form-input form-select text-sm rounded-xl border-white/10 focus:border-gold-500/50 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-gold-500/50">
            <option value="">Querying network...</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <button class="btn btn-primary w-full bg-gold-600 hover:bg-gold-500 text-dark-bg font-bold shadow-glow-gold border-none" onclick="submitAssignSupervisor()">Assign Supervisor</button>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Assign Units Modal (Checkbox List) -->
<div class="modal-overlay" id="assignStaffModal">
  <div class="modal-content max-w-md">
    <div class="modal-header border-b border-purple-500/20 pb-3">
      <h3 class="text-base font-bold text-tx-1 flex items-center gap-2"><div class="w-7 h-7 rounded bg-purple-500/20 text-purple-400 flex items-center justify-center text-xs shadow-glow-purple"><i class="fa-solid fa-users-viewfinder"></i></div>Deploy Units</h3>
      <button class="text-tx-3 hover:text-tx-1" onclick="closeModal('assignStaffModal')"><i class="fa-solid fa-xmark"></i></button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body pt-4 max-h-[60vh] flex flex-col">
      <p id="assignStaffEventName" class="text-sm font-bold text-emerald-400 mb-3 pb-2 border-b border-white/5 truncate shrink-0"></p>
      <input type="hidden" id="assignStaffEventId">
      
      <div id="staffCheckboxes" class="flex flex-col gap-2 overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden pr-2 flex-1 pb-4 custom-scrollbar">
        <div class="py-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-tx-3">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-circle-notch animate-spin text-2xl mb-2 text-purple-500"></i>
          <p class="text-xs">Querying personnel database...</p>
        </div>
      </div>
      
      <div class="pt-3 border-t border-white/5 shrink-0 mt-auto">
        <button class="btn btn-primary w-full bg-purple-600 hover:bg-purple-500 border-none font-bold shadow-glow-purple group" onclick="submitAssignStaff()">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-satellite-dish mr-2 group-hover:animate-ping-slow"></i> Transmit Deployments
        </button>  
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Unit Status Modal (Read Only) -->
<div class="modal-overlay" id="staffStatusModal">
  <div class="modal-content max-w-md">
    <div class="modal-header border-b border-blue-500/20 pb-3">
      <h3 class="text-base font-bold text-tx-1 flex items-center gap-2"><div class="w-7 h-7 rounded bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-400 flex items-center justify-center text-xs"><i class="fa-solid fa-users"></i></div>Unit Status</h3>
      <button class="text-tx-3 hover:text-tx-1" onclick="closeModal('staffStatusModal')"><i class="fa-solid fa-xmark"></i></button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body pt-4 max-h-[60vh] flex flex-col">
      <p id="staffStatusEventName" class="text-sm font-bold text-emerald-400 mb-3 pb-2 border-b border-white/5 truncate shrink-0"></p>
      
      <div id="staffStatusList" class="flex flex-col gap-2 overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden pr-2 flex-1 pb-4 custom-scrollbar">
        <div class="py-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-tx-3">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-circle-notch animate-spin text-2xl mb-2 text-blue-500"></i>
          <p class="text-xs">Accessing telemetry logic...</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Applicants Modal (Approve/Reject) -->
<div class="modal-overlay" id="applicantsModal">
  <div class="modal-content max-w-md">
    <div class="modal-header border-b border-tx-2 pb-3">
      <h3 class="text-base font-bold text-tx-1 flex items-center gap-2"><div class="w-7 h-7 rounded bg-white/10 text-white flex items-center justify-center text-xs shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(255,255,255,0.2)]"><i class="fa-solid fa-user-clock"></i></div>Recruit Applications</h3>
      <button class="text-tx-3 hover:text-tx-1" onclick="closeModal('applicantsModal')"><i class="fa-solid fa-xmark"></i></button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body pt-4 max-h-[60vh] flex flex-col">
      <p id="applicantsEventName" class="text-sm font-bold text-emerald-400 mb-3 pb-2 border-b border-white/5 truncate shrink-0"></p>
      
      <div id="applicantsList" class="flex flex-col gap-2 overflow-y-auto overflow-x-hidden pr-2 flex-1 pb-4 custom-scrollbar">
        <div class="py-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-tx-3">
           <i class="fa-solid fa-circle-notch animate-spin text-2xl mb-2"></i>
           <p class="text-xs">Loading applicant data...</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
     SCRIPTS
     â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• -->
<script>
  // Setup logic for Applicants
  async function openApplicantsModal(eventId, eventTitle) {
    document.getElementById('applicantsEventName').textContent = 'Event: ' + eventTitle;
    const list = document.getElementById('applicantsList');
    list.innerHTML = '<div class="py-12 flex flex-col items-center text-tx-3"><i class="fa-solid fa-spinner animate-spin text-2xl mb-2"></i><span class="text-xs">Loading logs...</span></div>';
    openModal('applicantsModal');

    try {
      const resp = await fetch(`/portal/admin-staff/assignments/${eventId}/report`, { headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json' } });
      const data = await resp.json();
      const assignment = data.data?.assignment || data.data || data;
      const applicants = assignment.applicant_ids || [];

      if (applicants.length === 0) {
        list.innerHTML = `
          <div class="col-span-full py-8 text-center text-tx-3 bg-white/5 rounded-xl border border-white/5">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-ghost text-2xl mb-2 opacity-50 block"></i>
            <span class="text-sm">No recruits have applied.</span>
          </div>
        `;
        return;
      }

      list.innerHTML = applicants.map(s => {
        const name = s.name || s._id;
        const email = s.email || '';
        const initials = name.split(' ').map(n => n[0]).join('').toUpperCase().slice(0,2);
        const sPhoto = s.photo_url || null;
        return `
          <div class="flex items-center justify-between p-3 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors">
            <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
              <div class="w-9 h-9 rounded-full overflow-hidden flex-shrink-0 bg-gradient-to-br from-emerald-700 to-emerald-500 flex items-center justify-center text-white font-bold text-xs shadow-lg">
                ${sPhoto ? `<img src="${sPhoto}" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;">` : initials}
              </div>
              <div class="overflow-hidden">
                <div class="font-bold text-sm text-tx-1 truncate">${name}</div>
                <div class="text-[0.65rem] text-tx-3 truncate">${email}</div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="flex gap-1.5 flex-shrink-0 ml-2">
              <button class="btn btn-primary btn-xs bg-emerald-600 border-none shadow-glow-emerald hover:bg-emerald-500 w-8 h-8 !p-0" title="Accept Recruit" onclick="handleApplicant('${eventId}','${s._id}','approve')">
                <i class="fa-solid fa-check"></i>
              </button>
              <button class="btn btn-outline btn-xs border-red-500/30 text-red-400 hover:bg-red-500/20 w-8 h-8 !p-0" title="Reject Recruit" onclick="handleApplicant('${eventId}','${s._id}','reject')">
                <i class="fa-solid fa-xmark"></i>
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        `;
      }).join('');
    } catch(err) {
      list.innerHTML = '<div class="text-red-400 text-sm text-center p-4">System Fault: Telemetry Failed</div>';
    }
  }

  async function handleApplicant(eventId, staffId, action) {
    try {
      const r = await fetch(`/portal/admin-staff/assignments/${eventId}/applicants/${staffId}`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'CSRF-Token': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || ''
        },
        body: JSON.stringify({ action })
      });
      const d = await r.json();
      if (d.success) {
        showToast(action === 'approve' ? 'Recruit linked to matrix' : 'Recruit dismissed', action === 'approve' ? 'success' : 'info');
        closeModal('applicantsModal');
        setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 800);
      } else {
        showToast(d.error || 'Interface override failed', 'error');
      }
    } catch(err) {
      showToast('Network disruption', 'error');
    }
  }

  function openEditEventModal(btnOrData) {
    const a = typeof btnOrData === 'string' ? JSON.parse(btnOrData) : btnOrData;
    document.getElementById('ev_title').value = a.title;
    document.getElementById('ev_date').value = a.date ? a.date.substring(0, 10) : '';
    document.getElementById('ev_location').value = a.location || '';
    document.getElementById('editGpsLat').value = a.gps_location?.lat || '';
    document.getElementById('editGpsLng').value = a.gps_location?.lng || '';
    document.getElementById('ev_start').value = a.start_time || '';
    document.getElementById('ev_end').value = a.end_time || '';
    document.getElementById('ev_rate').value = a.pay_rate || 0;
    document.getElementById('editStaffCount').value = a.required_staff_count || 1;
    
    const sEl = document.getElementById('ev_status');
    sEl.value = a.status;
    sEl.className = `form-input form-select font-bold ${a.status === 'Active' ? 'text-emerald-400' : a.status === 'Completed' ? 'text-blue-400' : 'text-red-400'}`;
    
    document.getElementById('ev_client_name').value = a.client_name || '';
    document.getElementById('ev_client_email').value = a.client_email || '';
    document.getElementById('editEventForm').action = '/portal/admin-staff/assignments/' + a._id;
    openModal('editEventModal');
  }

  document.getElementById('ev_status')?.addEventListener('change', function() {
     this.className = `form-input form-select font-bold ${this.value === 'Active' ? 'text-emerald-400' : this.value === 'Completed' ? 'text-blue-400' : 'text-red-400'}`;
  });

  document.getElementById('editEventForm').addEventListener('submit', async function(e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    const form = e.target;
    // Map data
    const formData = new FormData(form);
    const body = {};
    formData.forEach((v, k) => body[k] = v);

    try {
      const r = await fetch(form.action, {
        method: 'PUT',
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'CSRF-Token': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || ''
        },
        body: JSON.stringify(body)
      });
      const data = await r.json();
      if (data.success) {
        closeModal('editEventModal');
        showToast('Matrix parameters recalibrated', 'success');
        setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 800);
      } else {
        showToast('Recalibration failed: ' + (data.error || 'Unknown'), 'error');
      }
    } catch(err) {
      showToast('Network fault: ' + err.message, 'error');
    }
  });

  function getGPSLocation(prefix) {
    if (!navigator.geolocation) {
       showToast('Hardware sensor absent', 'error'); return;
    }
    navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(
      (pos) => {
        document.getElementById(prefix + 'GpsLat').value = pos.coords.latitude.toFixed(6);
        document.getElementById(prefix + 'GpsLng').value = pos.coords.longitude.toFixed(6);
        showToast('Coordinates locked', 'success');
      },
      () => showToast('Sensor triangulation failed', 'error')
    );
  }

  async function deleteEvent(id, title) {
    if (!confirm(`Warning: Terminating operation [${title}]. This action destroys all telemetry associated with it. Confirm termination?`)) return;
    try {
      const r = await fetch('/portal/admin-staff/assignments/' + id, {
        method: 'DELETE',
        headers: { 'CSRF-Token': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '' }
      });
      const data = await r.json();
      if (data.success) {
        showToast('Operation terminated', 'success');
        setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 800);
      } else {
        showToast(data.error || 'Termination aborted', 'error');
      }
    } catch(err) {
      showToast('System fault', 'error');
    }
  }

  async function retryEtr(e, eventId) {
    if(e) e.stopPropagation();
    try {
      const btn = e.target;
      const originalText = btn.innerHTML;
      btn.innerHTML = '...';
      const r = await fetch(`/portal/admin-staff/etr/${eventId}/resend`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'CSRF-Token': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || ''
        }
      });
      const data = await r.json();
      if (data.success) {
        showToast('ETR resent successfully', 'success');
        setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 1000);
      } else {
        btn.innerHTML = originalText;
        showToast(data.error || 'Retry failed', 'error');
      }
    } catch(err) {
      showToast('Network fault', 'error');
      e.target.innerHTML = 'Retry';
    }
  }

  async function openAssignSupervisorModal(eventId, eventTitle) {
    document.getElementById('assignSupervisorEventId').value = eventId;
    document.getElementById('assignSupervisorEventName').innerHTML = `<span class="text-tx-3 font-normal mr-1">Target Matrix:</span> ${eventTitle}`;
    const select = document.getElementById('supervisorSelect');
    select.innerHTML = '<option value="">Querying network levels...</option>';
    
    try {
      const r = await fetch('/portal/admin-staff/staff', {
        headers: { 'CSRF-Token': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '' }
      });
      const data = await r.json();
      if (data.success) {
        const supervisors = data.data.filter(s => s.status === 'Active');
        if (supervisors.length === 0) {
          select.innerHTML = '<option value="">No command units found</option>';
        } else {
          select.innerHTML = '<option value="">Select Command Authority</option>' +
            supervisors.map(s => `<option value="${s._id}">${s.role === 'Admin' ? '[ADM] ' : ''}${s.name}</option>`).join('');
        }
      }
    } catch(err) {
      select.innerHTML = '<option value="">Network cascade failure</option>';
    }
    openModal('assignEventSupervisorModal');
  }

  async function submitAssignSupervisor() {
    const eventId = document.getElementById('assignSupervisorEventId').value;
    const supervisorId = document.getElementById('supervisorSelect').value;
    if (!supervisorId) return showToast('You must select an authority', 'error');
    
    try {
      const r = await fetch(`/portal/admin-staff/assignments/${eventId}/supervisor`, {
        method: 'PUT',
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'CSRF-Token': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || ''
        },
        body: JSON.stringify({ supervisor_id: supervisorId })
      });
      const data = await r.json();
      if (data.success) {
        closeModal('assignEventSupervisorModal');
        showToast('Supervisor Assigned', 'success');
        setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 800);
      } else {
        showToast(data.message || 'Signal rejected', 'error');
      }
    } catch(err) {
      showToast('System fault', 'error');
    }
  }

  async function openAssignStaffModal(eventId, eventTitle) {
    document.getElementById('assignStaffEventId').value = eventId;
    document.getElementById('assignStaffEventName').innerHTML = `<span class="text-tx-3 font-normal mr-1">Matrix:</span> ${eventTitle}`;
    const container = document.getElementById('staffCheckboxes');
    container.innerHTML = '<div class="py-12 flex flex-col items-center text-tx-3"><i class="fa-solid fa-spinner animate-spin text-2xl mb-2 text-purple-500"></i><span class="text-xs">Accessing personnel node...</span></div>';
    
    openModal('assignStaffModal');
    
    try {
      const [staffRes, eventRes] = await Promise.all([
        fetch('/portal/admin-staff/staff', { headers: { 'CSRF-Token': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '' } }),
        fetch(`/portal/admin-staff/assignments/${eventId}/report`)
      ]);
      const staffData = await staffRes.json();
      const eventData = await eventRes.json();
      
      if (staffData.success) {
        const assignedIds = eventData.assignment?.assigned_staff_ids?.map(s => s._id.toString()) || [];
        const acceptedIds = (eventData.assignment?.accepted_staff_ids || []).map(s => typeof s === 'object' ? s._id.toString() : s.toString());
        const activeStaff = staffData.data.filter(s => acceptedIds.includes(s._id.toString()));
        
        container.innerHTML = activeStaff.map(s => {
          const initials = s.name.split(' ').map(n => n[0]).join('').toUpperCase().slice(0,2);
          const isChecked = assignedIds.includes(s._id.toString()) ? 'checked' : '';
          const ringColor = isChecked ? 'ring-purple-500/50' : 'ring-transparent border border-white/5';
          const bgColor = isChecked ? 'bg-purple-900/20' : 'bg-white/5 hover:bg-white/10 text-tx-3'; // Use tx-3 initially
          const nameColor = isChecked ? 'text-emerald-400' : 'text-tx-1'; // Switch to emerald if checked
          const iconStateClass = isChecked ? 'opacity-100 scale-100 text-purple-400' : 'opacity-0 scale-50';
          return `
            <label class="relative flex items-center justify-between p-3 rounded-xl transition-all cursor-pointer select-none group focus-within:ring-1 focus-within:ring-white/20 overflow-hidden ${ringColor} ${bgColor}" 
                   onclick="toggleCardSelect(this)">
              <div class="flex items-center gap-3 relative z-10 w-full">
                <!-- Hidden Real Checkbox (used for submission) -->
                <input type="checkbox" name="staff_ids" value="${s._id}" ${isChecked} class="absolute opacity-0 w-0 h-0 invisible">
                
                <!-- Avatar block -->
                <div class="w-9 h-9 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-dark-card to-dark-bg flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0 text-white font-bold text-xs ring-1 ring-white/10 group-hover:ring-white/30 transition-shadow shadow-lg">
                  ${initials}
                </div>
                
                <div class="overflow-hidden flex-1 select-none pr-8"> <!-- padding right for checkbox -->
                  <div class="font-bold text-sm ${nameColor} truncate transition-colors card-title">${s.name}</div>
                  <div class="text-[0.65rem] truncate transition-colors font-medium mt-0.5 card-subtitle ${isChecked? 'text-tx-2' : ''}">${s.role || 'Personnel'} â€¢ ${s.department || 'Undesignated'}</div>
                </div>
              </div>
              
              <!-- Fake visual checkbox element (customized styling) -->
              <div class="absolute right-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 w-5 h-5 rounded-md border border-white/20 bg-dark-bg flex items-center justify-center transition-all bg-opacity-80">
                 <i class="fa-solid fa-check text-[0.6rem] transition-all transform duration-200 card-check ${iconStateClass}"></i>
              </div>
            </label>
          `;
        }).join('');
      } else {
        container.innerHTML = '<div class="text-red-400 text-sm text-center p-4">Personnel link disconnected</div>';
      }
    } catch(err) {
      container.innerHTML = '<div class="text-red-400 text-sm text-center p-4">Data stream corrupted</div>';
    }
  }

  // Visual toggle helper for card-style checkboxes in Assign Modal
  function toggleCardSelect(labelEl) {
    const cb = labelEl.querySelector('input[type="checkbox"]');
    // Using setTimeout because the click event naturally toggles the input checked state right after this triggers.
    // By deferring check, we read the post-click state accurately.
    setTimeout(() => {
      const isChecked = cb.checked;
      
      // Toggle card UI classes
      if (isChecked) {
        labelEl.classList.remove('ring-transparent', 'border', 'border-white/5', 'bg-white/5', 'hover:bg-white/10', 'text-tx-3');
        labelEl.classList.add('ring-1', 'ring-purple-500/50', 'bg-purple-900/20');
        
        labelEl.querySelector('.card-title').classList.remove('text-tx-1');
        labelEl.querySelector('.card-title').classList.add('text-emerald-400'); // the "active" selection color
        
        labelEl.querySelector('.card-subtitle').classList.add('text-tx-2');
        
        const icon = labelEl.querySelector('.card-check');
        icon.classList.remove('opacity-0', 'scale-50');
        icon.classList.add('opacity-100', 'scale-100', 'text-purple-400');
      } else {
        labelEl.classList.remove('ring-1', 'ring-purple-500/50', 'bg-purple-900/20');
        labelEl.classList.add('ring-transparent', 'border', 'border-white/5', 'bg-white/5', 'hover:bg-white/10', 'text-tx-3');
        
        labelEl.querySelector('.card-title').classList.add('text-tx-1');
        labelEl.querySelector('.card-title').classList.remove('text-emerald-400');
        
        labelEl.querySelector('.card-subtitle').classList.remove('text-tx-2');
        
        const icon = labelEl.querySelector('.card-check');
        icon.classList.add('opacity-0', 'scale-50');
        icon.classList.remove('opacity-100', 'scale-100', 'text-purple-400');
      }
    }, 0);
  }

  async function submitAssignStaff() {
    const eventId = document.getElementById('assignStaffEventId').value;
    const checkboxes = document.querySelectorAll('#staffCheckboxes input[name="staff_ids"]:checked');
    const staffIds = Array.from(checkboxes).map(cb => cb.value);
    
    try {
      const r = await fetch(`/portal/admin-staff/assignments/${eventId}/assign-staff`, {
        method: 'PUT',
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'CSRF-Token': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || ''
        },
        body: JSON.stringify({ staff_ids: staffIds })
      });
      const data = await r.json();
      if (data.success) {
        closeModal('assignStaffModal');
        showToast('Units deployed to matrix', 'success');
        setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 800);
      } else {
        showToast(data.message || 'Deployment signal failed', 'error');
      }
    } catch(err) {
      showToast('Network fault', 'error');
    }
  }

  async function toggleApplications(eventId) {
    try {
      const r = await fetch(`/portal/admin-staff/assignments/${eventId}/toggle-applications`, {
        method: 'PUT',
        headers: { 'CSRF-Token': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '' }
      });
      const data = await r.json();
      if (data.success) {
        showToast(data.open ? 'Ports opened for recruitment' : 'Ports sealed', 'success');
        setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 800);
      }
    } catch(err) {
      showToast('Interface lock failure', 'error');
    }
  }

  async function viewStaffStatus(eventId, title) {
    document.getElementById('staffStatusEventName').innerHTML = `<span class="text-tx-3 font-normal mr-1">Matrix:</span> ${title}`;
    const container = document.getElementById('staffStatusList');
    container.innerHTML = '<div class="py-12 flex flex-col items-center text-tx-3"><i class="fa-solid fa-spinner animate-spin text-2xl mb-2 text-blue-500"></i><span class="text-xs">Accessing unit telemetry...</span></div>';
    
    openModal('staffStatusModal');
    
    try {
      const r = await fetch(`/portal/admin-staff/assignments/${eventId}/report`);
      const data = await r.json();
      
      if (data.success && data.data.assignment) {
        const assignment = data.data.assignment;
        const assignedIds = assignment.assigned_staff_ids || [];
        const acceptedIds = (assignment.accepted_staff_ids || []).map(s => typeof s === 'object' ? s._id.toString() : s.toString());
        const declinedIds = (assignment.declined_staff_ids || []).map(s => typeof s === 'object' ? s._id.toString() : s.toString());
        
        if (assignedIds.length === 0) {
          container.innerHTML = `
            <div class="col-span-full py-8 text-center text-tx-3 bg-white/5 rounded-xl border border-white/5">
              <i class="fa-solid fa-ghost text-2xl mb-2 opacity-50 block text-blue-400"></i>
              <span class="text-sm">Ghost Town: No units deployed.</span>
            </div>
          `;
        } else {
          container.innerHTML = assignedIds.map(s => {
            const id = typeof s === 'object' ? s._id.toString() : s.toString();
            const name = typeof s === 'object' && s.name ? s.name : 'Unknown';
            const role = typeof s === 'object' && s.role ? s.role : 'Staff';
            const isAccepted = acceptedIds.includes(id);
            const isDeclined = declinedIds.includes(id);
            const status = isAccepted ? 'Deployed' : isDeclined ? 'Evaded' : 'Awaiting';
            const statusClass = isAccepted ? 'bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-400 border-emerald-500/30' : isDeclined ? 'bg-red-500/10 text-red-400 border-red-500/30' : 'bg-gold-500/10 text-gold-400 border-gold-500/30';
            const statusIcon = isAccepted ? 'fa-check-double' : isDeclined ? 'fa-xmark' : 'fa-hourglass-half';
            
            const initials = name.split(' ').map(n => n[0]).join('').toUpperCase().slice(0,2);
            const photoUrl = typeof s === 'object' && s.photo_url ? s.photo_url : null;
            const avatarHtml = photoUrl
                ? `<img src="${photoUrl}" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:50%;">`
                : initials;
            
            return `
              <div class="flex items-center gap-3 p-3 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 rounded-xl">
                <div class="w-9 h-9 flex-shrink-0 rounded-full overflow-hidden bg-gradient-to-br from-dark-card to-dark-bg flex items-center justify-center text-white font-bold text-xs ring-1 ring-white/10 shadow-lg">
                  ${avatarHtml}
                </div>
                <div class="flex-1 overflow-hidden pr-2">
                  <div class="font-bold text-sm text-tx-1 truncate mb-0.5">${name}</div>
                  <div class="text-[0.65rem] text-tx-3 truncate font-medium flex items-center gap-2">
                    <span class="text-tx-2"><i class="fa-solid fa-id-badge opacity-50 mr-1"></i>${role}</span>
                    <span class="${s.status === 'Active' ? 'text-emerald-500/70' : 'text-red-500/70'}"><i class="fa-solid fa-power-off opacity-70 mr-1"></i>${s.status || 'Active'}</span>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <span class="text-[0.6rem] font-bold px-2 py-1 rounded-full border ${statusClass} flex items-center gap-1.5 flex-shrink-0">
                  <i class="fa-solid ${statusIcon} text-[0.55rem]"></i> ${status}
                </span>
              </div>
            `;
          }).join('');
        }
      } else {
        container.innerHTML = '<div class="text-red-400 text-sm text-center p-4">Telemetry decode failure</div>';
      }
    } catch(err) {
      container.innerHTML = '<div class="text-red-400 text-sm text-center p-4">Feed corrupted</div>';
    }
  }

  // Socket Disband (keeping intact from old system logic)
  if (typeof socket !== 'undefined') {
    socket.on('disbandPrompt', function(data) {
      if(typeof showDisbandPrompt === 'function') {
        showDisbandPrompt(data);
      }
    });

    // Listen for survey creation confirmation
    socket.on('surveysCreated', function(data) {
      showToast(`ðŸ“‹ Surveys sent to staff for "${data.eventTitle}"`, 'success');
    });

    socket.on('invoiceCreated', function(data) {
      showToast(`ðŸ“„ Invoice ${data.invoiceNumber} auto-generated for "${data.eventTitle}" â€” KSh ${(data.total||0).toLocaleString()}`, 'success');
    });
  }
</script>

<div id="editModal" class="hidden fixed inset-0 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-md z-[9999] flex items-center justify-center p-4">
    <div class="bg-dark-card border border-amber-500/30 rounded-2xl shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(245,158,11,0.1)] max-w-xl w-full max-h-[90vh] overflow-y-auto">
        <div class="px-5 py-4 border-b border-amber-500/20 flex items-center justify-between sticky top-0 bg-dark-card z-10">
            <h3 class="text-sm font-bold text-tx-1 flex items-center gap-2">
                <i class="fa-solid fa-pen-to-square text-amber-400"></i> Edit Invoice
                <span id="editInvNo" class="text-[0.6rem] font-mono text-tx-3 bg-white/5 px-2 py-0.5 rounded"></span>
            </h3>
            <button onclick="document.getElementById('editModal').classList.add('hidden')"
                class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full border border-white/10 flex items-center justify-center text-tx-3 hover:text-tx-1 transition-colors">
                <i class="fa-solid fa-xmark text-xs"></i>
            </button>
        </div>

                <div>
                    <label class="block text-[0.65rem] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-tx-3 mb-1.5">Client Name *</label>
                    <input type="text" id="editClientName" required class="w-full bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-2.5 text-sm text-tx-1 focus:border-amber-500/40 focus:outline-none">
                </div>
                <div>
                    <label class="block text-[0.65rem] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-tx-3 mb-1.5">Client Email *</label>
                    <input type="email" id="editClientEmail" required class="w-full bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-2.5 text-sm text-tx-1 focus:border-amber-500/40 focus:outline-none">
                </div>
                <div>
                    <label class="block text-[0.65rem] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-tx-3 mb-1.5">Event Name *</label>
                    <input type="text" id="editEventName" required class="w-full bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-2.5 text-sm text-tx-1 focus:border-amber-500/40 focus:outline-none">
                </div>
                <div>
                    <label class="block text-[0.65rem] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-tx-3 mb-1.5">Event Date</label>
                    <input type="date" id="editEventDate" class="w-full bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-2.5 text-sm text-tx-1 focus:border-amber-500/40 focus:outline-none">
                </div>

                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Editable Services -->
            <div>
                <div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-2">
                    <label class="text-[0.65rem] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-tx-3">Services</label>
                    <button type="button" onclick="addEditServiceRow()" class="text-[0.6rem] text-amber-400 hover:text-amber-300 font-bold">+ Add Line</button>
                </div>
                <div id="editServiceRows" class="space-y-2"></div>
            </div>

            <div class="bg-black/30 rounded-xl p-3 text-right space-y-1">
                <div class="text-xs text-tx-3">Subtotal: <span id="editDisplaySubtotal" class="font-mono text-tx-1">KSh 0</span></div>

<script>
window.invoicesData = <%- JSON.stringify(invoices) %>;
window.assignmentsData = <%- JSON.stringify(assignments) %>;

/**
 * Helper: Decode HTML entities in JS for the modal
 */
function decodeHTMLEntities(text) {
    if (!text) return '';
    const textArea = document.createElement('textarea');
    textArea.innerHTML = text;
    return textArea.value;
}

function openViewModal(id) {
    const inv = window.invoicesData.find(i => i._id === id);
    if (!inv) return showToast('Invoice not found', 'error');

    document.getElementById('viewInvNo').textContent = decodeHTMLEntities(inv.invoiceNumber || inv.invoice_number || 'Draft');
    document.getElementById('viewClientName').textContent = decodeHTMLEntities(inv.clientName || inv.client_name);
    document.getElementById('viewClientEmail').textContent = decodeHTMLEntities(inv.clientEmail || inv.client_email);
    document.getElementById('viewEventName').textContent = decodeHTMLEntities(inv.eventName || inv.event_name);
    document.getElementById('viewEventDate').textContent = inv.eventDate ? new Date(inv.eventDate).toLocaleDateString('en-KE', { weekday:'long', day:'2-digit', month:'long', year:'numeric' }) : 'No date';
    
    // Services table
    const body = document.getElementById('viewItemsBody');
    body.innerHTML = '';
    let services = inv.services || [];

    // --- FALLBACK LOGIC ---
    if (services.length === 0) {
        let ev = inv.eventId ? window.assignmentsData.find(a => a._id === inv.eventId) : null;
        if (!ev && (inv.eventName || inv.event_name)) {
            // Aggressive match by name
            ev = window.assignmentsData.find(a => a.title === (inv.eventName || inv.event_name));
        }
        
        const rate = (ev && ev.pay_rate) || (inv.subtotal > 0 && inv.staffCount > 0 ? inv.subtotal / inv.staffCount : inv.subtotal || 0);
        const count = (ev && (ev.usherCount || (ev.accepted_staff_ids ? ev.accepted_staff_ids.length : 0))) || inv.staffCount || 1;
        services = [{
            name: `Staffing Services - ${decodeHTMLEntities(inv.eventName || inv.event_name)}`,
            quantity: count,
            unitPrice: rate,
            total: inv.subtotal || (rate * count)
        }];
    }
    // -----------------------
    
    services.forEach(s => {
        const row = `<tr class="border-b border-white/5">
            <td class="px-4 py-2">${decodeHTMLEntities(s.name || s.description || 'Service')}</td>
            <td class="px-4 py-2 text-center">${s.quantity || 1}</td>
            <td class="px-4 py-2 text-right">KSh ${Number(s.unitPrice || s.unit_price || 0).toLocaleString()}</td>
            <td class="px-4 py-2 text-right font-bold text-tx-1">KSh ${Number(s.total || 0).toLocaleString()}</td>
        </tr>`;
        body.innerHTML += row;
    });

    // Summary
    document.getElementById('viewSubtotal').textContent = 'KSh ' + (inv.subtotal || 0).toLocaleString();
    document.getElementById('viewVAT').textContent = 'KSh ' + (inv.vatAmount || 0).toLocaleString();
    document.getElementById('viewTotal').textContent = 'KSh ' + (inv.totalAmount || 0).toLocaleString();

    // Notes
    if (inv.notes && inv.notes !== `Auto-generated invoice for ${inv.eventName}`) {
        document.getElementById('viewNotes').textContent = inv.notes;
        document.getElementById('viewNotesContainer').classList.remove('hidden');
    } else {
        document.getElementById('viewNotesContainer').classList.add('hidden');
    }

    // Download link
    document.getElementById('viewDownloadLink').href = `/portal/admin-staff/invoices/${inv._id}/download`;

    document.getElementById('viewModal').classList.remove('hidden');
}

function addServiceRow() {
    document.getElementById('serviceRows').insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', `
        <div class="service-row grid grid-cols-[1fr,60px,80px,30px] gap-2 items-center">
            <input type="text" placeholder="Description" class="svc-desc bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-xs text-tx-1 focus:border-blue-500/40 focus:outline-none">
            <input type="number" placeholder="Qty" value="1" min="1" class="svc-qty bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-2 py-2 text-xs text-tx-1 text-center focus:outline-none" oninput="updateTotal()">
            <input type="number" placeholder="Rate" class="svc-price bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-2 py-2 text-xs text-tx-1 focus:outline-none" oninput="updateTotal()">
            <button type="button" onclick="this.closest('.service-row').remove(); updateTotal()" class="text-red-400 hover:text-red-300 w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center text-xs">Ã—</button>
        </div>`);
}
function updateTotal() {
    let sub = 0;
    document.querySelectorAll('.service-row').forEach(r => {
        const qty = parseFloat(r.querySelector('.svc-qty')?.value) || 1;
        const price = parseFloat(r.querySelector('.svc-price')?.value) || 0;
        sub += qty * price;
    });
    const vat = Math.round(sub * 0.16);
    document.getElementById('displaySubtotal').textContent = 'KSh ' + sub.toLocaleString();
    document.getElementById('displayVAT').textContent = 'KSh ' + vat.toLocaleString();
    document.getElementById('displayTotal').textContent = 'KSh ' + (sub + vat).toLocaleString();
}

document.getElementById('invoiceForm').addEventListener('submit', async (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    const services = [...document.querySelectorAll('.service-row')].map(r => ({
        description: r.querySelector('.svc-desc').value,
        quantity:    r.querySelector('.svc-qty').value,
        unit_price:  r.querySelector('.svc-price').value
    })).filter(s => s.description || s.unit_price);

    const body = {
        client_name:   document.getElementById('invClientName').value,
        client_email:  document.getElementById('invClientEmail').value,
        event_name:    document.getElementById('invEventName').value,
        event_date:    document.getElementById('invEventDate').value,
        staff_count:   document.getElementById('invStaffCount').value,
        assignment_id: document.getElementById('invAssignment').value,
        notes:         document.getElementById('invNotes').value,
        services_json: JSON.stringify(services)
    };

    try {
        const csrf = document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '';
        const res = await fetch('/portal/admin-staff/invoices/generate', { method: 'POST', headers: {'Content-Type':'application/json', 'CSRF-Token': csrf}, body: JSON.stringify(body) });
        const data = await res.json();
        if (data.success) {
            showToast(`Invoice ${data.invoice.invoiceNumber || data.invoice.invoice_number} created!`, 'success');
            setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 1500);
        } else showToast(data.error, 'error');
    } catch(e) { showToast('Error creating invoice', 'error'); }
});

async function sendInvoice(id) {
    if (!confirm('Send invoice to client email?')) return;
    const csrf = document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '';
    const res = await fetch(`/portal/admin-staff/invoices/${id}/send-email`, { method: 'POST', headers: {'CSRF-Token': csrf} });
    const data = await res.json();
    if (data.success) { showToast(data.message, 'success'); location.reload(); }
    else showToast(data.error, 'error');
}
async function updateStatus(id, status) {
    const csrf = document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '';
    const res = await fetch(`/portal/admin-staff/invoices/${id}/status`, { method: 'PUT', headers: {'Content-Type':'application/json', 'CSRF-Token': csrf}, body: JSON.stringify({ status }) });
    const data = await res.json();
    if (data.success) showToast('Status updated', 'success');
    else showToast(data.error, 'error');
}
async function deleteInvoice(id) {
    if (!confirm('Delete this invoice?')) return;
    const csrf = document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '';
    const res = await fetch(`/portal/admin-staff/invoices/${id}`, { method: 'DELETE', headers: {'CSRF-Token': csrf} });
    const data = await res.json();
    if (data.success) { showToast('Invoice deleted', 'success'); location.reload(); }
    else showToast(data.error, 'error');
}

function autoFillFromEvent(select) {
    const opt = select.options[select.selectedIndex];
    if (!opt || !opt.value) return;

    const title  = opt.dataset.title  || '';
    const date   = opt.dataset.date   || '';
    const client = opt.dataset.client || '';
    const email  = opt.dataset.email  || '';
    const staff  = opt.dataset.staff  || '0';
    const rate   = parseFloat(opt.dataset.rate) || 0;

    if (title)  document.getElementById('invEventName').value   = title;
    if (date)   document.getElementById('invEventDate').value   = date;
    if (client) document.getElementById('invClientName').value  = client;
    if (email)  document.getElementById('invClientEmail').value = email;
    if (staff)  document.getElementById('invStaffCount').value  = staff;

    if (rate > 0 && parseInt(staff) > 0) {
        document.getElementById('serviceRows').innerHTML = '';
        document.getElementById('serviceRows').insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', `
            <div class="service-row grid grid-cols-[1fr,60px,80px,30px] gap-2 items-center">
                <input type="text" value="Event Staffing - ${title}" class="svc-desc bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-xs text-tx-1 focus:border-blue-500/40 focus:outline-none">
                <input type="number" value="${staff}" min="1" class="svc-qty bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-2 py-2 text-xs text-tx-1 text-center focus:outline-none" oninput="updateTotal()">
                <input type="number" value="${rate}" class="svc-price bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-2 py-2 text-xs text-tx-1 focus:outline-none" oninput="updateTotal()">
                <button type="button" onclick="this.closest('.service-row').remove(); updateTotal()" class="text-red-400 hover:text-red-300 w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center text-xs">&times;</button>
            </div>`);
        updateTotal();
    }
}
async function resendThankYou(id, email) {
    if (!email) { showToast('No client email on this invoice', 'error'); return; }
    if (!confirm('Resend thank you + invoice email to ' + email + '?')) return;
    const csrf = document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '';
    const res = await fetch(`/portal/admin-staff/invoices/${id}/send-email`, { method: 'POST', headers: {'CSRF-Token': csrf} });
    const data = await res.json();
    if (data.success) showToast('Emails resent to ' + email, 'success');
    else showToast(data.error || 'Failed', 'error');
}

// â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• EDIT INVOICE â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
function openEditModal(id) {
    const inv = window.invoicesData.find(i => i._id === id);
    if (!inv) return showToast('Invoice not found', 'error');

    document.getElementById('editInvId').value = id;
    document.getElementById('editInvNo').textContent = inv.invoiceNumber || inv.invoice_number || '';
    document.getElementById('editClientName').value = decodeHTMLEntities(inv.clientName || inv.client_name || '');
    document.getElementById('editClientEmail').value = inv.clientEmail || inv.client_email || '';
    document.getElementById('editEventName').value = decodeHTMLEntities(inv.eventName || inv.event_name || '');
    document.getElementById('editEventDate').value = inv.eventDate ? new Date(inv.eventDate).toISOString().split('T')[0] : '';
    document.getElementById('editStaffCount').value = inv.staffCount || 0;
    document.getElementById('editNotes').value = inv.notes || '';

    // Populate service rows
    const container = document.getElementById('editServiceRows');
    container.innerHTML = '';
    let services = inv.services || [];

    // If no services stored, create a placeholder row from fallback
    if (services.length === 0) {
        let ev = inv.eventId ? window.assignmentsData.find(a => a._id === inv.eventId) : null;
        if (!ev && (inv.eventName || inv.event_name)) {
            ev = window.assignmentsData.find(a => a.title === (inv.eventName || inv.event_name));
        }
        const rate = (ev && ev.pay_rate) || 0;
        const count = (ev && (ev.usherCount || (ev.accepted_staff_ids ? ev.accepted_staff_ids.length : 0))) || inv.staffCount || 1;
        services = [{ name: `Event Staffing - ${decodeHTMLEntities(inv.eventName || inv.event_name || 'Event')}`, quantity: count, unitPrice: rate, total: rate * count }];
    }

    services.forEach(s => {
        container.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', `
            <div class="edit-svc-row grid grid-cols-[1fr,60px,80px,30px] gap-2 items-center">
                <input type="text" value="${decodeHTMLEntities(s.name || s.description || '')}" class="edit-svc-desc bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-xs text-tx-1 focus:border-amber-500/40 focus:outline-none">
                <input type="number" value="${s.quantity || 1}" min="1" class="edit-svc-qty bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-2 py-2 text-xs text-tx-1 text-center focus:outline-none" oninput="updateEditTotal()">
                <input type="number" value="${s.unitPrice || s.unit_price || 0}" class="edit-svc-price bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-2 py-2 text-xs text-tx-1 focus:outline-none" oninput="updateEditTotal()">
                <button type="button" onclick="this.closest('.edit-svc-row').remove(); updateEditTotal()" class="text-red-400 hover:text-red-300 w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center text-xs">&times;</button>
            </div>`);
    });
    updateEditTotal();
    document.getElementById('editModal').classList.remove('hidden');
}

function addEditServiceRow() {
    document.getElementById('editServiceRows').insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', `
        <div class="edit-svc-row grid grid-cols-[1fr,60px,80px,30px] gap-2 items-center">
            <input type="text" placeholder="Description" class="edit-svc-desc bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-3 py-2 text-xs text-tx-1 focus:border-amber-500/40 focus:outline-none">
            <input type="number" placeholder="Qty" value="1" min="1" class="edit-svc-qty bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-2 py-2 text-xs text-tx-1 text-center focus:outline-none" oninput="updateEditTotal()">
            <input type="number" placeholder="Rate" class="edit-svc-price bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-2 py-2 text-xs text-tx-1 focus:outline-none" oninput="updateEditTotal()">
            <button type="button" onclick="this.closest('.edit-svc-row').remove(); updateEditTotal()" class="text-red-400 hover:text-red-300 w-6 h-6 flex items-center justify-center text-xs">&times;</button>
        </div>`);
}

function updateEditTotal() {
    let sub = 0;
    document.querySelectorAll('.edit-svc-row').forEach(r => {
        const qty = parseFloat(r.querySelector('.edit-svc-qty')?.value) || 1;
        const price = parseFloat(r.querySelector('.edit-svc-price')?.value) || 0;
        sub += qty * price;
    });
    const vat = Math.round(sub * 0.16);
    document.getElementById('editDisplaySubtotal').textContent = 'KSh ' + sub.toLocaleString();
    document.getElementById('editDisplayVAT').textContent = 'KSh ' + vat.toLocaleString();
    document.getElementById('editDisplayTotal').textContent = 'KSh ' + (sub + vat).toLocaleString();
}

document.getElementById('editInvoiceForm').addEventListener('submit', async (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    const id = document.getElementById('editInvId').value;
    const services = [...document.querySelectorAll('.edit-svc-row')].map(r => ({
        description: r.querySelector('.edit-svc-desc').value,
        quantity:    r.querySelector('.edit-svc-qty').value,
        unit_price:  r.querySelector('.edit-svc-price').value
    })).filter(s => s.description || s.unit_price);

    const body = {
        client_name:   document.getElementById('editClientName').value,
        client_email:  document.getElementById('editClientEmail').value,
        event_name:    document.getElementById('editEventName').value,
        event_date:    document.getElementById('editEventDate').value,
        staff_count:   document.getElementById('editStaffCount').value,
        notes:         document.getElementById('editNotes').value,
        services_json: JSON.stringify(services)
    };

    try {
        const csrf = document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '';
        const res = await fetch(`/portal/admin-staff/invoices/${id}`, {
            method: 'PUT',
            headers: {'Content-Type':'application/json', 'CSRF-Token': csrf},
            body: JSON.stringify(body)
        });
        const data = await res.json();
        if (data.success) {
            showToast('Invoice updated & PDF regenerated!', 'success');
            setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 1200);
        } else showToast(data.error || 'Update failed', 'error');
    } catch(e) { showToast('Error updating invoice', 'error'); }
});
</script>

    </div>

<script>
const months = ['Jan','Feb','Mar','Apr','May','Jun','Jul','Aug','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dec'];
const trendData = <%- JSON.stringify(monthlyTrend) %>;

const ctx = document.getElementById('trendChart').getContext('2d');
new Chart(ctx, {
    type: 'line',
    data: {
        labels: trendData.map(d => `${months[d._id.month-1]} ${d._id.year}`),
        datasets: [{
            label: 'Avg Rating',
            data: trendData.map(d => parseFloat(d.avg_rating.toFixed(2))),
            borderColor: '#f59e0b',
            backgroundColor: 'rgba(245,158,11,0.1)',
            borderWidth: 2,
            tension: 0.4,
            fill: true,
            pointBackgroundColor: '#f59e0b',
            pointRadius: 4
        }]
    },
    options: {
        responsive: true,
        plugins: { legend: { labels: { color: '#94a3b8', font: { family: 'Inter' } } } },
        scales: {
            x: { ticks: { color: '#64748b' }, grid: { color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.03)' } },
            y: { min: 0, max: 5, ticks: { color: '#64748b' }, grid: { color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.03)' } }
        }
    }
});
</script>
<% } %>
