                            <div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-700 to-blue-500 flex items-center justify-center text-[0.5rem] font-bold text-white shrink-0 mt-1">
                                <%= msg.sender_name ? msg.sender_name.split(' ').map(n=>n[0]).join('').toUpperCase().slice(0,2) : 'SV' %>
                            </div>
                        <% } %>
                        <div class="max-w-[78%]">
                            <div class="text-[0.55rem] text-tx-3 mb-0.5 <%= isAdmin ? 'text-right' : '' %> font-mono">
                                <%= msg.sender_name %> Â· <%= new Date(msg.timestamp).toLocaleTimeString('en-KE', {hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'}) %>
                            </div>
                            <div class="px-2.5 py-2 rounded-xl text-[0.7rem] leading-relaxed <%= isAdmin ? 'bg-emerald-500/20 border border-emerald-500/20 text-emerald-100' : isEmg ? 'bg-red-500/20 border border-red-500/40 text-red-200' : 'bg-white/5 border border-white/5 text-tx-2' %>">
                                <% if(isEmg) { %><i class="fa-solid fa-triangle-exclamation text-red-400 mr-1"></i><% } %>
                                <% if(msg.content) { %><%= msg.content %><% } %>
                                <% if(msg.attachment_url) { %>
                                    <% if(msg.attachment_type === 'image') { %>
                                        <img src="<%= msg.attachment_url %>" class="mt-1.5 rounded-lg max-w-full max-h-32 object-cover" alt="attachment">
                                    <% } else if(msg.attachment_type === 'video') { %>
                                        <video src="<%= msg.attachment_url %>" class="mt-1.5 rounded-lg max-w-full max-h-32" controls></video>
                                    <% } %>
                                <% } %>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                <% }); %>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
// â•â• Socket.io setup â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
const liveSocket = typeof socket !== 'undefined' ? socket : null;

if (liveSocket) {
    liveSocket.emit('joinRoom', 'Admin');

    // Receive messages from supervisors
    liveSocket.on('adminLiveMessage', (msg) => {
        appendChatMessage(msg);
        updateTimeline(`ðŸ’¬ ${msg.sender_name}: ${(msg.content||'').slice(0,60)}`);
    });

    // Emergency flag
    liveSocket.on('emergencyFlag', (msg) => {
        appendEmergency(msg);
        appendChatMessage({ ...msg, is_emergency: true });
        updateTimeline(`ðŸš¨ EMERGENCY from ${msg.sender_name}`, 'red');
        // Show notification
        showToast(`ðŸš¨ Emergency: ${msg.sender_name} â€” ${(msg.content||'').slice(0,80)}`, 'error');
    });

    // Emergency acknowledged
    liveSocket.on('emergencyAcknowledged', (data) => {
        const el = document.querySelector(`[data-emergency-id="${data.id}"]`);
        if (el) el.remove();
        showToast(`Emergency acknowledged by ${data.acked_by}`, 'success');
    });

    // Live attendance updates
    liveSocket.on('liveAttendanceUpdate', (data) => {
        const color = data.action === 'clock_in' ? 'emerald' : 'red';
        updateTimeline(`${data.action === 'clock_in' ? 'âœ…' : 'ðŸ•'} ${data.staff_name} ${data.action?.replace('_',' ')} at ${new Date().toLocaleTimeString('en-KE',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'})}`, color);
    });

    // Supervisor GPS update
    liveSocket.on('supervisorLocationUpdate', (data) => {
        updateTimeline(`ðŸ“ ${data.name} location updated`, 'blue');
    });

    // General metric updates
    liveSocket.on('adminAssignmentUpdate', (data) => {
        if (data.type === 'AUTO_COMPLETED') {
            updateTimeline(`ðŸ”’ Applications closed: ${data.title}`, 'gold');
            showToast(`Applications auto-closed: ${data.title}`, 'success');
        }
    });
}

// â•â• Timestamp â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
function updateLastUpdated() {
    const el = document.getElementById('lastUpdated');
    if (el) el.textContent = 'UPDATED ' + new Date().toLocaleTimeString('en-KE', {hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit',second:'2-digit'});
}
setInterval(updateLastUpdated, 1000);
updateLastUpdated();

// â•â• Chat append â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
function appendChatMessage(msg) {
    const log  = document.getElementById('chatLog');
    const isAdmin = msg.sender_role === 'Admin';
    const isEmg   = msg.is_emergency;
    const initials = msg.sender_name ? msg.sender_name.split(' ').map(n=>n[0]).join('').toUpperCase().slice(0,2) : '??';
    const timeStr  = new Date(msg.timestamp || Date.now()).toLocaleTimeString('en-KE',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'});

    const bubble = isAdmin
        ? `bg-emerald-500/20 border border-emerald-500/20 text-emerald-100`
        : isEmg
            ? `bg-red-500/20 border border-red-500/40 text-red-200`
            : `bg-white/5 border border-white/5 text-gray-300`;

    const avatarHtml = !isAdmin ? `<div class="w-6 h-6 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-blue-700 to-blue-500 flex items-center justify-center text-[0.5rem] font-bold text-white shrink-0 mt-1">${initials}</div>` : '';

    let contentHtml = msg.content ? msg.content : '';
    if (msg.attachment_url) {
        if (msg.attachment_type === 'image') contentHtml += `<img src="${msg.attachment_url}" class="mt-1.5 rounded-lg max-w-full max-h-32 object-cover block" alt="img">`;
        if (msg.attachment_type === 'video') contentHtml += `<video src="${msg.attachment_url}" class="mt-1.5 rounded-lg max-w-full max-h-32 block" controls></video>`;
    }

    const html = `
        <div class="flex ${isAdmin ? 'justify-end' : 'justify-start'} gap-1.5">
            ${avatarHtml}
            <div class="max-w-[78%]">
                <div class="text-[0.55rem] text-gray-500 mb-0.5 ${isAdmin ? 'text-right' : ''} font-mono">${msg.sender_name} Â· ${timeStr}</div>
                <div class="px-2.5 py-2 rounded-xl text-[0.7rem] leading-relaxed ${bubble}">
                    ${isEmg ? '<i class="fa-solid fa-triangle-exclamation text-red-400 mr-1"></i>' : ''}
                    ${contentHtml}
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>`;

    log.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', html);
    log.scrollTop = log.scrollHeight;
    updateLastUpdated();
}

// â•â• Emergency panel â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
function appendEmergency(msg) {
    const panel = document.getElementById('emergencyPanel');
    const list  = document.getElementById('emergencyList');
    panel.classList.remove('hidden');

    list.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', `
        <div class="px-3 py-2.5 flex items-start gap-2" data-emergency-id="${msg._id || ''}">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-triangle-exclamation text-red-400 mt-0.5 animate-pulse text-xs"></i>
            <div class="flex-1 min-w-0">
                <div class="text-xs font-bold text-red-300">${msg.sender_name}</div>
                <div class="text-[0.65rem] text-red-200/70">${msg.content || ''}</div>
            </div>
            <button onclick="ackEmergency('${msg._id}')" class="text-[0.55rem] font-bold border border-red-500/40 text-red-400 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded hover:bg-red-500/20 transition-colors shrink-0">ACK</button>
        </div>`);
}

// â•â• Timeline â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
function updateTimeline(msg, colorKey = 'emerald') {
    const colors = { emerald: 'text-emerald-400', red: 'text-red-400', blue: 'text-blue-400', gold: 'text-gold-400' };
    const tl   = document.getElementById('activityTimeline');
    const time = new Date().toLocaleTimeString('en-KE', {hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit',second:'2-digit'});
    const ph   = tl.querySelector('[data-placeholder]');
    if (ph) ph.remove();

    tl.insertAdjacentHTML('afterbegin', `
        <div class="flex items-start gap-2 text-[0.6rem] font-mono">
            <span class="text-tx-3 shrink-0 opacity-60">${time}</span>
            <span class="${colors[colorKey] || colors.emerald}">${msg}</span>
        </div>`);

    // Keep only 30 entries
    while (tl.children.length > 30) tl.removeChild(tl.lastChild);
    updateLastUpdated();
}

// â•â• Send admin message â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
async function sendAdminMessage() {
    const content    = document.getElementById('msgContent').value.trim();
    const recipient  = document.getElementById('msgRecipient').value;
    const fileInput  = document.getElementById('msgAttachment');
    const attachment = fileInput.files[0];

    if (!content && !attachment) { showToast('Enter a message to transmit', 'error'); return; }

    const fd = new FormData();
    if (content)    fd.append('content', content);
    if (recipient)  fd.append('recipient_id', recipient);
    if (attachment) fd.append('attachment', attachment);

    try {
        const res = await fetch('/portal/admin/live/message', { method: 'POST', body: fd });
        const data = await res.json();

        if (data.success) {
            document.getElementById('msgContent').value = '';
            fileInput.value = '';
            document.getElementById('attachPreview').classList.add('hidden');
            appendChatMessage(data.message);
            if (liveSocket) liveSocket.emit('adminToSupervisor', { ...data.message, recipientId: recipient || null });
            showToast('Transmitted âœ“', 'success');
        } else {
            showToast('Error: ' + data.error, 'error');
        }
    } catch (err) {
        showToast('Transmission failed', 'error');
    }
}

// â•â• Acknowledge emergency â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
async function ackEmergency(id) {
    try {
        await fetch(`/portal/admin/live/emergency-ack/${id}`, { method: 'POST' });
        if (liveSocket) liveSocket.emit('emergencyAck', { id, acked_by: '<%= user.name %>' });
        document.querySelector(`[data-emergency-id="${id}"]`)?.remove();
        document.getElementById('emergencyBanner')?.remove();
        showToast('Emergency acknowledged', 'success');
    } catch(e) { showToast('Error', 'error'); }
}

// â•â• File attachment preview â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
document.getElementById('msgAttachment').addEventListener('change', function() {
    const preview = document.getElementById('attachPreview');
    if (this.files[0]) {
        preview.textContent = `ðŸ“Ž ${this.files[0].name}`;
        preview.classList.remove('hidden');
    } else {
        preview.classList.add('hidden');
    }
});

// â•â• Focus on event (scroll left panel) â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
function focusEvent(eventId) {
    updateTimeline(`ðŸŽ¯ Focused: event ${eventId.slice(-6)}`);
}

// â•â• Auto-refresh messages every 60s (fallback) â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
let lastFetch = Date.now();
setInterval(async () => {
    try {
        const res  = await fetch(`/portal/admin/live/messages?since=${new Date(lastFetch).toISOString()}`);
        const data = await res.json();
        if (data.success && data.messages.length > 0) {
            data.messages.forEach(appendChatMessage);
            lastFetch = Date.now();
        }
    } catch(e) { /* silent */ }
}, 60000);

// Scroll chat to bottom on load
const chatLog = document.getElementById('chatLog');
chatLog.scrollTop = chatLog.scrollHeight;
</script>

  <div class="hidden xl:flex flex-col gap-4 animate-fade-left">
    
    <!-- Balance Panel -->
    <div class="glass-card relative overflow-hidden p-5 border-t-2 border-t-gold-500">
      <div class="absolute top-0 right-0 p-8 text-gold-500/5 rotate-12 scale-150 pointer-events-none">
        <i class="fa-solid fa-piggy-bank text-9xl"></i>
      </div>
      
      <div class="relative z-10 space-y-5">
        
        <div>
           <div class="text-[0.65rem] text-tx-3 uppercase tracking-wider font-bold mb-1 flex items-center gap-1.5"><i class="fa-solid fa-clock-rotate-left text-gold-400 opacity-60"></i> Pending Transfers</div>
           <div class="font-display text-2xl font-extrabold text-gold-400 font-mono tracking-tight drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(250,204,21,0.3)]">
               KSh <%= stats && stats.pending_kes ? stats.pending_kes.toLocaleString() : '0' %>
           </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="pt-4 border-t border-white/10">
           <div class="text-[0.65rem] text-tx-3 uppercase tracking-wider font-bold mb-1 flex items-center gap-1.5"><i class="fa-solid fa-triangle-exclamation text-red-500 opacity-60"></i> Disputed Claims</div>
           <div class="font-display text-xl font-extrabold text-red-500 font-mono tracking-tight drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(239,68,68,0.3)]">
               <%= stats && stats.disputed ? stats.disputed : '0' %>
           </div>
        </div>
        
      </div>
    </div>
    
    <!-- Management Actions -->
    <div class="glass-card p-5 space-y-6">
       
       <div>
         <h4 class="text-sm font-bold text-tx-1 mb-2">Mass Processing Operations</h4>
         <p class="text-[0.7rem] text-tx-3 mb-4 leading-relaxed">Select items in the matrix to apply bulk funding rules or handle disputed transfers quickly.</p>
         
         <div class="space-y-3 mb-5">
            <label class="flex items-center gap-3 p-2.5 rounded-lg border border-white/5 bg-white/5 cursor-pointer hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors group">
              <input type="checkbox" class="w-4 h-4 rounded border-white/20 bg-dark-bg accent-gold-500">
              <span class="text-xs font-bold text-tx-2 group-hover:text-tx-1 transition-colors">Acknowledge All Disputes</span>
            </label>
            <label class="flex items-center gap-3 p-2.5 rounded-lg border border-white/5 bg-white/5 cursor-pointer hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors group">
              <input type="checkbox" class="w-4 h-4 rounded border-white/20 bg-dark-bg accent-gold-500">
              <span class="text-xs font-bold text-tx-2 group-hover:text-tx-1 transition-colors">Auto-Clear Minor Variances</span>
            </label>
         </div>
         
         <div class="pt-4 border-t border-white/10">
             <div class="text-sm font-bold text-tx-1 mb-1 relative top-[2px]">Generate Report</div>
             <p class="text-[0.65rem] text-tx-3 mb-3">Compile structured bank-ready CSVs.</p>
             <button class="btn btn-primary w-full shadow-glow-emerald" onclick="exportPaymentsExcel()">
                <i class="fa-solid fa-file-excel mr-2"></i> Download Excel Ledger
             </button>
             <button class="btn btn-outline w-full mt-2 border-white/10" onclick="exportPaymentsCSV()">
                <i class="fa-solid fa-file-csv mr-2"></i> Download CSV
             </button>
         </div>
       </div>
       
    </div>

    <!-- Payment History Section -->
    <div class="glass-card p-5 mt-4">
      <h4 class="text-sm font-bold text-tx-1 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
        <i class="fa-solid fa-clock-rotate-left text-gold-400"></i> Payment History
      </h4>
      <div class="space-y-2 max-h-[400px] overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar" id="paymentHistoryList">
  
        <% let allPayments = []; %>
        <% rawAssignments.forEach(a => { %>
          <% (a.staff_payments || []).forEach(sp => { %>
            <% allPayments.push({ ...sp, eventTitle: a.title, eventDate: a.date }); %>
          <% }); %>
        <% }); %>
        <% allPayments.sort((x,y) => new Date(y.sent_at||0) - new Date(x.sent_at||0)).slice(0,50).forEach(p => { %>
          <div class="flex items-center justify-between p-3 rounded-lg bg-white/[0.02] border border-white/5 hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors">
            <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
              <div class="w-7 h-7 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-xs
                <%= p.status === 'Received' ? 'bg-emerald-500/20 text-emerald-400' : p.status === 'Sent' ? 'bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-400' : p.status === 'Disputed' ? 'bg-red-500/20 text-red-400' : 'bg-gold-500/20 text-gold-400' %>">
                <i class="fa-solid <%= p.payment_method === 'Cash' ? 'fa-money-bills' : 'fa-mobile-screen-button' %>"></i>
              </div>
              <div>
                <div class="text-xs font-bold text-tx-1"><%= p.staff_name || 'Staff' %></div>
                <div class="text-[0.6rem] text-tx-3 mt-0.5"><%= p.eventTitle %> &bull; <%= p.payment_method || 'MPesa' %></div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="text-right">
              <div class="text-xs font-bold text-gold-400 font-mono">KSh <%= (p.amount||0).toLocaleString() %></div>
              <div class="text-[0.6rem] text-tx-3 mt-0.5"><%= p.sent_at ? new Date(p.sent_at).toLocaleDateString('en-KE') : 'Pending' %></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        <% }); %>
        <% if (allPayments.length === 0) { %>
          <div class="py-8 text-center text-tx-3 text-xs">No payment history yet</div>
        <% } %>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>



  <!-- Payment History Section -->
  <div class="glass-card p-5 mt-4">
    <h4 class="text-sm font-bold text-tx-1 mb-4 flex items-center gap-2">
      <i class="fa-solid fa-clock-rotate-left text-gold-400"></i> Payment History
    </h4>
    <div class="space-y-2 max-h-[400px] overflow-y-auto custom-scrollbar" id="paymentHistoryList">

      <% rawAssignments.forEach(a => { (a.staff_payments || []).forEach(sp => { allPayments.push({ ...sp, eventTitle: a.title, eventDate: a.date }); }); }); %>
      <% allPayments.sort((x,y) => new Date(y.sent_at||0) - new Date(x.sent_at||0)).slice(0,50).forEach(p => { %>
        <div class="flex items-center justify-between p-3 rounded-lg bg-white/[0.02] border border-white/5 hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors">
          <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
            <div class="w-7 h-7 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center text-xs <%= p.status === 'Received' ? 'bg-emerald-500/20 text-emerald-400' : p.status === 'Sent' ? 'bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-400' : 'bg-gold-500/20 text-gold-400' %>">
              <i class="fa-solid <%= p.payment_method === 'Cash' ? 'fa-money-bills' : 'fa-mobile-screen-button' %>"></i>
            </div>
            <div>
              <div class="text-xs font-bold text-tx-1"><%= p.staff_name || 'Staff' %></div>
              <div class="text-[0.6rem] text-tx-3 mt-0.5"><%= p.eventTitle %> &bull; <%= p.payment_method || 'MPesa' %></div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="text-right">
            <div class="text-xs font-bold text-gold-400 font-mono">KSh <%= (p.amount||0).toLocaleString() %></div>
            <div class="text-[0.6rem] text-tx-3 mt-0.5"><%= p.sent_at ? new Date(p.sent_at).toLocaleDateString('en-KE') : 'Pending' %></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      <% }); %>
      <% if (allPayments.length === 0) { %>
        <div class="py-8 text-center text-tx-3 text-xs">No payment history yet</div>
      <% } %>
    </div>
  </div>
<!-- Context Menu (right-click on row) -->
<div id="payContextMenu" class="absolute bg-dark-card border border-white/10 rounded-xl shadow-2xl p-1.5 min-w-[200px] z-[500] backdrop-blur-md hidden transition-opacity">
  <button class="w-full text-left px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-blue-400 hover:bg-blue-500/10 rounded flex items-center gap-2 transition-colors mb-0.5" onclick="markSent()">
     <i class="fa-solid fa-paper-plane w-4"></i> Override: Mark Sent

     <i class="fa-solid fa-check-double w-4"></i> Manual Confirmation

  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:100vh;">

<script>
  // Search & Filter
  function filterPayments(q) {
      document.querySelectorAll('#payTbody tr').forEach(r => {
          const nm = r.querySelector('.font-bold.text-sm')?.textContent?.toLowerCase() || '';
          r.style.display = nm.includes(q.toLowerCase()) ? '' : 'none';
      });
  }
  
  function filterPayStatus(v) {
      document.querySelectorAll('#payTbody tr').forEach(r => {
          if (!v) { r.style.display = ''; return; }
          const statuses = v.split(',').map(s => s.trim().toLowerCase());
          // Getting raw cell text representing status
          const statText = r.querySelector('td:nth-child(4) span')?.textContent?.trim().toLowerCase() || '';
          
          let show = false;
          for(let st of statuses) {
             if(statText.includes(st)) { show = true; break;}
          }
          r.style.display = show ? '' : 'none';
      });
  }

  // Preload JSON for faster local fallback
  const _allAssignments = <%- JSON.stringify(rawAssignments || []) %>;

  async function showPayPanel(e, rowEl) {
      e.stopPropagation();
      const row = rowEl.closest('tr');
      const assignmentId = row.dataset.id; console.log('AssignmentID:', assignmentId);
      
      document.getElementById('vpm-event').textContent = 'Connecting...';
      openModal('viewPaymentModal');

      let raw;
      try {
          const resp = await fetch(`/portal/admin-staff/assignments/${assignmentId}`, {
              headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json' }
          });
          const data = await resp.json();
          raw = data.data || data;
      } catch (err) {
          console.error('Fetch error:', err.message);
          raw = _allAssignments.find(a => String(a._id) === String(assignmentId));
          console.log('Fallback raw staff_payments:', raw?.staff_payments?.length, 'accepted:', raw?.accepted_staff_ids?.length);
      }
      
      if (!raw) { showToast('Telemetry fetch failed', 'error'); closeModal('viewPaymentModal'); return; }

      let staffList = [];
      if (raw.staff_payments && raw.staff_payments.length > 0) {
          staffList = raw.staff_payments.map(sp => ({
              spid: String(sp._id),
              sid: String(sp.staff_id || ''),
              name: sp.staff_name || 'Unknown',
              phone: sp.phone || '',
              amount: sp.amount || raw.pay_rate || 0,
              status: sp.status || 'Pending',
              txn: sp.transaction_id || '',
              received_at: sp.received_at || null
          }));
      } else if (raw.accepted_staff_ids && raw.accepted_staff_ids.length > 0) {
          staffList = raw.accepted_staff_ids.map(s => ({
              spid: null,
              sid: String(s._id || ''),
              name: s.name || 'Unknown',
              phone: s.phone || '',
              amount: raw.pay_rate || 0,
              status: raw.payment_status || 'Pending',
              txn: '',
              received_at: null
          }));
      }

      // Populate Header
      document.getElementById('vpm-event').textContent = raw.title || 'â€”';
      document.getElementById('vpm-amount').textContent = 'KSh ' + (raw.pay_rate || 0).toLocaleString();
      document.getElementById('vpm-date').textContent = raw.date ? new Date(raw.date).toLocaleDateString('en-KE', { day:'2-digit', month:'short', year:'numeric'}) : 'â€”';

      // Populate Staff Rows
      const listEl = document.getElementById('vpm-staff-list');
      listEl.innerHTML = '';

      if (!staffList.length) {
          listEl.innerHTML = `
             <div class="py-10 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-tx-3">
                 <i class="fa-solid fa-users-slash text-2xl opacity-30 mb-2"></i>
                 <p class="text-xs font-semibold">No operational units detected.</p>
             </div>
          `;
      } else {
          staffList.forEach((s, i) => {
              const done = s.status === 'Received' || s.status === 'Disbursed';
              const pillClass = { Pending: 'badge-gold text-gold-400', Sent: 'badge-blue text-blue-400', Received: 'badge-emerald text-emerald-400', Disbursed: 'badge-emerald text-emerald-400', Disputed: 'badge-red text-red-500' }[s.status] || 'badge-gold text-gold-400';
              const initials = s.name.split(' ').map(n => n[0]).join('').slice(0, 2).toUpperCase();
              
                const sent = s.status === 'Sent';
                const bottomSection = done ?
                  `<div class="mt-3 pt-3 border-t border-white/5 flex items-center justify-between">
                    <div class="text-xs text-tx-3 flex items-center gap-1.5 font-mono">
                      <i class="fa-solid fa-fingerprint text-emerald-500 opacity-70"></i> Ref: <span class="text-tx-2 font-bold ml-1">${s.txn || 'N/A'}</span>
                      ${s.received_at ? `<span class="opacity-50 mx-1">&bull;</span> <span class="opacity-70">${new Date(s.received_at).toLocaleDateString('en-GB')}</span>` : ''}
                    </div>
                    ${s.sid ? `<a href="/portal/admin-staff/payments/${assignmentId}/receipt/${s.sid}" target="_blank" class="text-[0.6rem] font-bold text-emerald-400 hover:text-emerald-300 uppercase tracking-wider flex items-center"><i class="fa-solid fa-download mr-1"></i> Receipt</a>` : ''}
                   </div>`
                  : sent ?
                  `<div class="mt-3 pt-3 border-t border-white/5 flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
                    <div class="text-[0.65rem] text-blue-400 flex items-center gap-2">
                      <i class="fa-solid fa-paper-plane animate-pulse"></i>
                      <span>Sent via M-Pesa &mdash; awaiting confirmation.</span>
                    </div>
                    <button onclick="markReceivedManual('${assignmentId}','${s.spid || ''}',${i})"
                      class="btn btn-xs bg-emerald-600/20 text-emerald-400 hover:bg-emerald-500 hover:text-white border border-emerald-500/30 font-bold text-[0.65rem] whitespace-nowrap flex-shrink-0">
                      <i class="fa-solid fa-check mr-1"></i> Confirm Received
                    </button>
                   </div>`
                  :
                  `<div class="mt-3 pt-3 border-t border-white/5 flex items-center gap-3">
                    <div class="relative flex-1 max-w-[150px]">
                      <span class="absolute left-2.5 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 text-[0.65rem] font-bold text-tx-3 font-mono">KSh</span>
                      <input type="number" id="amt-${i}" value="${s.amount}" min="0" class="form-input bg-dark-bg border-white/5 text-sm font-mono font-bold text-gold-400 pl-9 w-full rounded-md h-8 py-0">
                    </div>
                    <button id="paybtn-${i}" data-spid="${s.spid || ''}" onclick="openPayMethodModal('${assignmentId}','${s.spid || ''}','${s.name}',document.getElementById('amt-${i}').value)" class="btn btn-primary btn-sm bg-gold-600/20 text-gold-400 hover:bg-gold-500 hover:text-dark-bg border-none font-bold h-8 flex-1 sm:flex-none">
                      <i class="fa-solid fa-money-bill-transfer mr-1"></i> Pay
                    </button>
                   </div>`;

              const cardHtml = `
                <div class="glass-card bg-white/5 border border-white/5 p-3.5 transition-colors hover:bg-white/10 group">
                    <div class="flex items-center justify-between">
                        <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                            <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-dark-card to-dark-bg flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-[0.6rem] text-white ring-1 ring-white/10 shadow-lg shrink-0">
                               ${initials}
                            </div>
                            <div>
                               <div class="font-bold text-sm text-tx-1">${s.name}</div>
                               <div class="text-[0.65rem] text-tx-3 mt-0.5 font-mono">
                                  ${s.phone || 'No Phone Sync'} <span class="mx-1">â€¢</span> <span class="text-gold-400/80">KSh ${s.amount.toLocaleString()}</span>
                               </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                        <span class="text-[0.6rem] font-bold tracking-wider uppercase px-2 py-1 rounded border border-current ${pillClass} bg-transparent flex items-center gap-1.5 shrink-0" id="vpm-pill-${i}">
                            <span class="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-current"></span> ${s.status}
                        </span>
                    </div>
                    ${bottomSection}
                </div>
              `;
              
              // Inserting as pure HTML to skip creating tons of DOM elements manually
              // Safely isolated execution
              listEl.insertAdjacentHTML('beforeend', cardHtml);
          });
      }

      // Populate Footer
      const unpaidCount = staffList.filter(s => s.status !== 'Received' && s.status !== 'Disbursed').length;
      document.getElementById('vpm-footer').innerHTML = `
          <button class="btn btn-outline border-white/10 hover:bg-white/5 text-sm" onclick="closeModal('viewPaymentModal')">Cancel Term</button>
          ${unpaidCount > 0 ? `
             <button class="btn btn-primary shadow-glow-gold bg-gradient-to-r from-gold-600 to-amber-500 text-dark-bg border-none font-bold ml-2" onclick="payAllStaff('${assignmentId}',${staffList.length})">
                <i class="fa-solid fa-boxes-packing mr-2"></i> Batch Process (${unpaidCount})
             </button>
          ` : ''}
      `;
  }

  // Same Logic Engine as Original Code, preserved structure but changed IDs occasionally where they matched new tailwind UI.
  async function payOneStaff(assignmentId, spid, index) {
      const amtEl = document.getElementById('amt-' + index);
      const btn = document.getElementById('paybtn-' + index);
      const amt = amtEl ? parseFloat(amtEl.value) || 0 : 0;

      if (amt <= 0) { showToast('Require valid numerical sum', 'error'); amtEl && amtEl.focus(); return; }

      btn.disabled = true;
      btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fa-solid fa-spinner animate-spin"></i> Executing';

      try {
          const r = await fetch('/portal/admin-staff/assignments/' + assignmentId + '/pay-staff', {
              method: 'POST',
              headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'CSRF-Token': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '' },
              body: JSON.stringify({ staff_payment_id: spid || undefined, amount: amt })
          });
          const d = await r.json();
          if (d.success) {
              showToast('Signal Transmitted', 'success');
              
              const pill = document.getElementById('vpm-pill-' + index);
              if (pill) { 
                 pill.innerHTML = `<span class="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-current"></span> Sent`; 
                 pill.className = 'text-[0.6rem] font-bold tracking-wider uppercase px-2 py-1 rounded border border-current bg-transparent flex items-center gap-1.5 shrink-0 badge-blue text-blue-400'; 
              }
              const inputRow = btn.parentElement;
              if (inputRow) inputRow.outerHTML = `
                <div class="mt-3 pt-3 border-t border-white/5 flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
                  <div class="text-[0.65rem] text-blue-400 flex items-center gap-2">
                    <i class="fa-solid fa-paper-plane animate-pulse"></i>
                    <span>Sent via M-Pesa &mdash; awaiting confirmation.</span>
                  </div>
                  <button onclick="markReceivedManual('${assignmentId}','${spid}',${index})"
                    class="btn btn-xs bg-emerald-600/20 text-emerald-400 hover:bg-emerald-500 hover:text-white border border-emerald-500/30 font-bold text-[0.65rem] whitespace-nowrap flex-shrink-0">
                    <i class="fa-solid fa-check mr-1"></i> Confirm Received
                  </button>
                </div>`;
          } else {
              showToast(d.error || 'Signal Rejected', 'error');
              btn.disabled = false;
              btn.innerHTML = 'Transact Flow';
          }
      } catch (err) {
          showToast('Network Fault', 'error');
          btn.disabled = false;
          btn.innerHTML = 'Transact Flow';
      }
  }

  async function payAllStaff(assignmentId, count) {
      const queue = [];
      for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
          const btn = document.getElementById('paybtn-' + i);
          if (!btn) continue; 
          const amt = parseFloat(document.getElementById('amt-' + i)?.value) || 0;
          if (amt <= 0) {
              showToast('Data Error in forms.', 'error');
              document.getElementById('amt-' + i)?.focus();
              return;
          }
          queue.push({ i, spid: btn.dataset?.spid || '', amt });
      }
      
      if (!queue.length) { showToast('No pending transactions detected', 'info'); return; }

      const payAllBtn = document.getElementById('vpm-footer').querySelector('.btn-primary');
      if (payAllBtn) { payAllBtn.disabled = true; payAllBtn.innerHTML = '<i class="fa-solid fa-spinner animate-spin"></i> Processing...'; }

      let ok = 0;
      for (const item of queue) {
          const btn = document.getElementById('paybtn-' + item.i);
          if (btn) { btn.disabled = true; btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fa-solid fa-spinner animate-spin"></i>'; }
          try {
              const r = await fetch('/portal/admin-staff/assignments/' + assignmentId + '/pay-staff', {
                  method: 'POST',
                  headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'CSRF-Token': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '' },
                  body: JSON.stringify({ staff_payment_id: item.spid || undefined, amount: item.amt })
              });
              const d = await r.json();
              if (d.success) {
                  ok++;
                  const pill = document.getElementById('vpm-pill-' + item.i);
                  if (pill) { 
                      pill.innerHTML = `<span class="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-current"></span> Sent`; 
                      pill.className = 'text-[0.6rem] font-bold tracking-wider uppercase px-2 py-1 rounded border border-current bg-transparent flex items-center gap-1.5 shrink-0 badge-blue text-blue-400'; 
                  }
                  const inputRow = btn ? btn.parentElement : null;
                  if (inputRow) inputRow.outerHTML = `
                     <div class="mt-3 pt-3 border-t border-white/5 flex items-center">
                         <div class="text-xs text-tx-3 flex items-center gap-1.5 italic font-medium"><i class="fa-regular fa-paper-plane text-blue-400"></i> Dispatched to MPESA API.</div>
                     </div>`;
              }
          } catch (e) {}
      }
      showToast(`Batch sequence completed. ${ok}/${queue.length} packets resolved.`, 'success');
  }

  // --- Context Menu Logic ---
  const ctxMenu = document.getElementById('payContextMenu');
  
  document.addEventListener('contextmenu', e => {
      const row = e.target.closest('tbody tr');
      if (row) {
          e.preventDefault();
          ctxMenu.style.display = 'block';
          ctxMenu.classList.remove('hidden');
          
          let x = e.clientX;
          let y = e.clientY;
          if (x + 200 > window.innerWidth) x -= 200;
          if (y + 120 > window.innerHeight) y -= 120;
          
          ctxMenu.style.left = x + 'px';
          ctxMenu.style.top = y + 'px';
          
          setTimeout(() => ctxMenu.classList.add('opacity-100'), 10);
      } else { hideContextMenu(); }
  });
  
  document.addEventListener('click', hideContextMenu);
  function hideContextMenu() {
     ctxMenu.classList.remove('opacity-100');
     setTimeout(() => { ctxMenu.classList.add('hidden'); ctxMenu.style.display = 'none'; }, 150);
  }

  function markSent() { hideContextMenu(); showToast('Signal overriden. Terminals updated.', 'info'); }
  function handleConfirmations() { hideContextMenu(); showToast('Manual query dispatched to servers.', 'info'); }
  function handleDisputes() { hideContextMenu(); showToast('Dispute logic triggered.', 'info'); }

    async function markReceivedManual(assignmentId, spid, idx) {
      if (!spid) return showToast('No payment record ID found', 'error');
      const btn = event.target.closest('button');
      if (btn) { btn.disabled = true; btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fa-solid fa-spinner animate-spin mr-1"></i> Confirming...'; }

      try {
        const csrf = document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '';
        const r = await fetch(`/portal/admin-staff/assignments/${assignmentId}/payments/${spid}/mark-received`, {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'CSRF-Token': csrf }
        });
        const d = await r.json();
        if (d.success) {
          showToast('Payment confirmed as Received', 'success');
          const pill = document.getElementById(`vpm-pill-${idx}`);
          if (pill) {
            pill.className = 'text-[0.6rem] font-bold tracking-wider uppercase px-2 py-1 rounded border border-current badge-emerald text-emerald-400 bg-transparent flex items-center gap-1.5 shrink-0';
            pill.innerHTML = '<span class="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full bg-current"></span> Received';
          }
          setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 1500);
        } else {
          showToast(d.error || 'Failed to confirm', 'error');
          if (btn) { btn.disabled = false; btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fa-solid fa-check mr-1"></i> Confirm Received'; }
        }
      } catch(e) {
        showToast('Network error', 'error');
        if (btn) { btn.disabled = false; btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fa-solid fa-check mr-1"></i> Confirm Received'; }
      }
    }

    // Payment method choice
    let _pendingPayment = null;

    function openPayMethodModal(assignmentId, spId, staffName, amount) {
      _pendingPayment = { assignmentId, spId, amount, staffName };
      document.getElementById('payMethodStaffName').textContent =
        `Paying ${staffName} â€” KSh ${Number(amount).toLocaleString()}`;
      openModal('payMethodModal');
    }

    async function confirmPayment(method) {
      closeModal('payMethodModal');
      if (!_pendingPayment) return;
      const { assignmentId, spId, amount, staffName } = _pendingPayment;
      _pendingPayment = null;

      if (method === 'mpesa') {
        // existing flow â€” amount input already read, just pass through
      }
      if (method === 'cash') {
        if (!confirm(`Confirm cash payment of KSh ${Number(amount).toLocaleString()}? This will immediately mark as Received and send a receipt.`)) return;
      }

      try {
        const csrf = document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '';
        const r = await fetch(`/portal/admin-staff/assignments/${assignmentId}/pay-staff`, {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'CSRF-Token': csrf },
          body: JSON.stringify({
            staff_payment_id: spId,
            amount,
            payment_method: method
          })
        });
        const d = await r.json();
        if (d.success) {
          showToast(d.message || `Payment ${method === 'cash' ? 'recorded' : 'initiated'}`, 'success');
          setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 1200);
        } else {
          showToast(d.error || 'Payment failed', 'error');
        }
      } catch(err) {
          console.error('Fetch error:', err);
        showToast('Request failed', 'error');
          console.log('Fallback raw:', raw);
      }
    }

      function exportPaymentsCSV() {
        const rows = [['Event','Staff','Amount','Method','Status','Transaction ID','Date']];
        (_allAssignments || []).forEach(a => {
          (a.staff_payments || []).forEach(sp => {
            rows.push([
              a.title || '',
              sp.staff_name || '',
              sp.amount || 0,
              sp.payment_method || 'MPesa',
              sp.status || 'Pending',
              sp.transaction_id || '',
              sp.sent_at ? new Date(sp.sent_at).toLocaleDateString('en-KE') : ''
            ]);
          });
        });
        const csv = rows.map(r => r.map(v => `"${String(v).replace(/"/g,'""')}"`).join(',')).join('\n');
        const blob = new Blob([csv], { type: 'text/csv' });
        const a = document.createElement('a');
        a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
        a.download = `payments-${new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10)}.csv`;
        a.click();
      }

      function exportPaymentsExcel() {
        const rows = [['Event','Staff','Amount (KSh)','Payment Method','Status','Transaction ID','Date']];
        (_allAssignments || []).forEach(a => {
          (a.staff_payments || []).forEach(sp => {
            rows.push([
              a.title || '',
              sp.staff_name || '',
              sp.amount || 0,
              sp.payment_method || 'MPesa',
              sp.status || 'Pending',
              sp.transaction_id || '',
              sp.sent_at ? new Date(sp.sent_at).toLocaleDateString('en-KE') : ''
            ]);
          });
        });
        // Build HTML table for Excel
        let html = '<table><tr>' + rows[0].map(h => `<th>${h}</th>`).join('') + '</tr>';
        rows.slice(1).forEach(r => {
          html += '<tr>' + r.map(v => `<td>${v}</td>`).join('') + '</tr>';
        });
        html += '</table>';
        const blob = new Blob([`<html><head><meta charset="utf-8"></head><body>${html}</body></html>`],
          { type: 'application/vnd.ms-excel' });
        const a = document.createElement('a');
        a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob);
        a.download = `payments-${new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10)}.xls`;
        a.click();
      }
</script>

<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js"></script>
<script>
    let distChartInstance = null;

    async function flagStaff(staffId) {
        const reason = prompt("Enter disciplinary reason for this flag (affects AI risk models):");
        if (!reason) return;
        try {
            const res = await fetch(`/portal/admin-staff/performance/flag/${staffId}`, {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'CSRF-Token': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '' },
                body: JSON.stringify({ reason })
            });
            const data = await res.json();
            if (data.success) {
                alert('Flag applied. Risk baseline updated.');
                loadDashboardData();
            } else {
                alert('Failed: ' + data.error);
            }
        } catch (e) { alert(e); }
    }

    async function loadDashboardData() {
        try {
            const res = await fetch('/portal/admin-staff/performance/data');
            const d = await res.json();
            if (!d.success) throw new Error(d.error);

            const payload = d.data;

            // 1. Overview
            let impText = payload.most_improved ? `${payload.most_improved.staff_id.firstname} ${payload.most_improved.staff_id.lastname} (${payload.most_improved.average_overall_score})` : 'N/A';
            let decText = payload.most_declined ? `${payload.most_declined.staff_id.firstname} ${payload.most_declined.staff_id.lastname} (${payload.most_declined.average_overall_score})` : 'N/A';

            document.getElementById('sectOverview').innerHTML = `
                <div class="metric-box"><span class="metric-title">Platform Average</span><span class="metric-val ${payload.platform_average >= 4 ? '' : (payload.platform_average < 3 ? 'bad' : 'neutral')}">${payload.platform_average}</span></div>
                <div class="metric-box"><span class="metric-title">Above 4.0</span><span class="metric-val neutral">${payload.pct_above_4}%</span></div>
                <div class="metric-box"><span class="metric-title">Below 3.0</span><span class="metric-val bad">${payload.pct_below_3}%</span></div>
                <div class="metric-box"><span class="metric-title">Most Improved</span><span class="metric-val neutral" style="font-size:1.2rem; align-items:center; display:flex;"><i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-trend-up trend-up" style="margin-right:8px;"></i> ${impText}</span></div>
                <div class="metric-box"><span class="metric-title">Needs Coaching</span><span class="metric-val bad" style="font-size:1.2rem; align-items:center; display:flex;"><i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-trend-down trend-down" style="margin-right:8px;"></i> ${decText}</span></div>
            `;

            // 2. Chart
            const ctx = document.getElementById('distChart').getContext('2d');
            if (distChartInstance) distChartInstance.destroy();
            distChartInstance = new Chart(ctx, {
                type: 'bar',
                data: {
                    labels: ['1-2', '2-3', '3-4', '4-5'],
                    datasets: [{
                        label: 'Staff Count',
                        data: [payload.distribution['1-2'], payload.distribution['2-3'], payload.distribution['3-4'], payload.distribution['4-5']],
                        backgroundColor: ['#ef4444', '#f59e0b', '#3b82f6', '#10b981'],
                        borderRadius: 4
                    }]
                },
                options: {
                    responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
                    plugins: { legend: { display: false } },
                    scales: { y: { beginAtZero: true, grid: { color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.1)' }, ticks: { color: '#94a3b8' } }, x: { grid: { display: false }, ticks: { color: '#94a3b8' } } }
                }
            });

            // 4. Supervisors
            let supHtml = '';
            if(payload.best_supervisors.length === 0) supHtml = '<div style="color:var(--text-muted); font-size:0.9rem;">No rated supervisors yet.</div>';
            payload.best_supervisors.forEach(s => {
                supHtml += `
                    <div style="padding:12px; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05); border-radius:8px; margin-bottom:8px; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.2);">
                        <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center;">
                            <strong>${s.staff_id.firstname} ${s.staff_id.lastname}</strong>
                            <span style="color:var(--gold); font-weight:700;"><i class="fa-solid fa-star"></i> ${s.supervisor_rating.toFixed(1)}</span>
                        </div>
                        <div style="font-size:0.8rem; color:var(--text-muted); margin-top:4px;">Events: ${s.total_events_supervised} | Avg Team Score: ${s.average_team_score.toFixed(1)}</div>
                    </div>
                `;
            });
            document.getElementById('sectSupervisors').innerHTML = supHtml;

            // 5. Leaderboard
            let lbHtml = '';
            if (payload.top_performers.length === 0) lbHtml = '<tr><td colspan="4" style="text-align:center; color:var(--text-muted);">No profiles yet.</td></tr>';
            payload.top_performers.forEach((p, idx) => {
                let trendIcon = p.score_trend === 'improving' ? '<i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-trend-up trend-up"></i>' : (p.score_trend === 'declining' ? '<i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-trend-down trend-down"></i>' : '<i class="fa-solid fa-minus trend-flat"></i>');
                lbHtml += `
                    <tr>
                        <td style="font-weight:700;">#${idx+1}</td>
                        <td>
                            <div style="font-weight:600;">${p.staff_id.firstname} ${p.staff_id.lastname}</div>
                            <div style="font-size:0.75rem; color:var(--text-muted);">${(p.would_rebook_percentage||0).toFixed(0)}% Rebook Rate</div>
                        </td>
                        <td style="font-weight:700; color:var(--accent);">${p.average_overall_score.toFixed(2)}</td>
                        <td>${trendIcon} <span style="font-size:0.8rem; text-transform:capitalize; margin-left:4px;">${p.score_trend}</span></td>
                    </tr>
                `;
            });
            document.querySelector('#tableTop tbody').innerHTML = lbHtml;

            // 6. Underperformers
            let upHtml = '';
            if (payload.underperformers.length === 0) upHtml = '<div style="color:var(--accent); padding:16px; text-align:center; font-weight:600;"><i class="fa-solid fa-check-circle"></i> No staff currently in risk zone</div>';
            payload.underperformers.sort((a,b)=>a.average_overall_score - b.average_overall_score);
            payload.underperformers.forEach(u => {
                let issues = u.latest_improvement_areas && u.latest_improvement_areas.length > 0 ? u.latest_improvement_areas.join(', ') : 'Overall performance lacking';
                upHtml += `
                    <div style="padding:16px; border:1px solid rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.3); border-radius:12px; margin-bottom:12px; background:rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.05);">
                        <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; margin-bottom:8px;">
                            <strong style="font-size:1.1rem;">${u.staff_id.firstname} ${u.staff_id.lastname}</strong>
                            <span style="background:var(--danger); color:white; padding:2px 8px; border-radius:12px; font-weight:bold; font-size:0.85rem;">${u.average_overall_score.toFixed(2)}</span>
                        </div>
                        <div style="font-size:0.85rem; color:var(--text-muted); margin-bottom:12px;">
                            <strong>Latest Issues:</strong> ${issues}
                        </div>
                        <div style="display:flex; gap:8px;">
                            <button class="btn-action" onclick="flagStaff('${u.staff_id._id}')"><i class="fa-solid fa-flag"></i> Add Disciplinary Flag</button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                `;
            });
            document.getElementById('sectUnderperformers').innerHTML = upHtml;

        } catch (e) {
            console.error(e);
        }
    }

    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', loadDashboardData);
</script>

===== C:\My Web Sites\school\live.themewild.com\emerald\staff-system\views\admin\planners.ejs =====
<% currentPage = 'planners'; %>

<div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-5 animate-fade-up">

        <h1 class="font-display text-2xl font-extrabold text-tx-1 tracking-tight flex items-center gap-3">

            <span>Event Planners Directory</span>

<!-- Filter Bar -->
<div class="glass-card p-3 mb-4 animate-fade-up">
    <form method="GET" class="flex items-center gap-3 flex-wrap">
        <div class="relative flex-1 min-w-[200px]">

<script>
function openPlannerModal(data = null) {
    document.getElementById('plannerId').value = data?._id || '';
    document.getElementById('pName').value    = data?.name || '';
    document.getElementById('pCompany').value = data?.company || '';
    document.getElementById('pPhone').value   = data?.phone || '';
    document.getElementById('pEmail').value   = data?.email || '';
    document.getElementById('pNotes').value   = data?.notes || '';
    document.getElementById('plannerModalTitle').textContent = data ? 'Edit Planner' : 'Add Planner';
    // Reset checkboxes
    document.querySelectorAll('.event-type-cb').forEach(cb => {
        cb.checked = data?.event_types?.includes(cb.value) || false;
    });
    document.getElementById('plannerModal').classList.remove('hidden');
    document.getElementById('plannerModal').classList.add('flex');
}
function closePlannerModal() {
    document.getElementById('plannerModal').classList.add('hidden');
    document.getElementById('plannerModal').classList.remove('flex');
}
function editPlanner(id, data) { openPlannerModal(data); }

document.getElementById('plannerForm').addEventListener('submit', async (e) => {
    e.preventDefault();
    const id     = document.getElementById('plannerId').value;
    const types  = [...document.querySelectorAll('.event-type-cb:checked')].map(cb => cb.value);
    const body   = {
        name:        document.getElementById('pName').value,
        company:     document.getElementById('pCompany').value,
        phone:       document.getElementById('pPhone').value,
        email:       document.getElementById('pEmail').value,
        notes:       document.getElementById('pNotes').value,
        event_types: types
    };
    const url    = id ? `/portal/admin/planners/${id}` : '/portal/admin/planners';
    const method = id ? 'PUT' : 'POST';
    const res    = await fetch(url, { method, headers: {'Content-Type':'application/json'}, body: JSON.stringify(body) });
    const data   = await res.json();
    if (data.success) { showToast(id ? 'Planner updated' : 'Planner added', 'success'); closePlannerModal(); location.reload(); }
    else showToast(data.error, 'error');
});

async function deletePlanner(id, name) {
    if (!confirm(`Delete ${name}?`)) return;
    const res = await fetch(`/portal/admin/planners/${id}`, { method: 'DELETE' });
    const data = await res.json();
    if (data.success) { showToast('Planner deleted', 'success'); location.reload(); }
    else showToast(data.error, 'error');
}
</script>

<!-- CDN Charts Loading -->
<script>
    function loadChartJs(callback) {
        if (window.Chart) { callback(); return; }
        const s = document.createElement('script'); 
        s.src = 'https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/chart.js@4.4.0/dist/chart.umd.min.js'; 
        s.onload = callback; 
        document.head.appendChild(s);
    }

    const chartDefaults = {
        responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false,
        plugins: { legend: { display: false }, tooltip: { enabled: true, backgroundColor: 'rgba(15,23,42,0.9)', titleColor: '#fff', bodyColor: '#94a3b8', borderColor: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.1)', borderWidth: 1 } },
        scales: { 
            x: { grid: { color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.02)' }, ticks: { color: '#64748b', font: { size: 10, family: 'monospace' } } }, 
            y: { grid: { color: 'rgba(255,255,255,0.02)' }, ticks: { color: '#64748b', font: { size: 10, family: 'monospace' } } } 
        }
    };
    
    const months = ['JAN', 'FEB', 'MAR', 'APR', 'MAY', 'JUN', 'JUL', 'AUG', 'SEP', 'OCT', 'NOV', 'DEC'];

    loadChartJs(() => {
        // Line Chart 1
        const c1 = document.getElementById('eventCompletionChart1');
        if (c1) {
            new Chart(c1, {
                type: 'line', 
                data: {
                    labels: months, 
                    datasets: [
                        { label: 'Success', data: months.map(() => Math.floor(Math.random() * 60 + 30)), borderColor: '#3b82f6', backgroundColor: 'rgba(59,130,246,0.1)', tension: 0.4, borderWidth: 2, pointBackgroundColor: '#0f172a', pointBorderColor: '#3b82f6', pointBorderWidth: 2, fill: true },
                        { label: 'Failure', data: months.map(() => Math.floor(Math.random() * 20 + 5)), borderColor: '#ef4444', backgroundColor: 'transparent', tension: 0.4, borderWidth: 2, pointBackgroundColor: '#0f172a', pointBorderColor: '#ef4444', pointBorderWidth: 2, borderDash: [5, 5] }
                    ]
                }, 
                options: { ...chartDefaults, scales: { ...chartDefaults.scales, y: { ...chartDefaults.scales.y, min: 0, max: 100 } } }
            });
        }
        
        // Line Chart 2
        const c2 = document.getElementById('eventCompletionChart2');
        if (c2) {
             new Chart(c2, {
                type: 'line', 
                data: {
                    labels: months, 
                    datasets: [
                        { label: 'Success', data: months.map(() => Math.floor(Math.random() * 60 + 30)), borderColor: '#10b981', backgroundColor: 'transparent', tension: 0.4, borderWidth: 2, pointBackgroundColor: '#0f172a', pointBorderColor: '#10b981', pointBorderWidth: 2 },
                        { label: 'Failure', data: months.map(() => Math.floor(Math.random() * 20 + 5)), borderColor: '#eab308', backgroundColor: 'transparent', tension: 0.4, borderWidth: 2, pointBackgroundColor: '#0f172a', pointBorderColor: '#eab308', pointBorderWidth: 2 }
                    ]
                }, 
                options: { ...chartDefaults, scales: { ...chartDefaults.scales, y: { ...chartDefaults.scales.y, min: 0, max: 100 } } }
            });
        }

        // Attendance donut
        const ad = document.getElementById('attendanceDonut');
        if (ad) {
            new Chart(ad, { 
                type: 'doughnut', 
                data: { 
                    labels: ['Synced', 'Drifting', 'Offline'], 
                    datasets: [{ 
                        data: [62, 23, 15], 
                        backgroundColor: ['#10b981', '#eab308', '#3b82f6'], 
                        borderColor: '#0f172a',
                        borderWidth: 2, 
                        hoverOffset: 4 
                    }] 
                }, 
                options: { 
                    responsive: true, 
                    maintainAspectRatio: false, 
                    plugins: { legend: { display: false }, tooltip: { enabled: true } }, 
                    cutout: '75%',
                    animation: { animateScale: true, animateRotate: true }
                } 
            });
        }

        // Mini bar charts
        const qc1 = document.getElementById('qChart1');
        if (qc1) {
            new Chart(qc1, {
                type: 'bar', 
                data: {
                    labels: ['C1', 'C2', 'C3', 'C4'], 
                    datasets: [{ data: [30, 55, 40, 70], backgroundColor: '#10b981', borderRadius: 2, barThickness: 6 }]
                }, 
                options: { responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false, plugins: { legend: { display: false }, tooltip: {enabled: false} }, scales: { x: { display: false }, y: { display: false } } }
            });
        }
        
        const qc2 = document.getElementById('qChart2');
        if (qc2) {
             new Chart(qc2, {
                type: 'bar', 
                data: {
                    labels: ['Q1', 'Q2', 'Q3', 'Q4'], 
                    datasets: [{ data: [20, 35, 25, 50], backgroundColor: '#a855f7', borderRadius: 2, barThickness: 6 }]
                }, 
                options: { responsive: true, maintainAspectRatio: false, plugins: { legend: { display: false }, tooltip: {enabled: false} }, scales: { x: { display: false }, y: { display: false } } }
            });
        }
    });

    // Formatting button interactions
    document.querySelectorAll('.fmt-btn').forEach(btn => {
        btn.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
            e.preventDefault();
            document.querySelectorAll('.fmt-btn').forEach(b => {
                b.className = 'fmt-btn flex-1 py-1.5 border border-white/10 bg-white/5 text-tx-2 text-xs font-bold rounded hover:bg-white/10 hover:text-tx-1 transition-colors';
            });
            this.className = 'fmt-btn flex-1 py-1.5 border border-emerald-500/30 bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-400 text-xs font-bold rounded shadow-glow-emerald transition-colors';
        });
    });

    function exportReport(type) { showToast('Matrix Compilation [' + type.toUpperCase() + '] Dispatched to Queue.', 'info'); }
    
    function exportPayroll() {
        const spinner = document.getElementById('exportSpinner');
        spinner.classList.remove('hidden');
        setTimeout(() => { 
            spinner.classList.add('hidden'); 
            showToast('Payroll File Transferred to Client Interface.', 'success'); 
        }, 1800);
    }
</script>

<script>
    async function unsuspend(id) {
        if (!confirm('SYS_PROMPT: Declassify unit and restore operational capacity to node?')) return;
        try {
           const r = await fetch('/portal/admin-staff/staff/' + id + '/unsuspend', { method: 'POST' });
           const d = await r.json();
           if (d.success) { 
              showToast('Override success. Unit restored.', 'success'); 
              setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 1000); 
           } else {
              showToast(d.error || 'Access denied.', 'error');
           }
        } catch(err) {
            showToast('Network fault during protocol execution.', 'error');
        }
    }
</script>

            <% if (staffList && staffList.length > 0) { %>
              <% staffList.forEach(function(s) { %>
                <tr class="staff-row cursor-pointer hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors group" 
                    data-role="<%= s.role %>" 
                    data-status="<%= s.status %>"
                    data-name="<%= s.name.toLowerCase() %>"
                    onclick="showStaffPanel(event, this)" 
                    data-staff="<%- JSON.stringify(s).replace(/"/g, '&quot;') %>">
                  
                  <td onclick="event.stopPropagation()">
                    <input type="checkbox" class="w-4 h-4 rounded border-white/20 bg-dark-card accent-emerald-500 staff-cb" value="<%= s._id %>">
                  </td>
                  
                  <td>
                    <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
                      <div class="w-9 h-9 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-emerald-600 to-emerald-400 flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-white text-xs shadow-lg ring-2 ring-emerald-500/20 group-hover:ring-emerald-500/40 transition-all overflow-hidden">
                        <% if (s.photo_url) { %>
                          <img src="<%= s.photo_url %>" alt="<%= s.name %>" class="w-full h-full object-cover">
                        <% } else { %>
                          <%= s.name.split(' ').map(n=>n[0]).join('').toUpperCase().slice(0,2) %>
                        <% } %>
                      </div>
                      <div>
                        <div class="font-bold text-tx-1 text-sm group-hover:text-emerald-300 transition-colors"><%= s.name %></div>
                        <div class="text-[0.7rem] text-tx-3 mt-0.5 font-medium"><%= s.email %></div>
                      </div>
                    </div>
                  </td>
                  
                  <td>
                    <span class="<%= s.role === 'Admin' ? 'badge-purple' : s.role === 'Supervisor' ? 'badge-gold' : 'badge-emerald' %> text-[0.65rem] font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full inline-flex items-center gap-1.5">
                      <i class="fa-solid <%= s.role === 'Admin' ? 'fa-shield-halved' : s.role === 'Supervisor' ? 'fa-user-tie' : 'fa-id-badge' %> text-[0.6rem]"></i>
                      <%= s.specific_role || s.role %>
                    </span>
                  </td>
                  
                  <td class="text-xs text-tx-2 font-medium">
                    <div><%= s.supervisor_id ? s.supervisor_id.name : (s.department || 'â€”') %></div>
                    <% if(s.category) { %>
                      <div class="text-[0.6rem] text-teal-400 font-mono mt-0.5"><%= s.category %></div>
                    <% } %>
                  </td>
                  
                  <td>
                    <span class="<%= s.status === 'Active' ? 'badge-emerald text-emerald-300' : 'badge-red text-red-300' %> text-xs font-bold flex items-center gap-2 bg-transparent border-none p-0 inline-flex">
                      <span class="w-1.5 h-1.5 rounded-full <%= s.status === 'Active' ? 'bg-emerald-500 shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(16,185,129,0.8)]' : 'bg-red-500 shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(239,68,68,0.8)]' %>"></span>
                      <%= s.status %>
                    </span>
                  </td>
                  
                  <td class="text-right" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">
                    <div class="flex gap-1.5 justify-end opacity-60 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
                      <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-xs w-8 h-8 p-0 flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-emerald-500/20 hover:text-emerald-400" title="Edit" onclick="openEditModal(this.parentElement.parentElement.parentElement.dataset.staff)">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-pen"></i>
                      </button>
                      <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-xs w-8 h-8 p-0 flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-blue-500/20 hover:text-blue-400" title="Assign Supervisor" onclick="openAssignModal('<%= s._id %>','<%= s.name %>')">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-user-tie"></i>
                      </button>
                      <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-xs w-8 h-8 p-0 flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-gold-500/20 hover:text-gold-400" title="Reset Password" onclick="openPasswordModal('<%= s._id %>','<%= s.name %>')">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-key"></i>
                      </button>
                      <% if (s.status === 'Active') { %>
                        <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-xs w-8 h-8 p-0 flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-red-500/20 hover:text-red-400" title="Suspend" onclick="toggleSuspend('<%= s._id %>','<%= s.status %>')">
                          <i class="fa-solid fa-ban"></i>
                        </button>
                      <% } else { %>
                        <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-xs w-8 h-8 p-0 flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-emerald-500/20 hover:text-emerald-400" title="Unsuspend" onclick="toggleSuspend('<%= s._id %>','<%= s.status %>')">
                          <i class="fa-solid fa-circle-check"></i>
                        </button>
                      <% } %>
                    </div>
                  </td>
                  
                </tr>
              <% }) %>
            <% } else { %>
              <tr>
                <td colspan="6" class="text-center py-12">
                  <div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-tx-3">
                    <i class="fa-solid fa-users-slash text-4xl mb-3 opacity-20"></i>
                    <p class="text-sm">No staff members found.</p>
                  </div>
                </td>
              </tr>
            <% } %>
          </tbody>
        </table>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- RIGHT: Profile Side Panel -->
  <div class="glass-card sticky top-20 hidden xl:block min-h-[500px] animate-fade-left overflow-hidden">
    <!-- Header BG Gradient -->
    <div class="absolute top-0 left-0 w-full h-32 bg-gradient-to-br from-emerald-500/20 to-transparent pointer-events-none"></div>
    
    <div id="staffPanelContent" class="relative z-10 h-full">
      <!-- Empty State -->
      <div class="h-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-8 text-center text-tx-3">
        <div class="w-16 h-16 rounded-full bg-white/5 flex items-center justify-center mb-4 ring-1 ring-white/10">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-pointer text-2xl opacity-50"></i>
        </div>
        <h3 class="font-bold text-tx-1 mb-1">Select Personnel</h3>
        <p class="text-xs">Click a staff member to view detailed profile and assignment history</p>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

     MODALS
