<!-- â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•
     SCRIPTS
     â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â•â• -->
<script>
  // â”€â”€ FILTERING â”€â”€
  function filterStaff(q) {
    const rows = document.querySelectorAll('.staff-row');
    q = q.toLowerCase();
    rows.forEach(r => {
      if (r.dataset.name?.includes(q)) {
        r.style.display = '';
      } else {
        r.style.display = 'none';
        r.classList.remove('selected');
      }
    });
  }
  
  function filterByRole(v) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.staff-row').forEach(r => r.style.display = (!v || r.dataset.role === v) ? '' : 'none');
  }
  
  function filterByDept(v) {
    // Basic implementation since dept isn't always reliable in dataset yet
    const rows = document.querySelectorAll('.staff-row');
    if (!v) { rows.forEach(r => r.style.display = ''); return; }
    
    rows.forEach(r => {
      try {
        const s = JSON.parse(r.dataset.staff.replace(/&quot;/g, '"'));
        r.style.display = (s.department === v || s.specific_role?.includes(v)) ? '' : 'none';
      } catch(e) { r.style.display = 'none'; }
    });
  }
  
  function filterByStatus(v) {
    document.querySelectorAll('.staff-row').forEach(r => r.style.display = (!v || r.dataset.status === v) ? '' : 'none');
  }
  
  function toggleAll(cb) { 
    document.querySelectorAll('.staff-cb').forEach(c => {
      // only check visible ones
      if (c.closest('tr').style.display !== 'none') {
        c.checked = cb.checked;
      }
    }); 
  }

  // â”€â”€ SIDE PANEL UI â”€â”€
  function showStaffPanel(event, el) {
    // If clicked on checkbox, don't trigger panel
    if (event.target.tagName.toLowerCase() === 'input') return;
    
    const s = typeof el === 'string' ? JSON.parse(el) : JSON.parse(el.dataset.staff.replace(/&quot;/g, '"'));
    
    // UI Selection
    document.querySelectorAll('.staff-row').forEach(r => r.classList.remove('bg-emerald-500/10'));
    event.currentTarget.classList.add('bg-emerald-500/10');
    
    const initials = s.name.split(' ').map(n => n[0]).join('').toUpperCase().slice(0, 2);
    const statusColor = s.status === 'Active' ? 'emerald' : 'red';
    const suspendAction = s.status === 'Active' ? 
      `<button class="btn btn-outline border-red-500/30 text-red-400 hover:bg-red-500/10 w-full justify-center" onclick="toggleSuspend('${s._id}','${s.status}')"><i class="fa-solid fa-ban"></i> Suspend Access</button>` :
      `<button class="btn btn-outline border-emerald-500/30 text-emerald-400 hover:bg-emerald-500/10 w-full justify-center" onclick="toggleSuspend('${s._id}','${s.status}')"><i class="fa-solid fa-circle-check"></i> Restore Access</button>`;
    
    const html = `
      <div class="px-6 pt-8 pb-4 border-b border-white/5 text-center relative z-10">
        <div class="w-20 h-20 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-${statusColor}-600 to-${statusColor}-400 flex items-center justify-center text-2xl font-bold text-white shadow-lg mx-auto mb-3 ring-4 ring-dark-card overflow-hidden">
          ${s.photo_url ? `<img src="${s.photo_url}" alt="${s.name}" class="w-full h-full object-cover">` : initials}
        </div>
        <h3 class="font-display font-bold text-lg text-tx-1 mb-0.5">${s.name}</h3>
        <p class="text-xs text-tx-3 mb-3">${s.email}</p>
        <span class="badge-${statusColor} text-xs font-bold px-3 py-1 rounded-full shadow-glow-${statusColor}">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-circle text-[8px] mr-1"></i> ${s.status} Status
        </span>
      </div>
      
      <div class="p-6 space-y-4">
        <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
          <div class="bg-white/5 rounded-xl p-3 border border-white/5">
            <div class="text-[0.65rem] text-tx-3 uppercase tracking-wider font-bold mb-1">Role Group</div>
            <div class="text-sm font-semibold text-tx-1">${s.role}</div>
          </div>
          <div class="bg-white/5 rounded-xl p-3 border border-white/5">
            <div class="text-[0.65rem] text-tx-3 uppercase tracking-wider font-bold mb-1">Identifier</div>
            <div class="text-sm font-semibold text-tx-1 truncate" title="${s._id}">${s._id.toString().slice(-6).toUpperCase()}</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="space-y-2">
          <div class="flex justify-between items-center py-2 border-b border-white/5">
            <span class="text-xs text-tx-3">Title / Specialization</span>
            <span class="text-sm font-semibold text-tx-1">${s.specific_role || 'Not Specified'}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="flex justify-between items-center py-2 border-b border-white/5">
            <span class="text-xs text-tx-3">Department</span>
            <span class="text-sm font-semibold text-tx-1">${s.department || 'Not Assigned'}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="flex justify-between items-center py-2 border-b border-white/5">
            <span class="text-xs text-tx-3">Contact Phone</span>
            <span class="text-sm font-semibold text-emerald-400">${s.phone || 'â€”'}</span>
          </div>
          <div class="flex justify-between items-center py-2 border-b border-white/5">
            <span class="text-xs text-tx-3">Standard Shift</span>
            <span class="text-sm font-semibold text-tx-1">${s.shift_start||'09:00'} - ${s.shift_end||'17:00'}</span>
          </div>
        </div>
        
        <div class="pt-4 space-y-2">
          <button class="btn btn-primary w-full justify-center shadow-glow-emerald" onclick="openEditModal(this.dataset.staff)" data-staff='${JSON.stringify(s).replace(/'/g, '&#39;')}'>
            <i class="fa-solid fa-pen"></i> Full Edit Profile
          </button>
          <div class="flex gap-2">
            <button class="btn btn-outline flex-1 justify-center border-white/10" onclick="openPasswordModal('${s._id}','${s.name}')">
              <i class="fa-solid fa-key text-gold-400"></i> Code
            </button>
            <button class="btn btn-outline flex-1 justify-center border-white/10" onclick="openAssignModal('${s._id}','${s.name}')">
              <i class="fa-solid fa-user-tie text-blue-400"></i> Link
            </button>
          </div>
          ${suspendAction}
        </div>
      </div>
    `;
    
    document.getElementById('staffPanelContent').innerHTML = html;
  }

  // â”€â”€ MODAL HELPERS â”€â”€
  function openEditModal(btnOrData) {
    const s = typeof btnOrData === 'string' ? JSON.parse(btnOrData) : btnOrData;
    document.getElementById('edit_name').value = s.name;
    document.getElementById('edit_phone').value = s.phone || '';
    document.getElementById('edit_role').value = s.role;
    document.getElementById('edit_specific_role').value = s.specific_role || '';
    document.getElementById('edit_dept').value = s.department || '';
    const editCategory = document.getElementById('edit_category');
    if (editCategory) editCategory.value = s.category || '';
    
    const statusSelect = document.getElementById('edit_status');
    statusSelect.value = s.status;
    statusSelect.className = 'form-input form-select font-bold ' + (s.status === 'Active' ? 'text-emerald-400' : 'text-red-400');
    
    document.getElementById('editStaffForm').action = '/portal/admin-staff/staff/' + s._id;
    openModal('editStaffModal');
  }
  
  document.getElementById('edit_status')?.addEventListener('change', function() {
    this.className = 'form-input form-select font-bold ' + (this.value === 'Active' ? 'text-emerald-400' : 'text-red-400');
  });

  function openPasswordModal(id, name) {
    document.getElementById('pwStaffName').textContent = name;
    document.getElementById('passwordForm').action = '/portal/admin-staff/staff/' + id + '/reset-password';
    openModal('passwordModal');
  }

  // â”€â”€ AJAX SUBMISSIONS â”€â”€
  
  // Password Reset
  document.getElementById('passwordForm').addEventListener('submit', async function(e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    const res = await fetch(this.action, {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        'CSRF-Token': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || ''
      },
      body: JSON.stringify({ newPassword: this.newPassword.value })
    });
    const d = await res.json();
    if (d.success) {
      showToast('Credentials updated. Temporary lock engaged.', 'success');
      closeModal('passwordModal');
      this.reset();
    } else {
      showToast(d.error || 'Security reset failed', 'error');
    }
  });

  // Assign Supervisor
  async function openAssignModal(staffId, staffName) {
    const assignStaffIdEl = document.getElementById('assignStaffId');
    const assignModalStaffNameEl = document.getElementById('assignModalStaffName');
    const select = document.getElementById('supervisorSelect');
    
    if (!assignStaffIdEl || !select) return;
    
    assignStaffIdEl.value = staffId;
    assignModalStaffNameEl.innerHTML = `<i class="fa-solid fa-link text-tx-3 mr-2"></i>Link to: <strong>${staffName}</strong>`;
    select.innerHTML = '<option value="">Searching command chain...</option>';
    
    openModal('assignSupervisorModal');
    
    const csrfToken = document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '';
    
    try {
      const r = await fetch('/portal/admin-staff/staff', { headers: { 'CSRF-Token': csrfToken } });
      const data = await r.json();
      if (data.success) {
        const supervisors = data.data.filter(s => s.role === 'Supervisor' || s.role === 'Admin');
        select.innerHTML = '<option value="">Select Command Authority</option>' +
          supervisors.map(s => `<option value="${s._id}">${s.role === 'Admin' ? '[ADM] ' : ''}${s.name}</option>`).join('');
      }
    } catch(err) {
      select.innerHTML = '<option value="">Network cascade failure</option>';
    }
  }

  async function submitAssignSupervisor() {
    const staffId = document.getElementById('assignStaffId').value;
    const supervisorId = document.getElementById('supervisorSelect').value;
    
    if (!supervisorId) return showToast('Select an authority first', 'error');
    
    try {
      const r = await fetch(`/portal/admin-staff/staff/${staffId}/assign-supervisor`, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'CSRF-Token': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || ''
        },
        body: JSON.stringify({ supervisorId })
      });
      const data = await r.json();
      if (data.success) {
        showToast('Chain of command updated', 'success');
        closeModal('assignSupervisorModal');
        setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 600);
      } else {
        showToast('Sync error: ' + (data.error || 'Failed'), 'error');
      }
    } catch(err) {
      showToast('Request timeout: ' + err.message, 'error');
    }
  }

  // Suspend
  async function toggleSuspend(id, status) {
    const action = status === 'Active' ? 'suspend' : 'unsuspend';
    if (!confirm(`Are you sure you want to ${action.toUpperCase()} network access for this personnel?`)) return;
    
    const r = await fetch(`/portal/admin-staff/staff/${id}/suspend`, {
      method: 'PUT',
      headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        'CSRF-Token': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || ''
      }
    });
    const data = await r.json();
    if (data.success) {
      showToast(`Personnel access ${action}ed`, 'success');
      setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 600);
    } else {
      showToast('Override rejected: ' + (data.error || 'Failed'), 'error');
    }
  }

  // Edit Submit Logic
  document.getElementById('editStaffForm').addEventListener('submit', async function(e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    const form = e.target;
    // ... simulate native behavior logic through AJAX ...
    // Because this codebase expects standard form submission, we map it back or handle
    // Normally would rewrite, but matching existing system pattern handles better for node router

    const formData = new FormData(form);
    const body = {};
    formData.forEach((v, k) => body[k] = v);
    
    try {
      const r = await fetch(form.action, {
        method: 'PUT',
        headers: {
          'Content-Type': 'application/json',
          'CSRF-Token': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || ''
        },
        body: JSON.stringify(body)
      });
      const data = await r.json();
      if (data.success) {
        closeModal('editStaffModal');
        showToast('Profile matrix updated', 'success');
        setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 600);
      } else {
        showToast('Recompile error: ' + (data.error || 'Update failed'), 'error');
      }
    } catch(err) {
      showToast('Network disruption: ' + err.message, 'error');
    }
  });

</script>

<script>
function toggleSurveyDetail(card) {
    const full = card.querySelector('.survey-full');
    const btn = card.querySelector('button i.fa-chevron-down, button i.fa-chevron-up');
    if (!full) return;
    full.classList.toggle('hidden');
    if (btn) {
        btn.classList.toggle('fa-chevron-down');
        btn.classList.toggle('fa-chevron-up');
    }
}
</script>

</div>


<!-- Context Menu (right-click on row) -->
<div id="teamContextMenu" class="absolute bg-dark-card border border-white/10 rounded-xl shadow-2xl p-1.5 min-w-[180px] z-[500] backdrop-blur-md hidden transition-opacity">
  <button class="w-fulltext-left px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-red-400 hover:bg-red-500/10 rounded flex items-center gap-2 w-full transition-colors" onclick="removeMember()">
     <i class="fa-solid fa-user-minus w-4"></i> Dismiss Unit
  </button>
  <button class="w-full text-left px-3 py-2 text-xs font-medium text-tx-2 hover:text-tx-1 hover:bg-white/5 rounded flex items-center gap-2 w-full transition-colors mt-0.5" onclick="requestReplacement()">
     <i class="fa-solid fa-rotate w-4 text-blue-400"></i> Alert Replacement
  </button>
</div>

<!-- Add Team Modal -->
<div class="modal-overlay" id="addTeamModal">
  <div class="modal-content max-w-md">
    <div class="modal-header border-b border-emerald-500/20 pb-4">
      <h3 class="text-base font-bold text-tx-1 flex items-center gap-2">
        <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-emerald-500/20 text-emerald-400 flex items-center justify-center shadow-glow-emerald"><i class="fa-solid fa-people-group"></i></div>
        Construct Network
      </h3>
      <button class="text-tx-3 hover:text-tx-1 transition-colors" onclick="closeModal('addTeamModal')"><i class="fa-solid fa-xmark text-lg"></i></button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body pt-5">
      <form action="/portal/admin-staff/event-teams/create" method="POST" class="space-y-4">
        <div>
          <label class="form-label text-tx-2">Target Matrix (Event)</label>
          <select name="event_id" required id="teamEventSelect" class="form-input form-select font-bold">
            <option value="">-- Accessing Events --</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div>
          <label class="form-label text-tx-2">Command Authority (Supervisor)</label>
          <select name="supervisor_id" required id="teamSuperSelect" class="form-input form-select text-emerald-400 font-bold">
            <option value="">-- Linking Officers --</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div class="flex justify-between items-end mb-1">
             <label class="form-label text-tx-2 !mb-0">Operating Units (Staff)</label>
             <span class="text-[0.6rem] text-tx-3">CTRL/CMD+Click for multiple</span>
          </div>
          <select name="member_ids" id="teamMemberSelect" multiple class="form-input custom-scrollbar h-32 p-2">
            <!-- options mapped from JS -->
          </select>
        </div>
        
        <input type="hidden" name="_csrf" value="<%= csrfToken %>">
        <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary w-full mt-4 shadow-glow-emerald font-bold text-lg py-3">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-bolt mr-2"></i> INITIALIZE TEAM
        </button>
      </form>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
  let _selectedMemberIds = [];
  let _selectedTeamId = null;
  
  // Clean JSON string passing
  const _teamsData = <%- JSON.stringify(teams.map(t => ({
      _id: t._id,
      status: t.status,
      team_readiness: t.team_readiness,
      event_id: t.event_id ? { _id: t.event_id._id, title: t.event_id.title, date: t.event_id.date } : null,
      supervisor_id: t.supervisor_id ? { _id: t.supervisor_id._id, name: t.supervisor_id.name, role: t.supervisor_id.role } : null,
      member_ids: (t.member_ids||[]).map(m => ({ _id: m._id, name: m.name, role: m.role, specific_role: m.specific_role, status: m.status }))
  }))).replace(/</g, '\\u003c') %>;

  function selectTeam(el, id) {
    // Styling toggle
    document.querySelectorAll('[id^="teamRow-"]').forEach(r => {
      r.classList.remove('bg-emerald-500/10', 'border-emerald-500/30');
      r.classList.add('border-transparent');
      const title = r.querySelector('.truncate');
      if(title) {
        title.classList.remove('text-emerald-400');
        title.classList.add('group-hover:text-emerald-300');
      }
    });
    el.classList.add('bg-emerald-500/10', 'border-emerald-500/30');
    el.classList.remove('border-transparent');
    const title = el.querySelector('.truncate');
    if(title) {
      title.classList.add('text-emerald-400');
      title.classList.remove('group-hover:text-emerald-300');
    }

    _selectedTeamId = id;
    const team = _teamsData.find(t => t._id === id);
    if (!team) return;

    // Header update
    document.getElementById('centerPanelTitle').innerHTML = `
      <i class="fa-solid fa-network-wired text-blue-400"></i> 
      <span class="truncate pr-4">${team.event_id ? team.event_id.title : 'Unknown Event'}</span>
    `;

    // Members list
    const membersList = document.getElementById('teamMembersList');
    if (!team.member_ids || team.member_ids.length === 0) {
        membersList.innerHTML = '<div class="py-8 text-center text-tx-3 text-xs glass-panel rounded-xl">No units connected to matrix.</div>';
    } else {
        const supId = team.supervisor_id ? team.supervisor_id._id.toString() : null;
        const membersHtml = team.member_ids.filter(m => m._id.toString() !== supId).map(m => {
          const initials = (m.name||'?').split(' ').map(n=>n[0]).join('').slice(0,2).toUpperCase();
          const pilsClass = m.status==='Active' ? 'bg-emerald-500/20 text-emerald-400 border-emerald-500/30' : 'bg-red-500/20 text-red-400 border-red-500/30';
          return `
            <div class="member-assign-row flex items-center gap-3 p-2.5 rounded-xl border border-white/5 hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors cursor-context-menu" data-member-id="${m._id}">
                <div class="w-9 h-9 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-dark-card to-dark-bg flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-xs ring-1 ring-white/10 shadow-lg text-white flex-shrink-0">
                    ${initials}
                </div>
                <div class="flex-1 min-w-0">
                    <div class="font-bold text-sm text-tx-1 truncate">${m.name||'Unknown'}</div>
                    <div class="text-[0.65rem] text-tx-3 truncate">${m.specific_role||m.role||'Staff'}</div>
                </div>
                <span class="text-[0.6rem] font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded border ${pilsClass} flex-shrink-0">
                    ${m.status||'Active'}
                </span>
            </div>
          `;
        }).join('');
        membersList.innerHTML = membersHtml || '<div class="text-xs text-tx-3 p-4 text-center">Only Commander Linked.</div>';
    }

    // Supervisor info
    const sup = team.supervisor_id;
    const supervisorContainer = document.getElementById('teamSupervisorInfo');
    if(sup) {
      const initials = (sup.name||'?').split(' ').map(n=>n[0]).join('').slice(0,2).toUpperCase();
      supervisorContainer.innerHTML = `
         <div class="flex items-center gap-3 p-3 rounded-xl border border-gold-500/20 bg-gold-500/5">
             <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-full bg-gradient-to-br from-gold-600 to-amber-500 flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-dark-bg shadow-glow-gold flex-shrink-0">
                 ${initials}
             </div>
             <div>
                 <div class="font-bold text-sm text-tx-1 truncate">${sup.name}</div>
                 <div class="text-[0.65rem] text-gold-400 tracking-wider uppercase font-bold mt-0.5"><i class="fa-solid fa-star text-[0.55rem] mr-1"></i> Commander</div>
             </div>
         </div>
      `;
    } else {
      supervisorContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="py-4 text-center text-red-400 border border-red-500/20 bg-red-500/5 rounded-xl text-xs font-bold"><i class="fa-solid fa-triangle-exclamation mr-1"></i> No Authority Linked</div>';
    }

    // Readiness update
    const pct = team.team_readiness || 0;
    const bar = document.getElementById('selectedTeamReadiness');
    const pctText = document.getElementById('selectedTeamReadinessPct');
    
    // Color mapping based on pct
    bar.className = `h-full w-0 transition-all duration-500 ${pct < 40 ? 'bg-gradient-to-r from-red-600 to-red-400 shadow-glow-red' : pct < 80 ? 'bg-gradient-to-r from-gold-600 to-gold-400 shadow-glow-gold' : 'bg-gradient-to-r from-emerald-500 to-emerald-300 shadow-glow-emerald'}`;
    pctText.className = `text-xs font-bold font-mono ${pct < 40 ? 'text-red-400' : pct < 80 ? 'text-gold-400' : 'text-emerald-400'}`;
    
    setTimeout(() => {
       bar.style.width = pct + '%';
       pctText.textContent = pct + '%';
    }, 50);
  }

  function autoCreateTeams() {
    if (!confirm('Execute Auto-Generation Sequence? This maps teams to all unlinked active events.')) return;
    
    // Visual feedback
    showToast('Executing protocol...', 'info');
    
    fetch('/portal/admin-staff/event-teams/auto-create', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'CSRF-Token': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '' }
    }).then(r => r.json()).then(d => {
        showToast(d.message || 'Matrices Synced', d.success ? 'success' : 'error');
        if (d.success) setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 1500);
    }).catch(() => showToast('Command rejected', 'error'));
  }

  // --- Context Menu Logic ---
  const ctxMenu = document.getElementById('teamContextMenu');
  
  document.addEventListener('contextmenu', e => {
      const row = e.target.closest('.member-assign-row');
      if (row) {
          e.preventDefault();
          _selectedMemberIds = [row.dataset.memberId]; // Store ID to act on
          ctxMenu.style.display = 'block';
          ctxMenu.classList.remove('hidden');
          
          // Ensure menu stays within window bounds
          let x = e.clientX;
          let y = e.clientY;
          const mw = 180; // approximate menu width
          const mh = 90; // approximate menu height
          
          if (x + mw > window.innerWidth) x -= mw;
          if (y + mh > window.innerHeight) y -= mh;
          
          ctxMenu.style.left = x + 'px';
          ctxMenu.style.top = y + 'px';
          
          // Add a tiny delay to trigger opacity transition
          setTimeout(() => ctxMenu.classList.add('opacity-100'), 10);
      } else {
         hideContextMenu();
      }
  });
  
  document.addEventListener('click', hideContextMenu);
  
  function hideContextMenu() {
     ctxMenu.classList.remove('opacity-100');
     setTimeout(() => {
        ctxMenu.classList.add('hidden');
        ctxMenu.style.display = 'none';
     }, 150); // match transition duration
  }

  function removeMember() {
      if (!_selectedTeamId || _selectedMemberIds.length === 0) return showToast('Null reference', 'error');
      if (!confirm('Disconnect unit from current matrix?')) return;
      
      fetch(`/portal/admin-staff/event-teams/${_selectedTeamId}/remove-member`, {
          method: 'PUT',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'CSRF-Token': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '' },
          body: JSON.stringify({ memberIds: _selectedMemberIds })
      }).then(r => r.json()).then(d => {
          showToast(d.message || 'Unit disconnected', d.success ? 'success' : 'error');
          if (d.success) setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 1000);
      }).catch(() => showToast('Command timed out', 'error'));
  }

  function requestReplacement() {
      showToast('Replacement signal transmitted.', 'info');
  }

  async function disbandTeamFromList(teamId, eventTitle) {
      try {
          const csrf = document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '';
          const check = await fetch(`/portal/admin-staff/event-teams/${teamId}/disband-check`);
          const eligibility = await check.json();

          if (eligibility.success && !eligibility.canDisband) {
              const unpaid = eligibility.unpaidStaff && eligibility.unpaidStaff.length ? '\n\nUnpaid staff: ' + eligibility.unpaidStaff.join(', ') : '';
              showToast('Cannot disband - ' + (eligibility.reason || 'some staff are unpaid'), 'error');
              return;
          }
          if (!confirm('Disband team for [' + eventTitle + ']? This cannot be undone.')) return;

          const r = await fetch(`/portal/admin-staff/event-teams/${teamId}/disband`, {
              method: 'POST',
              headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'CSRF-Token': csrf }
          });
          const d = await r.json();
          if (d.success) {
              showToast('Team disbanded successfully.', 'success');
              setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 1500);
          } else {
              showToast(d.message || d.error || 'Could not disband team.', 'error');
          }
      } catch(err) {
          showToast('Connection failed', 'error');
      }
  }

  // Init Data
  document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
      // Auto-select first row
      const firstRow = document.querySelector('[id^="teamRow-"]');
      if (firstRow && typeof _teamsData !== 'undefined' && _teamsData.length > 0) {
          selectTeam(firstRow, _teamsData[0]._id);
      }
      
      // Load Add Team Modal Data
      fetch('/portal/admin-staff/teams/create-data').then(r => r.json()).then(data => {
          if (!data.success) return;
          const esel = document.getElementById('teamEventSelect');
          const ssel = document.getElementById('teamSuperSelect');
          const msel = document.getElementById('teamMemberSelect');
          
          if (esel) {
             esel.innerHTML = '<option value="">-- Matrix --</option>';
             data.assignments?.forEach(a => esel.innerHTML += `<option value="${a._id}">${a.title}</option>`);
          }
          if (ssel) {
             ssel.innerHTML = '<option value="">-- Select Authority --</option>';
             data.supervisors?.forEach(s => ssel.innerHTML += `<option value="${s._id}">${s.name} - ${s.specific_role || s.role || 'Staff'}</option>`);
          }
          if (msel) {
             data.staff?.forEach(s => msel.innerHTML += `<option value="${s._id}">${s.name} (${s.specific_role || 'General'})</option>`);
          }
      }).catch(() => { console.log("Silent error loading form data") });
  });
</script>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no">
    <title>Change Password</title>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.4.0/css/all.min.css">
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="/css/style.css">
    <style>
        body {
            background: var(--bg-color);
            padding: 24px;
        }
    </style>
</head>

<body>
    <!-- Video Background -->
    <video autoplay muted loop playsinline 
        style="position:fixed;top:0;left:0;width:100%;height:100%;
        object-fit:cover;z-index:-1;opacity:0.3;">
        <source src="/logo.mp4" type="video/mp4">
    </video>

    <div style="max-width: 400px; margin: 40px auto;">
        <div style="text-align: center; margin-bottom: 24px;">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-lock" style="font-size: 2.5rem; color: var(--accent-color); margin-bottom: 12px;"></i>
            <h2>Welcome, <%= user.name %>!</h2>
            <p style="color: var(--text-secondary); margin-top: 4px;">Please set a new password for your account to
                continue.</p>
        </div>

        <div class="card">
            <% if (typeof error !=='undefined' && error) { %>
                <div class="error-msg">
                    <%= error %>
                </div>
                <% } %>

                    <form action="/portal/auth/change-password" method="POST" id="changePasswordForm">
                        <input type="hidden" name="_csrf" value="<%= csrfToken %>">
                        <% if (!user.mustChangePassword) { %>
                        <div class="form-group">
                            <label>Current Password</label>
                            <input type="password" name="current_password" required>
                        </div>
                        <% } else { %>
                        <!-- Dummy current_password for mustChangePassword users -->
                        <input type="hidden" name="current_password" value="dummy">
                        <% } %>
                        <div class="form-group">
                            <label>New Password</label>
                            <input type="password" name="new_password" id="newPassword" required minlength="8">
                        </div>
                        <div class="form-group">
                            <label>Confirm Password</label>
                            <input type="password" name="confirm_new_password" id="confirmPassword" required minlength="8">
                        </div>
                        
                        <!-- Password Strength Checklist -->
                        <div class="password-rules" style="margin:15px 0;font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--text-secondary);">
                            <div class="rule" id="rule-length"><i class="fa-regular fa-circle"></i> Minimum 8 characters</div>
                            <div class="rule" id="rule-uppercase"><i class="fa-regular fa-circle"></i> At least one uppercase letter</div>
                            <div class="rule" id="rule-number"><i class="fa-regular fa-circle"></i> At least one number</div>
                            <div class="rule" id="rule-special"><i class="fa-regular fa-circle"></i> At least one special character (e.g. . ! @ # $ % & *)</div>
                        </div>
                        
                        <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary">
                            Save Password
                        </button>
                    </form>
        </div>
    </div>
    
    <script>
        // Password strength checker
        document.getElementById('newPassword').addEventListener('input', function(e) {
            const val = e.target.value;
            document.getElementById('rule-length').innerHTML = val.length >= 8 ? 
                '<i class="fa-solid fa-circle-check" style="color:var(--emerald);"></i> Minimum 8 characters' : 
                '<i class="fa-regular fa-circle"></i> Minimum 8 characters';
            document.getElementById('rule-uppercase').innerHTML = /[A-Z]/.test(val) ? 
                '<i class="fa-solid fa-circle-check" style="color:var(--emerald);"></i> At least one uppercase letter' : 
                '<i class="fa-regular fa-circle"></i> At least one uppercase letter';
            document.getElementById('rule-number').innerHTML = /[0-9]/.test(val) ? 
                '<i class="fa-solid fa-circle-check" style="color:var(--emerald);"></i> At least one number' : 
                '<i class="fa-regular fa-circle"></i> At least one number';
            document.getElementById('rule-special').innerHTML = /[^a-zA-Z\d]/.test(val) ? 
                '<i class="fa-solid fa-circle-check" style="color:var(--emerald);"></i> At least one special character (e.g. . ! @ # $ % & *)' : 
                '<i class="fa-regular fa-circle"></i> At least one special character (e.g. . ! @ # $ % & *)';
        });
    </script>

</body>

</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">

<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no">

    <link rel="stylesheet" href="/css/style.css">
    <style>
        * {
            box-sizing: border-box;

            padding: 0;

            min-height: 100vh;

<script>
function togglePwd(id, btn) {
    const input = document.getElementById(id);
    const isHidden = input.type === 'password';
    input.type = isHidden ? 'text' : 'password';
    btn.querySelector('i').className = isHidden
        ? 'fa-regular fa-eye-slash'
        : 'fa-regular fa-eye';
}
</script>
</body>

</html>

===== C:\My Web Sites\school\live.themewild.com\emerald\staff-system\views\components\event-widget.ejs =====
<%/* EVENT WIDGET â€” Live event card with status pulse and staff ring */%>
<% const ev = locals.event || {}; %>
<% const _accepted = (ev.accepted_staff_ids || []).length; %>
<% const _assigned = (ev.assigned_staff_ids || []).length; %>
<% const _required = ev.required_staff_count || _assigned || 1; %>
<% const _pct = Math.min(100, Math.round((_accepted / _required) * 100)); %>
<% const _isVip = ev.vip_flag; %>
<% const _statusColor = ev.status === 'Active' ? 'emerald' : ev.status === 'Completed' ? 'blue' : 'red'; %>

<div class="glass-card p-5 animate-fade-up relative overflow-hidden">
  <!-- VIP Badge -->
  <% if (_isVip) { %>
    <div class="absolute top-3 right-3">
      <span class="badge-gold text-xs font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full flex items-center gap-1">
        <i class="fa-solid fa-crown text-[0.6rem]"></i> VIP
      </span>
    </div>
  <% } %>

  <div class="flex items-start gap-4">
    <!-- Staff fill ring -->
    <div class="relative flex-shrink-0">
      <svg class="progress-ring progress-ring-animated" width="52" height="52" viewBox="0 0 52 52"
           style="--ring-circumference: 138; --ring-offset: <%= 138 - (138 * _pct / 100) %>">
        <circle cx="26" cy="26" r="22" fill="none" stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" stroke-width="4"/>
        <circle class="ring-fill" cx="26" cy="26" r="22" fill="none"
                stroke="<%= _pct >= 100 ? '#10b981' : _pct >= 50 ? '#f59e0b' : '#ef4444' %>"
                stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"
                stroke-dasharray="138" stroke-dashoffset="<%= 138 - (138 * _pct / 100) %>"
                transform="rotate(-90 26 26)"/>
      </svg>
      <div class="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center text-xs font-bold text-slate-300">
        <%= _pct %>%
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="flex-1 min-w-0">
      <div class="flex items-center gap-2 mb-1">
        <span class="status-dot status-dot-<%= _statusColor === 'emerald' ? 'active' : _statusColor === 'blue' ? 'info' : 'danger' %> animate-pulse-dot"></span>
        <h4 class="text-sm font-bold text-slate-100 truncate"><%= ev.title || 'Untitled Event' %></h4>
      </div>

      <div class="flex items-center gap-3 text-xs text-slate-500 mb-2">
        <span><i class="fa-regular fa-calendar mr-1"></i><%= ev.date ? new Date(ev.date).toLocaleDateString('en-KE', {month:'short',day:'numeric'}) : 'â€”' %></span>
        <span><i class="fa-solid fa-location-dot mr-1"></i><%= ev.location || 'â€”' %></span>
      </div>

      <div class="flex items-center gap-4 text-xs">
        <span class="text-slate-400">
          <i class="fa-solid fa-users mr-1 text-emerald-400/60"></i>
          <strong class="text-slate-200"><%= _accepted %></strong>/<%= _required %> staff
        </span>
        <% if (ev.pay_rate) { %>
          <span class="text-slate-400">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-coins mr-1 text-amber-400/60"></i>
            KSh <%= (ev.pay_rate || 0).toLocaleString() %>
          </span>
        <% } %>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

      </div>

               item.actionType && item.actionType.includes('PAYMENT') ? 'icon-bg-gold' :

               'icon-bg-emerald' %>">

               item.actionType && item.actionType.includes('PAYMENT') ? 'fa-coins' :
               item.actionType && item.actionType.includes('DENIED') ? 'fa-xmark' :

               'fa-bolt' %>"></i>

              <% if (item.performedBy && item.performedBy.name) { %>
                <strong class="text-slate-100"><%= item.performedBy.name %></strong>
              <% } %>
              <%= (item.actionType || '').replace(/_/g, ' ').toLowerCase() %>
            </div>

              <%= item.timestamp ? new Date(item.timestamp).toLocaleTimeString('en-KE', {hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'}) : '' %>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

<%/* STAFF CARD â€” 3D staff profile card with role badge and actions */%>
<% const s = locals.staff || {}; %>
<% const _initials = (s.name || 'U').split(' ').map(n=>n[0]).join('').toUpperCase().slice(0,2); %>
<% const _statusMap = { Active: 'active', Suspended: 'danger', Inactive: 'muted' }; %>
<% const _roleColors = { Admin: 'badge-red', Supervisor: 'badge-gold', Staff: 'badge-emerald' }; %>

<div class="card-3d animate-fade-up">
  <div class="glass-card card-3d-inner p-4 group cursor-pointer">
    <div class="flex items-center gap-3">
      <!-- Avatar -->
      <div class="avatar avatar-md relative">
        <% if (s.photo_url) { %>
          <img src="<%= s.photo_url %>" alt="<%= s.name %>">
        <% } else { %>
          <%= _initials %>
        <% } %>
        <span class="status-dot status-dot-<%= _statusMap[s.status] || 'muted' %> absolute -bottom-0.5 -right-0.5 ring-2 ring-[#111827]"></span>
      </div>

      <div class="flex-1 min-w-0">
        <div class="text-sm font-bold text-slate-100 truncate"><%= s.name || 'Unknown' %></div>
        <div class="text-xs text-slate-500 truncate"><%= s.email || '' %></div>
      </div>

      <span class="<%= _roleColors[s.role] || 'badge-emerald' %> text-[0.65rem] font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full">
        <%= s.role || 'Staff' %>
      </span>

===== C:\My Web Sites\school\live.themewild.com\emerald\staff-system\views\components\stat-ring.ejs =====
<%/* STAT RING â€” Circular progress ring with center metric */%>
<% const _val = locals.value || 0; %>
<% const _max = locals.max || 100; %>
<% const _pct = Math.min(100, Math.round((_val / _max) * 100)); %>
<% const _sz = locals.size || 64; %>
<% const _r = (_sz / 2) - 5; %>
<% const _circ = 2 * Math.PI * _r; %>
<% const _offset = _circ - (_circ * _pct / 100); %>
<% const _clr = locals.color === 'gold' ? '#f59e0b' : locals.color === 'blue' ? '#3b82f6' : locals.color === 'red' ? '#ef4444' : '#10b981'; %>

<div class="relative inline-flex items-center justify-center">
  <svg class="progress-ring progress-ring-animated" width="<%= _sz %>" height="<%= _sz %>"
       style="--ring-circumference: <%= _circ %>; --ring-offset: <%= _offset %>; transform: rotate(-90deg)">
    <circle cx="<%= _sz/2 %>" cy="<%= _sz/2 %>" r="<%= _r %>" fill="none"
            stroke="rgba(255,255,255,0.06)" stroke-width="4"/>
    <circle class="ring-fill" cx="<%= _sz/2 %>" cy="<%= _sz/2 %>" r="<%= _r %>" fill="none"
            stroke="<%= _clr %>" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"
            stroke-dasharray="<%= _circ %>" stroke-dashoffset="<%= _offset %>"/>
  </svg>
  <div class="absolute inset-0 flex flex-col items-center justify-center">
    <span class="text-sm font-bold text-slate-200"><%= _pct %>%</span>
    <% if (locals.label) { %>
      <span class="text-[0.55rem] text-slate-500 uppercase tracking-wider"><%= locals.label %></span>
    <% } %>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
    function showEventDetail(a) {
        const body = document.getElementById('eventDetailBody');
        const date = new Date(a.date).toLocaleDateString('en-GB', {weekday:'long', day:'numeric', month:'short', year:'numeric'});
        const pay = (a.pay_rate||0).toLocaleString();
        const hrs = a.start_time && a.end_time ? `${a.start_time} â€“ ${a.end_time}` : 'TBA';
        
        body.innerHTML = `
            <div>
                <h2 class="text-xl font-display font-extrabold text-tx-1 leading-tight tracking-tight mb-2">${a.title}</h2>
                ${a.vip_flag ? '<span class="badge-gold text-[0.6rem] font-bold px-2 py-0.5 rounded tracking-widest uppercase"><i class="fa-solid fa-star mr-1 text-[0.55rem]"></i> VIP Client</span>' : '<span class="text-[0.6rem] text-tx-3 bg-white/5 border border-white/10 px-2 py-0.5 rounded tracking-widest uppercase font-bold">Standard Class</span>'}
            </div>
            
            <div class="grid grid-cols-2 gap-3">
                <div class="bg-black/30 border border-white/5 p-3 rounded-xl flex flex-col justify-center">
                    <div class="text-[0.6rem] text-emerald-400 uppercase tracking-widest font-bold mb-1 opacity-80"><i class="fa-regular fa-calendar mr-1"></i> DATE</div>
                    <div class="text-sm font-bold text-tx-1">${date}</div>
                </div>
                <div class="bg-black/30 border border-white/5 p-3 rounded-xl flex flex-col justify-center">
                    <div class="text-[0.6rem] text-blue-400 uppercase tracking-widest font-bold mb-1 opacity-80"><i class="fa-regular fa-clock mr-1"></i> WINDOW</div>
                    <div class="text-sm font-bold text-tx-1">${hrs}</div>
                </div>
                <div class="bg-black/30 border border-white/5 p-3 rounded-xl flex flex-col justify-center">
                    <div class="text-[0.6rem] text-purple-400 uppercase tracking-widest font-bold mb-1 opacity-80"><i class="fa-solid fa-location-arrow mr-1"></i> VECTOR</div>
                    <div class="text-xs font-bold text-tx-1 leading-tight">${a.location||'Unspecified Vector'}</div>
                </div>
                <div class="bg-emerald-500/10 border border-emerald-500/30 p-3 rounded-xl flex flex-col justify-center shadow-[inset_0_0_15px_rgba(16,185,129,0.1)]">
                    <div class="text-[0.6rem] text-gold-400 uppercase tracking-widest font-bold mb-1 opacity-80"><i class="fa-solid fa-sack-dollar mr-1"></i> REWARD</div>
                    <div class="text-base font-mono font-bold text-emerald-400">KSh ${pay}</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            ${a.description ? `
            <div>
                <h4 class="text-[0.65rem] text-tx-3 uppercase tracking-widest font-bold mb-2 flex items-center gap-2"><i class="fa-solid fa-align-left"></i> Mission Brief</h4>
                <div class="text-sm text-tx-2 bg-black/30 p-3 rounded-xl border border-white/5 leading-relaxed">${a.description}</div>
            </div>` : ''}
            
            ${a.dress_code || a.special_instructions ? `
            <div class="space-y-3 pt-3 border-t border-white/5">
                ${a.dress_code ? `
                <div class="flex items-start gap-3">
                    <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-white/5 flex items-center justify-center text-tx-3 shrink-0"><i class="fa-solid fa-shirt"></i></div>
                    <div>
                         <div class="text-[0.6rem] text-tx-3 uppercase tracking-widest font-bold mb-0.5">Uniform Req</div>
                         <div class="text-sm text-tx-1 font-medium">${a.dress_code}</div>
                    </div>
                </div>` : ''}
                
                ${a.special_instructions ? `
                <div class="flex items-start gap-3">
                    <div class="w-8 h-8 rounded-lg bg-gold-500/10 text-gold-400 flex items-center justify-center shrink-0 border border-gold-500/20"><i class="fa-solid fa-triangle-exclamation"></i></div>
                    <div>
                         <div class="text-[0.6rem] text-gold-400/70 uppercase tracking-widest font-bold mb-0.5">Alerts</div>
                         <div class="text-xs text-tx-2 font-mono leading-relaxed">${a.special_instructions}</div>
                    </div>
                </div>` : ''}
            </div>` : ''}
        `;
        openModal('eventDetailModal');
    }

    async function respond(id, decision) {
        if(decision === 'decline' && !confirm('Sys_Prompt: Reject this incoming mandate? Details will be removed from your terminal.')) return;
        try {
            const csrf = document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '';
            const r = await fetch('/portal/staff/assignments/' + id + '/response', {
                method: 'POST', 
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'CSRF-Token': csrf },
                body: JSON.stringify({ response: decision })
            });
            const d = await r.json();
            const msg = decision === 'accept' ? 'Target Locked.' : decision === 'apply' ? 'Application Synced.' : 'Mandate Dropped.';
            if (d.success) { 
                showToast(msg, 'success'); 
                setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 1000); 
            } else {
                showToast(d.error || 'System fault.', 'error');
            }
        } catch(err) { 
            showToast('Network disjointed.', 'error'); 
        }
    }
</script>

    <div class="absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-br from-emerald-950/20 via-transparent to-transparent pointer-events-none animate-pulse-slow"></div>
    
    <div class="p-5 text-center relative z-10">
        <div class="font-mono font-black text-4xl sm:text-5xl text-tx-1 tracking-widest tabular-nums drop-shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(16,185,129,0.3)] mb-1" id="liveClock">--:--:--</div>

                <i class="fa-solid fa-fingerprint mr-2 text-xl"></i> CLOCK IN

                <div class="text-[0.65rem] text-emerald-400/70 uppercase tracking-widest font-bold mb-1">Session Active Since</div>

                    <%= new Date(todayRecord.clock_in).toLocaleTimeString('en-KE',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'}) %>
                </div>

                <i class="fa-solid fa-power-off mr-2 text-xl opacity-80"></i> TERMINATE SESSION

<script>
    // Live clock
    function updateClock() {
        const now = new Date();
        document.getElementById('liveClock').textContent = now.toLocaleTimeString('en-KE', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit', second: '2-digit' });
        document.getElementById('liveDate').textContent = now.toLocaleDateString('en-KE', { weekday: 'long', day: 'numeric', month: 'long', year: 'numeric' }).toUpperCase();
    }
    setInterval(updateClock, 1000); updateClock();

    let userLat = null, userLng = null;
    const gpsDot = document.getElementById('clockGpsDot');
    const gpsText = document.getElementById('clockGpsText');

    navigator.geolocation.watchPosition(pos => {
        userLat = pos.coords.latitude;
        userLng = pos.coords.longitude;
        gpsDot.className = 'gps-dot active';
        gpsText.textContent = `SIGNAL LOCKED (Â±${Math.round(pos.coords.accuracy)}m)`;
        gpsText.style.color = 'var(--emerald)';
    }, err => {
        gpsDot.className = 'gps-dot denied';
        gpsText.textContent = 'SIGNAL BLOCKED';
        gpsText.style.color = 'var(--danger)';
    }, { enableHighAccuracy: true });

    async function clockAction(type) {
        if (!userLat) {
            showToast('GPS location required. Enable location access and try again.', 'error');
            return;
        }
        showToast(`${type === 'in' ? 'Initializing' : 'Terminating'} session...`, 'info');
        const r = await fetch('/portal/staff/attendance/clock', {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
            body: JSON.stringify({ type, lat: userLat, lng: userLng })
        });
        const d = await r.json();
        if (d.success) { 
            showToast(type === 'in' ? 'âœ“ Session initialized.' : 'âœ“ Session terminated.', 'success'); 
            setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 1200); 
        }
        else if (d.proximityDenied) showToast('ACCESS DENIED: Too far from supervisor (' + d.distance + 'm)', 'error');
        else showToast(d.error || 'System error.', 'error');
    }
</script>

<script>
    function showTab(tabId, el) {
        document.querySelectorAll('.mob-tab').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
        document.querySelectorAll('.tab-section').forEach(s => s.classList.remove('active'));
        el.classList.add('active');
        document.getElementById('tab-' + tabId).classList.add('active');
    }

    if (typeof io !== 'undefined') {
        const socket = io(); // Assuming connected handled globally
        socket.on('cmd:staff_clocked_in', () => window.location.reload());
        socket.on('cmd:emergency_fund_approved', () => window.location.reload());
        socket.on('cmd:staff_missing_alert', () => window.location.reload());
        socket.on('cmd:expense_logged', () => window.location.reload());
        socket.on('cmd:event_state_change', () => window.location.reload());
    }

    <% if (eventInfo) { %>
    const eventId = '<%= eventInfo.event._id %>';
    
    async function loadReviews() {
        const container = document.getElementById('reviews-container');
        try {
            const res = await fetch(`/portal/supervisor/events/${eventId}/reviews/pending`);
            const json = await res.json();
            if (!json.success) throw new Error(json.error);

            if (!json.data.window_open) {
                container.innerHTML = `<div style="text-align:center; padding: 24px;">
                    <i class="fa-solid fa-lock" style="font-size:2rem; color:var(--c-muted); margin-bottom:12px;"></i>
                    <p>${json.data.reason}</p>
                </div>`;
                return;
            }

            if (json.data.pending_staff.length === 0) {
                container.innerHTML = `<div style="text-align:center; padding: 24px;">
                    <i class="fa-solid fa-check-circle" style="font-size:2rem; color:var(--c-success); margin-bottom:12px;"></i>
                    <p>All staff reviewed for this event!</p>
                </div>`;
                return;
            }

            let html = '<form id="reviewForm" onsubmit="submitReviews(event)">';
            json.data.pending_staff.forEach(s => {
                html += `
                    <div class="review-card" style="border:1px solid var(--c-border); padding:16px; border-radius:8px; margin-bottom:16px; background:#fafafa;">
                        <h5 style="margin:0 0 12px 0; font-size:1.1rem;">${s.firstname} ${s.lastname} (${s.role})</h5>
                        
                        <input type="hidden" name="staff_id_${s._id}" value="${s._id}">
                        
                        <!-- Ratings -->
                        <div style="display:grid; grid-template-columns:1fr; gap:8px; margin-bottom:12px;">
                            ${['punctuality_rating', 'professionalism_rating', 'teamwork_rating', 'client_interaction_rating', 'task_completion_rating'].map(f => `
                                <div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center;">
                                    <span style="font-size:0.85rem;">${f.replace('_rating','').replace('_',' ')}</span>
                                    <input type="range" name="${f}_${s._id}" min="1" max="5" value="3" style="width:100px;">
                                </div>
                            `).join('')}
                        </div>
                        
                        <!-- Categorical -->
                        <div style="margin-bottom:12px;">
                            <label style="font-size:0.8rem; display:block; margin-bottom:4px;">Strengths (comma separated)</label>
                            <input type="text" name="strengths_${s._id}" style="width:100%; padding:6px; border-radius:4px; border:1px solid var(--c-border);">
                        </div>
                        
                        <div style="margin-bottom:12px;">
                            <label style="font-size:0.8rem; display:block; margin-bottom:4px;">Improvement Areas (comma separated)</label>
                            <input type="text" name="improvement_areas_${s._id}" style="width:100%; padding:6px; border-radius:4px; border:1px solid var(--c-border);">
                        </div>
                        
                        <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;">
                            <input type="checkbox" name="would_rebook_${s._id}" checked>
                            <label style="font-size:0.85rem;">Would Rebook?</label>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                `;
            });
            
            html += `<button type="submit" style="width:100%; padding:12px; background:var(--c-primary); color:var(--c-accent); font-weight:bold; border-radius:8px; border:none; margin-top:16px; cursor:pointer;">Submit Batch Reviews</button></form>`;
            
            container.innerHTML = html;

        } catch (e) {
            container.innerHTML = `<p style="color:red; text-align:center;">Failed to load pending reviews: ${e.message}</p>`;
        }
    }

    async function submitReviews(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        const pd = new FormData(e.target);
        
        // Group by staff_id
        const staffIds = [...new Set([...pd.keys()].filter(k => k.startsWith('staff_id_')).map(k => pd.get(k)))];
        const payload = [];

        staffIds.forEach(id => {
            const getStr = (key) => {
                const val = pd.get(`${key}_${id}`);
                return val ? val.split(',').map(s=>s.trim()).filter(s=>s) : [];
            };

            payload.push({
                staff_id: id,
                punctuality_rating: parseInt(pd.get(`punctuality_rating_${id}`)),
                professionalism_rating: parseInt(pd.get(`professionalism_rating_${id}`)),
                teamwork_rating: parseInt(pd.get(`teamwork_rating_${id}`)),
                client_interaction_rating: parseInt(pd.get(`client_interaction_rating_${id}`)),
                task_completion_rating: parseInt(pd.get(`task_completion_rating_${id}`)),
                strengths: getStr('strengths'),
                improvement_areas: getStr('improvement_areas'),
                would_rebook: pd.get(`would_rebook_${id}`) === 'on'
            });
        });

        const btn = e.target.querySelector('button[type="submit"]');
        btn.innerHTML = '<i class="fa-solid fa-spinner fa-spin"></i> Submitting...';
        btn.disabled = true;

        try {
            const res = await fetch(`/portal/supervisor/events/${eventId}/reviews/submit`, {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'CSRF-Token': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '' },
                body: JSON.stringify({ reviews: payload })
            });
            const d = await res.json();
            
            if (d.success) {
                if (d.data.failed > 0) {
                    alert(`Submitted ${d.data.submitted}. Failed: ${d.data.failed}. Check errors in response logs.`);
                } else {
                    alert('All reviews submitted successfully!');
                }
                loadReviews(); // reload to clear successes
            } else {
                alert('Error: ' + d.error);
                btn.innerHTML = 'Submit Batch Reviews';
                btn.disabled = false;
            }
        } catch (err) {
            alert('Fatal error: ' + err.message);
            btn.innerHTML = 'Submit Batch Reviews';
            btn.disabled = false;
        }
    }

    // load on ready
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', loadReviews);
    <% } %>
</script>

    <div class="flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-full h-full p-4">
        <h3 class="text-white font-display text-xl mb-4 font-bold flex items-center gap-2 drop-shadow-lg"><i class="fa-solid fa-camera text-emerald-400"></i> Facial Baseline Required</h3>
        
        <div class="relative w-full max-w-[320px] aspect-[3/4] rounded-2xl overflow-hidden border-2 border-emerald-500/50 shadow-glow-emerald bg-black/50 mb-6">
            <video id="cameraStream" autoplay playsinline class="w-full h-full object-cover transform scale-x-[-1]"></video>
            
            <!-- Target overlay -->
            <div class="absolute inset-0 pointer-events-none flex items-center justify-center">
                <div class="w-3/4 h-1/2 border-2 border-emerald-500/50 rounded-[40px] border-dashed opacity-50 relative">

        <div class="flex gap-4 w-full max-w-[320px]">
            <button onclick="captureSelfie()" class="btn btn-primary flex-1 shadow-glow-emerald text-sm font-bold h-12">
                <i class="fa-solid fa-fingerprint mr-2"></i> AUTHORIZE
            </button>
            <button onclick="closeCameraModal()" class="btn btn-outline flex-none w-14 h-12 flex items-center justify-center border-white/20 hover:bg-white/10">
                <i class="fa-solid fa-xmark"></i>
            </button>

<script>
    // â”€â”€ Clock In/Out â”€â”€
    let pendingClockId = null, cameraStreamObj = null;

    function openClockInModal(assignId) {
        pendingClockId = assignId || (document.querySelector('.glass-card')?._assignId);
        const modal = document.getElementById('cameraModal');
        modal.classList.remove('hidden');
        modal.classList.add('flex');
        
        navigator.mediaDevices.getUserMedia({ video: { facingMode: 'user' } })
            .then(stream => { cameraStreamObj = stream; document.getElementById('cameraStream').srcObject = stream; })
            .catch(() => { closeCameraModal(); showToast('Hardware interface failed (Camera Blocked).', 'error'); });
    }
    
    function closeCameraModal() {
        const modal = document.getElementById('cameraModal');
        modal.classList.add('hidden');
        modal.classList.remove('flex');
        if (cameraStreamObj) { cameraStreamObj.getTracks().forEach(t => t.stop()); cameraStreamObj = null; }
    }
    
    function captureSelfie() {
        const v = document.getElementById('cameraStream'), c = document.getElementById('snapshotCanvas');
        c.width = v.videoWidth; c.height = v.videoHeight; 
        // Mirror the canvas draw as well
        const ctx = c.getContext('2d');
        ctx.translate(c.width, 0);
        ctx.scale(-1, 1);
        ctx.drawImage(v, 0, 0);
        
        const b64 = c.toDataURL('image/jpeg', .8);
        closeCameraModal();
        
        if (navigator.geolocation) {
            navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(
               p => sendClockReq('in', pendingClockId, p.coords.latitude, p.coords.longitude, b64), 
               () => sendClockReq('in', pendingClockId, null, null, b64),
               { enableHighAccuracy: true, timeout: 5000 }
            );
        } else sendClockReq('in', pendingClockId, null, null, b64);
    }
    
    function clockInOut(action, id) {
        if (action === 'in') { openClockInModal(id); return; }
        if (navigator.geolocation) {
            navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(
               p => sendClockReq(action, id, p.coords.latitude, p.coords.longitude, null), 
               () => sendClockReq(action, id, null, null, null),
               { enableHighAccuracy: true, timeout: 5000 }
            );
        } else sendClockReq(action, id, null, null, null);
    }
    
    function sendClockReq(action, id, lat, lng, selfie) {
        showToast('Transmitting telemetry...', 'info');
        fetch('/portal/staff/attendance', { 
            method: 'POST', 
            headers: { 
                'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                'CSRF-Token': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || ''
            }, 
            body: JSON.stringify({ action, assignment_id: id, lat, lng, selfie_base64: selfie }) 
        })
        .then(r => r.json())
        .then(d => { 
            if (d.success) { 
                showToast(`Network sync ${action === 'in' ? 'established' : 'terminated'}.`, 'success'); 
                setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 1200); 
            } else { 
                showToast(d.error || 'Sync rejected.', 'error'); 
            } 
        })
        .catch(() => showToast('Connection fault.', 'error'));
    }

    function respondAssignment(id, response) {
        showToast('Processing mandate...', 'info');
        fetch(`/portal/staff/assignments/${id}/response`, { 
            method: 'POST', 
            headers: { 
                'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                'CSRF-Token': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || ''
            }, 
            body: JSON.stringify({ response }) 
        })
        .then(r => r.json())
        .then(d => { 
            const msg = response === 'accepted' ? 'Target Accepted.' : response === 'apply' ? 'Application logged.' : 'Target Rejected.';
            if (d.success) { showToast(msg, 'success'); setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 800); } 
            else showToast(d.error || 'Command failed.', 'error'); 
        })
        .catch(() => showToast('Network disjointed.', 'error'));
    }

    // Socket listeners preserved
    try {
        if (typeof socket !== 'undefined') {
            socket.on('newAssignment', d => { showToast('INCOMING MANDATE: ' + d.title, 'info'); setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 2000); });
            socket.on('accountStatusChanged', d => { if (d.status === 'Suspended') { showToast('Account locked by SYSADMIN', 'error'); setTimeout(() => window.location.href = '/portal/auth/logout', 2000); } });
        }
    } catch (e) { }
    
    // Animate circular progress indicator
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
        const fill = document.querySelector('circle.transition-all');
        if (fill) { 
            const targetOffset = parseFloat(fill.getAttribute('stroke-dashoffset')); 
            fill.removeAttribute('stroke-dashoffset'); // Fallback to inline style transition
            fill.style.strokeDashoffset = '214'; 
            setTimeout(() => {
                fill.style.strokeDashoffset = targetOffset; 
            }, 100); 
        }
    });

    // Push Notification Registration
    async function registerPush() {
        if (!('serviceWorker' in navigator) || !('PushManager' in window)) return;
        try {
            const reg = await navigator.serviceWorker.register('/sw.js');
            await navigator.serviceWorker.ready;

            let sub = await reg.pushManager.getSubscription();
            if (!sub) {
                const vapidKey = '<%= vapidPublicKey %>';
                if (!vapidKey) return;
                const converted = urlBase64ToUint8Array(vapidKey);
                sub = await reg.pushManager.subscribe({
                    userVisibleOnly: true,
                    applicationServerKey: converted
                });
            }

            // Send subscription to server
            const csrf = document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '';
            await fetch('/portal/staff/push-subscribe', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'CSRF-Token': csrf },
                body: JSON.stringify({ subscription: sub })
            });
            console.log('Push notifications registered');
        } catch (err) {
            console.log('Push registration failed:', err.message);
        }
    }

    function urlBase64ToUint8Array(base64String) {
        const padding = '='.repeat((4 - base64String.length % 4) % 4);
        const base64 = (base64String + padding).replace(/-/g, '+').replace(/_/g, '/');
        const rawData = atob(base64);
        return Uint8Array.from([...rawData].map(c => c.charCodeAt(0)));
    }

    // Register on page load
    window.addEventListener('load', () => {
        registerPush().catch(() => {});
    });
</script>

===== C:\My Web Sites\school\live.themewild.com\emerald\staff-system\views\staff\notifications.ejs =====
<% currentPage='notifications' %>

<div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-5 animate-fade-up">
    <div>
        <h1 class="font-display text-2xl font-extrabold text-tx-1 tracking-tight flex items-center gap-3">
            <i class="fa-regular fa-bell text-emerald-400"></i>
            <span class="text-gradient-emerald">Notifications</span>
        </h1>
        <p class="text-[0.7rem] text-tx-3 mt-1 uppercase tracking-widest font-mono">Alerts & Updates</p>
    </div>
    <% if(notifications && notifications.length > 0) { %>
    <span class="badge-emerald text-xs font-bold px-3 py-1 rounded-full"><%= notifications.length %> unread</span>
    <% } %>
</div>

<% if(!notifications || notifications.length === 0) { %>
    <div class="glass-card p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-tx-3 opacity-60 text-center animate-fade-up">
        <i class="fa-regular fa-bell-slash text-4xl mb-4"></i>
        <h4 class="text-sm font-bold text-tx-1 mb-1">All Clear</h4>
        <p class="text-xs">No notifications right now.</p>
    </div>
<% } else { %>
    <div class="flex flex-col gap-3 animate-fade-up">
        <% notifications.forEach(function(n) { %>
        <a href="<%= n.url || '#' %>" class="glass-card p-4 flex items-start gap-4 hover:border-emerald-500/30 transition-colors no-underline">
            <div class="w-10 h-10 rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0
                <%= n.type==='payment' ? 'bg-emerald-500/20 text-emerald-400' : n.type==='announcement' ? 'bg-gold-500/20 text-gold-400' : 'bg-blue-500/20 text-blue-400' %>">
                <i class="fa-solid <%= n.icon || 'fa-bell' %>"></i>
            </div>
            <div class="flex-1 min-w-0">
                <div class="text-sm text-tx-1 font-medium leading-snug"><%= n.message %></div>
                <div class="text-[0.65rem] text-tx-3 mt-1">

            </button>

                    <i class="fa-solid fa-calendar-xmark text-xs"></i>
                </div>
                <div>
                    <div class="text-[0.6rem] text-tx-3 uppercase tracking-widest font-bold mb-0.5">Disputed Event</div>
                    <div class="text-sm font-bold text-tx-1" id="disputeEventTitle">â€”</div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <div>
                <label class="block text-[0.65rem] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-tx-3 mb-2">Reason <span class="text-red-400">*</span></label>
                <textarea class="w-full bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-xl p-3 text-sm text-tx-2 placeholder-tx-3/50 focus:border-red-500/40 focus:ring-0 focus:outline-none resize-none font-mono leading-relaxed" id="disputeReason" rows="4" placeholder="Describe the payment discrepancy in detailâ€¦"></textarea>
            </div>
            
            <button class="btn btn-primary w-full bg-gradient-to-r from-red-700 to-red-500 text-white border-none shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(239,68,68,0.2)] font-bold tracking-wider" onclick="submitDispute()">
                <i class="fa-solid fa-flag mr-2"></i> SUBMIT DISPUTE
            </button>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
    let activeDisputeId = null;
    
    function openDisputeModal(id, title) {
        activeDisputeId = id;
        document.getElementById('disputeEventTitle').textContent = title;
        document.getElementById('disputeReason').value = '';
        openModal('disputeModal');
    }
    
    async function confirmReceipt(id) {
        if (!confirm('Confirm receipt of payment for this event?')) return;
        showToast('Confirming receipt...', 'info');
        const r = await fetch('/portal/staff/assignments/' + id + '/payment/confirm', { 
            method: 'POST',
            headers: { 'CSRF-Token': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '' }
        });
        const d = await r.json();
        if (d.success) { showToast('Payment confirmed!', 'success'); setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 1000); }
        else showToast(d.error || 'Error', 'error');
    }
    
    async function submitDispute() {
        const reason = document.getElementById('disputeReason').value.trim();
        if (!reason) return showToast('Enter a reason for the dispute.', 'error');
        showToast('Logging dispute...', 'info');
        const r = await fetch('/portal/staff/assignments/' + activeDisputeId + '/payment/dispute', {
            method: 'POST', 
            headers: { 
                'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                'CSRF-Token': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || ''
            },
            body: JSON.stringify({ reason })
        });
        const d = await r.json();
        if (d.success) { 
            showToast('Dispute logged. Admin will review.', 'success'); 
            closeModal('disputeModal'); 
            setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 1000); 
        } else showToast(d.error || 'Error', 'error');
    }
</script>

      <div style="width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:50%;overflow:hidden;flex-shrink:0;">
        <img src="/images/pearl-logo.png" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;">
      </div>
      <div style="background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border-radius:0 14px 14px 14px;padding:10px 14px;max-width:80%;font-size:0.875rem;color:var(--tx-1,#f1f5f9);line-height:1.6;" id="greetMsg">

  <!-- Input -->
  <div style="padding:10px 16px 16px;flex-shrink:0;border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);">
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;">
      <input type="text" id="aiInput" placeholder="Ask PEARL anything..."
        style="flex:1;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);border-radius:24px;padding:10px 16px;font-size:0.875rem;color:var(--tx-1,#f1f5f9);outline:none;transition:border-color 0.2s;"

        onkeypress="if(event.key==='Enter') sendMessage()">
      <button onclick="sendMessage()" id="sendBtn"
        style="width:42px;height:42px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#059669,#0d9488);border:none;color:white;cursor:pointer;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;transition:transform 0.15s;"
        onmouseover="this.style.transform='scale(1.08)'" onmouseout="this.style.transform='scale(1)'">
        <i class="fa-solid fa-paper-plane" style="font-size:0.8rem;"></i>
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
const csrf = document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '';
const conversationHistory = [];
function quickAsk(q) { document.getElementById('aiInput').value = q; sendMessage(); }
const userName = '<%= user && user.name ? user.name.split(" ")[0] : "there" %>';
const userRole = '<%= user && user.role ? user.role : "Staff" %>';

// Greeting based on time
const hour = new Date().getHours();
const greet = hour < 12 ? 'Good morning' : hour < 17 ? 'Good afternoon' : 'Good evening';
const greetings = {
  Admin: greet + ', ' + userName + '. What do you need?',
  Supervisor: greet + ', ' + userName + '. How can I help?',
  Staff: greet + ', ' + userName + '. What can I do for you?'
};
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() { document.getElementById("greetMsg").textContent = greetings[userRole] || greetings.Staff; });

function quickAsk(q) {
  document.getElementById('aiInput').value = q;
  sendMessage();
}

function clearChat() {
  const msgs = document.getElementById('chatMessages');
  msgs.innerHTML = '';
  conversationHistory.length = 0;
  addMessage(greetings[userRole] || greetings.Staff, 'ai');
}

async function sendMessage() {
  const input = document.getElementById('aiInput');
  const query = input.value.trim();
  if (!query) return;
  input.value = '';

  // Hide quick prompts after first message
  document.getElementById('quickPrompts').style.display = 'none';

  addMessage(query, 'user');
  const typing = addTyping();
  document.getElementById('sendBtn').disabled = true;
  document.getElementById('pearlStatus').textContent = 'Thinking...';

  try {
    const res = await fetch('/portal/staff/ai/chat', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'csrf-token': csrf, 'x-csrf-token': csrf, 'CSRF-Token': csrf },
      body: JSON.stringify({
        _csrf: csrf,
        query,
        eventContext: { userName: '<%= user && user.name ? user.name : "Staff" %>', role: userRole },
        history: conversationHistory
      })
    });
    const data = await res.json();
    typing.remove();
    const reply = data.success ? (data.data?.reply || data.data?.response || 'No response') : (data.message || 'Something went wrong.');
    addMessage(reply, 'ai');
    conversationHistory.push({ query, response: reply });
  } catch (err) {
    typing.remove();
    addMessage('Connection error â€” please try again.', 'ai');
  } finally {
    document.getElementById('sendBtn').disabled = false;
    document.getElementById('pearlStatus').textContent = 'Personal Emerald Assistant';
  }
}

function addMessage(text, from) {
  const wrap = document.getElementById('chatMessages');
  const div = document.createElement('div');
  div.style.cssText = 'display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:flex-start;' + (from === 'user' ? 'flex-direction:row-reverse;' : '');

  const bubble = document.createElement('div');
  bubble.style.cssText = from === 'user'
    ? 'background:rgba(5,150,105,0.15);border:1px solid rgba(5,150,105,0.25);border-radius:14px 0 14px 14px;padding:10px 14px;max-width:80%;font-size:0.875rem;color:var(--tx-1,#f1f5f9);line-height:1.6;white-space:pre-wrap;'
    : 'background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border-radius:0 14px 14px 14px;padding:10px 14px;max-width:80%;font-size:0.875rem;color:var(--tx-1,#f1f5f9);line-height:1.6;white-space:pre-wrap;';
  bubble.innerHTML = text;

  if (from === 'ai') {
    const avatar = document.createElement('div');
    avatar.style.cssText = 'width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:50%;overflow:hidden;flex-shrink:0;';
    avatar.innerHTML = '<img src="/images/pearl-logo.png" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;">';
    div.appendChild(avatar);
  }
  div.appendChild(bubble);
  wrap.appendChild(div);
  wrap.scrollTop = wrap.scrollHeight;
  return div;
}

function addTyping() {
  return addMessage('<span style="opacity:0.5;font-style:italic;font-size:0.8rem;">typing...</span>', 'ai');
}
</script>

===== C:\My Web Sites\school\live.themewild.com\emerald\staff-system\views\staff\profile.ejs =====
<% currentPage='profile' ; %>
<% var portalBase = user.role === 'Admin' ? '/portal/admin-staff' : user.role === 'Supervisor' ? '/portal/supervisor' : '/portal/staff'; %>

<!-- â•â• Profile Hero â•â• -->
<div class="relative mb-5 animate-fade-up">
    <!-- Background glow accent -->
    <div class="absolute inset-x-0 top-0 h-32 bg-gradient-to-b from-emerald-950/30 to-transparent rounded-2xl pointer-events-none"></div>
    
    <div class="glass-card p-5 sm:p-7 relative z-10 border-t-2 border-emerald-500/30">
        <div class="flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-center sm:items-start gap-5">
            
            <!-- Avatar -->
            <div class="relative shrink-0">
                <label class="cursor-pointer block group" for="photoUpload" title="Change Photo">
                    <% if (user.photo_url) { %>
                        <img src="<%= user.photo_url %>" id="profileAvatar" class="w-20 h-20 sm:w-24 sm:h-24 rounded-2xl object-cover border-2 border-emerald-500/40 shadow-glow-emerald group-hover:border-emerald-500/80 transition-colors">
                    <% } else { %>
                        <div id="profileAvatar" class="w-20 h-20 sm:w-24 sm:h-24 rounded-2xl bg-gradient-to-br from-emerald-700 to-emerald-500 flex items-center justify-center font-display text-3xl font-extrabold text-white shadow-glow-emerald border-2 border-emerald-500/40 group-hover:border-emerald-500/80 transition-colors">
                            <%= user.name.split(' ').map(n=>n[0]).join('').toUpperCase().slice(0,2) %>
                        </div>
                    <% } %>
