<!-- â•â• Change Password â•â• -->
<div class="glass-card mb-[80px] animate-fade-up delay-2">
    <div class="px-5 py-4 border-b border-white/5 flex items-center gap-2">
        <i class="fa-solid fa-lock text-gold-400 text-sm"></i>
        <h3 class="text-sm font-bold text-tx-1 uppercase tracking-widest">Security</h3>
    </div>
    <div class="p-5 space-y-4">
        <!-- Current Password -->
        <div class="relative">
            <label class="block text-[0.65rem] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-tx-3 mb-2">Current Password</label>
            <input type="password" id="current_password" placeholder="Your current access key" class="w-full bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 pr-12 text-sm text-tx-1 placeholder-tx-3/50 focus:border-gold-500/50 focus:ring-0 focus:outline-none transition-colors">
            <button type="button" onclick="togglePwd('current_password',this)" class="absolute right-3 top-[2.35rem] bg-none border-none cursor-pointer text-tx-3 hover:text-tx-1 transition-colors w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded hover:bg-white/5">
                <i class="fa-regular fa-eye text-sm"></i>
            </button>
        </div>
        
        <!-- New Password -->
        <div class="grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-4">
            <div class="relative">
                <label class="block text-[0.65rem] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-tx-3 mb-2">New Password</label>
                <input type="password" id="new_password" placeholder="Min. 8 characters" oninput="checkStrength(this.value)" class="w-full bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 pr-12 text-sm text-tx-1 placeholder-tx-3/50 focus:border-gold-500/50 focus:ring-0 focus:outline-none transition-colors">
                <button type="button" onclick="togglePwd('new_password',this)" class="absolute right-3 top-[2.35rem] bg-none border-none cursor-pointer text-tx-3 hover:text-tx-1 transition-colors w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded hover:bg-white/5">
                    <i class="fa-regular fa-eye text-sm"></i>
                </button>
            </div>
            <div class="relative">
                <label class="block text-[0.65rem] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-tx-3 mb-2">Confirm New</label>
                <input type="password" id="confirm_new_password" placeholder="Repeat new password" class="w-full bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 pr-12 text-sm text-tx-1 placeholder-tx-3/50 focus:border-gold-500/50 focus:ring-0 focus:outline-none transition-colors">
                <button type="button" onclick="togglePwd('confirm_new_password',this)" class="absolute right-3 top-[2.35rem] bg-none border-none cursor-pointer text-tx-3 hover:text-tx-1 transition-colors w-8 h-8 flex items-center justify-center rounded hover:bg-white/5">
                    <i class="fa-regular fa-eye text-sm"></i>
                </button>
            </div>
        </div>
        
        <!-- Password Strength Checklist -->
        <div class="bg-black/30 border border-white/5 rounded-xl p-3 grid grid-cols-2 gap-x-4 gap-y-1.5">
            <div id="req-length"  class="text-[0.65rem] flex items-center gap-1.5 text-tx-3 font-mono"><i class="fa-solid fa-circle-xmark text-[0.55rem]"></i> 8+ characters</div>
            <div id="req-upper"   class="text-[0.65rem] flex items-center gap-1.5 text-tx-3 font-mono"><i class="fa-solid fa-circle-xmark text-[0.55rem]"></i> Uppercase letter</div>
            <div id="req-lower"   class="text-[0.65rem] flex items-center gap-1.5 text-tx-3 font-mono"><i class="fa-solid fa-circle-xmark text-[0.55rem]"></i> Lowercase letter</div>
            <div id="req-number"  class="text-[0.65rem] flex items-center gap-1.5 text-tx-3 font-mono"><i class="fa-solid fa-circle-xmark text-[0.55rem]"></i> A number</div>
            <div id="req-special" class="text-[0.65rem] flex items-center gap-1.5 text-tx-3 font-mono col-span-2"><i class="fa-solid fa-circle-xmark text-[0.55rem]"></i> Special character</div>
        </div>
        
        <button class="btn btn-primary bg-gradient-to-r from-gold-600 to-gold-400 text-dark-bg border-none font-bold shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(245,158,11,0.2)] hover:scale-[1.02] transition-transform" onclick="changePassword()">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-key mr-2"></i> Update Security Key
        </button>
    </div>
</div>

<script>
    const portalBase = '<%= portalBase %>';

    async function saveProfile() {
        try {
            const r = await fetch(portalBase + '/profile', {
                method: 'PUT',
                headers: {
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                    'CSRF-Token': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || ''
                },
                body: JSON.stringify({
                    name: document.getElementById('profileName').value,
                    phone: document.getElementById('profilePhone').value
                })
            });
            const result = await r.json();
            if (result.success) showToast('Profile saved successfully!', 'success');
            else showToast(result.error || 'Save failed', 'error');
        } catch(err) { showToast('Save failed', 'error'); }
    }

    function togglePwd(id, btn) {
        const input = document.getElementById(id);
        const isHidden = input.type === 'password';
        input.type = isHidden ? 'text' : 'password';
        btn.querySelector('i').className = isHidden ? 'fa-regular fa-eye-slash text-sm' : 'fa-regular fa-eye text-sm';
    }

    function checkStrength(val) {
        const set = (id, pass) => {
            const el = document.getElementById(id);
            el.style.color = pass ? '#10b981' : '';
            el.querySelector('i').className = (pass ? 'fa-solid fa-circle-check' : 'fa-solid fa-circle-xmark') + ' text-[0.55rem]';
        };
        set('req-length',  val.length >= 8);
        set('req-upper',   /[A-Z]/.test(val));
        set('req-lower',   /[a-z]/.test(val));
        set('req-number',  /[0-9]/.test(val));
        set('req-special', /[^A-Za-z0-9]/.test(val));
    }

    async function changePassword() {
        const current_password     = document.getElementById('current_password').value;
        const new_password         = document.getElementById('new_password').value;
        const confirm_new_password = document.getElementById('confirm_new_password').value;
        if (new_password !== confirm_new_password) { showToast('Key sequences do not match.', 'error'); return; }
        const r = await fetch(`${portalBase}/change-password`, {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'CSRF-Token': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '' },
            body: JSON.stringify({ current_password, new_password, confirm_new_password })
        });
        const d = await r.json();
        if (d.success) { showToast('Security key updated.', 'success'); setTimeout(() => window.location.reload(), 1500); }
        else showToast(d.details ? d.details.join(', ') : d.error, 'error');
    }

    async function updateAvailability(val) {
        const r = await fetch(`${portalBase}/availability`, {
            method: 'PUT',
            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'CSRF-Token': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '' },
            body: JSON.stringify({ availability_status: val })
        });
        const d = await r.json();
        if (d.success) showToast('Status: ' + val, 'success');
        else showToast(d.error || 'Error', 'error');
    }

    async function uploadPhoto(input) {
        const file = input.files[0];
        if (!file) return;
        showToast('Uploading...', 'info');
        const formData = new FormData();
        formData.append('photo', file);
        try {
            const r = await fetch(`${portalBase}/profile/photo`, {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'CSRF-Token': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '' },
                body: formData
            });
            const data = await r.json();
            if (data.success) { showToast('Photo updated!', 'success'); setTimeout(() => location.reload(), 800); }
            else showToast(data.error || 'Upload failed', 'error');
        } catch(err) { showToast('Upload failed', 'error'); }
    }
</script>

<!-- â•â• Security Section â•â• -->

    <div class="px-5 py-4 border-b border-white/5 flex items-center gap-2">

            </div>
            <div>
                <label class="block text-[0.65rem] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-tx-3 mb-2">New Password</label>
                <input type="password" id="newPassword" required minlength="8"
                    class="w-full bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-sm text-tx-1 placeholder-tx-3/50 focus:border-gold-500/50 focus:ring-0 focus:outline-none transition-colors">
            </div>
            <div>
                <label class="block text-[0.65rem] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-tx-3 mb-2">Confirm New Password</label>
                <input type="password" id="confirmPassword" required minlength="8"
                    class="w-full bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-sm text-tx-1 placeholder-tx-3/50 focus:border-gold-500/50 focus:ring-0 focus:outline-none transition-colors">
            </div>
            <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary bg-gradient-to-r from-gold-600 to-gold-400 border-none text-dark-bg font-bold shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(245,158,11,0.2)]">
                <i class="fa-solid fa-key mr-2"></i> Change Password

<script>
    const _portalBase = '/portal/<%= user.role === "Admin" ? "admin-staff" : (user.role === "Supervisor" ? "supervisor" : "staff") %>';
    
    function updateProfile(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        const name = document.getElementById('profileName').value;
        const phone = document.getElementById('profilePhone').value;

        fetch(_portalBase + '/profile', {
            method: 'PUT',
            headers: {
                'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                'CSRF-Token': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || ''
            },
            body: JSON.stringify({ name, phone })
        })
        .then(res => res.json())
        .then(data => {
            if (data.success) showToast('Profile updated!', 'success');
            else showToast('Error: ' + data.error, 'error');
        })
        .catch(() => showToast('An error occurred.', 'error'));
    }

    function changePassword(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        const current_password = document.getElementById('currentPassword').value;
        const new_password = document.getElementById('newPassword').value;
        const confirm_new_password = document.getElementById('confirmPassword').value;

        if (new_password !== confirm_new_password) { showToast('Passwords do not match.', 'error'); return; }

        fetch(_portalBase + '/change-password', {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: {
                'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                'CSRF-Token': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || ''
            },
            body: JSON.stringify({ current_password, new_password, confirm_new_password })
        })
        .then(res => res.json())
        .then(data => {
            if (data.success) {
                showToast('Password changed! Redirecting...', 'success');
                setTimeout(() => window.location.href = _portalBase + '/dashboard', 1500);
            } else {
                showToast('Error: ' + data.error, 'error');
            }
        })
        .catch(() => showToast('An error occurred.', 'error'));
    }
</script>

<%
// Staff survey page â€” accessible via unique token link (no auth required)
var submitted = typeof submitted !== 'undefined' ? submitted : false;
%>
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title><%= title || 'Post-Event Survey' %> â€” Emerald Pearland Events</title>
    <script src="https://cdn.tailwindcss.com/4.0.0-alpha.20"></script>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800;900&family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@400;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<body class="flex items-center justify-center p-4">
    <div class="max-w-xl w-full mx-auto py-8">

        <!-- Header -->
        <div class="text-center mb-8">
            <div class="mx-auto mb-4" style="width:70px;height:70px;">
                <img src="https://i.ibb.co/spZpSgWp/logo-2.png" alt="Emerald Pearland Events" style="width:70px;height:70px;object-fit:contain;border-radius:14px;">
            </div>
            <h1 class="font-display text-2xl font-extrabold text-white mb-1" style="font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;">Post-Event Survey</h1>
            <% if (survey && survey.assignment_id) { %>
            <p class="text-sm text-gray-400">
                <i class="fa-solid fa-calendar-day mr-1 opacity-60"></i>
                <%= survey.assignment_id.title %>
                <% if (survey.assignment_id.date) { %> Â· <%= new Date(survey.assignment_id.date).toLocaleDateString('en-KE', {day:'numeric',month:'long',year:'numeric'}) %><% } %>
            </p>
            <% } %>
        </div>

        <% if (submitted) { %>
        <!-- Already submitted -->
        <div class="glass-card p-8 text-center">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-circle-check text-emerald-400 text-4xl mb-4 block"></i>
            <h2 class="text-xl font-bold text-white mb-2">Survey Already Submitted</h2>
            <p class="text-gray-400 text-sm">Thank you for your feedback. Your responses have been recorded.</p>

        <% } else if (!survey) { %>

            <div class="glass-card p-4">
                <p class="text-sm font-medium text-white mb-3">
                    <span class="text-gray-400 mr-2 font-mono text-xs"><%= idx + 1 %>.</span>
                    <%= resp.question %>
                </p>

                <% if (resp.answer_type === 'rating') { %>
                <div class="flex gap-2" data-field="rating-<%= idx %>" data-idx="<%= idx %>">
                    <% for (var s = 1; s <= 5; s++) { %>
                        <button type="button" class="star-btn text-3xl text-white/20 transition-colors" data-rating-idx="<%= idx %>" data-val="<%= s %>">
                            <i class="fa-solid fa-star"></i>
                        </button>
                    <% } %>
                </div>
                <input type="hidden" name="responses[<%= idx %>][answer]" id="ratingInput-<%= idx %>">
                <input type="hidden" name="responses[<%= idx %>][answer_type]" value="rating">
                <input type="hidden" name="responses[<%= idx %>][question]" value="<%= resp.question %>">

                <% } else if (resp.answer_type === 'boolean') { %>
                <div class="flex gap-3 mt-1">
                    <label class="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
                        <input type="radio" name="responses[<%= idx %>][answer]" value="true" class="accent-emerald-500"
                            onchange="toggleFollowUp(<%= idx %>, true)">
                        <span class="text-sm text-emerald-400 font-medium">Yes</span>
                    </label>
                    <label class="flex items-center gap-2 cursor-pointer">
                        <input type="radio" name="responses[<%= idx %>][answer]" value="false" class="accent-red-500"
                            onchange="toggleFollowUp(<%= idx %>, false)">
                        <span class="text-sm text-red-400 font-medium">No</span>
                    </label>
                </div>
                <!-- Follow-up field shown only when Yes is selected -->
                <div id="followup-<%= idx %>" class="hidden mt-3">
                    <% if (resp.question && (resp.question.toLowerCase().includes('underperform') || resp.question.toLowerCase().includes('staff who'))) { %>
                        <label class="text-xs text-gray-400 mb-1 block">Which staff member(s)?</label>
                        <% if (survey.assignment_id && survey.assignment_id.accepted_staff_ids && survey.assignment_id.accepted_staff_ids.length) { %>
                            <select name="responses[<%= idx %>][followup]" class="w-full bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-2.5 text-sm text-white focus:border-emerald-500/40 focus:outline-none">
                                <option value="">-- Select staff member --</option>
                                <% survey.assignment_id.accepted_staff_ids.forEach(function(staffMember) { %>
                                    <option value="<%= staffMember._id || staffMember %>"><%= staffMember.name || staffMember %></option>
                                <% }); %>
                            </select>
                        <% } else { %>
                            <textarea name="responses[<%= idx %>][followup]" rows="2" placeholder="Please specify..."
                                class="w-full bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-2.5 text-sm text-white placeholder-gray-600 focus:border-emerald-500/40 focus:outline-none resize-none"></textarea>
                        <% } %>
                    <% } else { %>
                        <label class="text-xs text-gray-400 mb-1 block">Please provide details:</label>
                        <textarea name="responses[<%= idx %>][followup]" rows="2" placeholder="Please explain..."
                            class="w-full bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-2.5 text-sm text-white placeholder-gray-600 focus:border-emerald-500/40 focus:outline-none resize-none"></textarea>
                    <% } %>
                </div>
                <input type="hidden" name="responses[<%= idx %>][answer_type]" value="boolean">
                <input type="hidden" name="responses[<%= idx %>][question]" value="<%= resp.question %>">

                <% } else { %>
                <textarea name="responses[<%= idx %>][answer]" rows="3" placeholder="Your answerâ€¦"
                    class="w-full bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-2.5 text-sm text-white placeholder-gray-600 focus:border-emerald-500/40 focus:outline-none resize-none mt-1"></textarea>
                <input type="hidden" name="responses[<%= idx %>][answer_type]" value="text">
                <input type="hidden" name="responses[<%= idx %>][question]" value="<%= resp.question %>">
                <% } %>
            </div>
            <% }); %>

            <!-- Overall Rating -->
            <div class="glass-card p-4">
                <p class="text-sm font-medium text-white mb-3">Overall Rating for this Event</p>
                <div class="flex gap-2">
                    <% for (var o = 1; o <= 5; o++) { %>
                        <button type="button" class="star-btn text-3xl text-white/20" data-overall-val="<%= o %>">
                            <i class="fa-solid fa-star"></i>
                        </button>
                    <% } %>
                </div>
                <input type="hidden" name="overall_rating" id="overallRatingInput">
            </div>

            <button type="submit" id="submitBtn" class="w-full py-4 rounded-2xl text-white font-bold text-base uppercase tracking-widest transition-all"
                style="background: linear-gradient(135deg, #059669, #10b981); box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(16,185,129,0.3);">
                <i class="fa-solid fa-paper-plane mr-2"></i>Submit Survey
            </button>
        </form>

        <!-- Success Message -->
        <div id="successMsg" class="hidden glass-card p-8 text-center border border-emerald-500/30">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-circle-check text-emerald-400 text-5xl mb-4 block animate-bounce"></i>
            <h2 class="text-xl font-bold text-white mb-2">Thank You!</h2>
            <p class="text-gray-400 text-sm">Your feedback has been submitted. We appreciate your time!</p>
        </div>
        <% } %>
    </div>

    <script>
    // Questions where "Yes" triggers follow-up (something bad happened)
    const YES_TRIGGERS = ['underperform', 'staff who', 'safety', 'security concern', 'issues', 'concerns'];
    // Questions where "No" triggers follow-up (something expected didn't happen)
    const NO_TRIGGERS = ['clearly communicated', 'adequate equipment', 'requirements fulfilled', 'professional', 'punctual', 'recommend', 'work this type', 'prepared', 'logistics'];

    function toggleFollowUp(idx, answeredYes) {
        const el = document.getElementById('followup-' + idx);
        if (!el) return;
        const questionEl = document.querySelector(`input[name="responses[${idx}][question]"]`);
        const question = (questionEl ? questionEl.value : '').toLowerCase();

        const yesTrigger = YES_TRIGGERS.some(k => question.includes(k));
        const noTrigger = NO_TRIGGERS.some(k => question.includes(k));

        let shouldShow = false;
        if (yesTrigger) shouldShow = answeredYes;
        else if (noTrigger) shouldShow = !answeredYes;
        else shouldShow = !answeredYes; // default: No triggers follow-up

        el.classList.toggle('hidden', !shouldShow);
    }

    // Star rating for question fields
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-rating-idx]').forEach(btn => {
        btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            const idx = btn.dataset.ratingIdx;
            const val = parseInt(btn.dataset.val);
            document.getElementById(`ratingInput-${idx}`).value = val;
            document.querySelectorAll(`[data-rating-idx="${idx}"]`).forEach((b, i) => {
                b.classList.toggle('active', i < val);
                b.style.color = i < val ? '#f59e0b' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.2)';
            });
        });
    });

    // Star rating for overall
    document.querySelectorAll('[data-overall-val]').forEach(btn => {
        btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            const val = parseInt(btn.dataset.overallVal);
            document.getElementById('overallRatingInput').value = val;
            document.querySelectorAll('[data-overall-val]').forEach((b, i) => {
                b.style.color = i < val ? '#f59e0b' : 'rgba(255,255,255,0.2)';
            });
        });
    });

    // Submit form
    document.getElementById('surveyForm') && document.getElementById('surveyForm').addEventListener('submit', async (e) => {
        e.preventDefault();
        const btn = document.getElementById('submitBtn');
        btn.disabled = true;
        btn.textContent = 'Submittingâ€¦';

        const formData = new FormData(e.target);
        const overall  = formData.get('overall_rating');

        // Build responses array
        const responses = [];
        let idx = 0;
        while (formData.has(`responses[${idx}][question]`)) {
            responses.push({
                question:    formData.get(`responses[${idx}][question]`),
                answer:      formData.get(`responses[${idx}][answer]`),
                answer_type: formData.get(`responses[${idx}][answer_type]`),
                followup:    formData.get(`responses[${idx}][followup]`) || ''
            });
            idx++;
        }

        try {
            const res = await fetch(window.location.pathname + '/submit', {
                method: 'POST',
                headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
                body: JSON.stringify({ responses, overall_rating: overall })
            });
            const data = await res.json();

            if (data.success) {
                document.getElementById('surveyForm').classList.add('hidden');
                document.getElementById('successMsg').classList.remove('hidden');
            } else {
                btn.disabled = false;
                btn.textContent = 'Try Again';
                alert(data.error || 'Submission failed. Please try again.');
            }
        } catch(err) {
            btn.disabled = false;
            btn.textContent = 'Try Again';
            alert('Error submitting survey. Please check your connection.');
        }
    });
    </script>
</body>
</html>

        <!-- Input -->
        <input type="text" id="chatInput" placeholder="Transmit messageâ€¦"
            class="flex-1 bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-3 py-2 text-xs text-tx-1 placeholder-tx-3/50 focus:border-emerald-500/40 focus:ring-0 focus:outline-none transition-colors font-mono"
            onkeydown="handleChatKey(event)" oninput="handleMentionInput(this)">
        <!-- Send -->
        <button onclick="sendChatMessage()" title="Send" class="w-8 h-8 bg-emerald-600 hover:bg-emerald-500 text-white border-none rounded-xl flex items-center justify-center flex-shrink-0 shadow-glow-emerald transition-colors">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-paper-plane text-xs"></i>
        </button>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- â•â• Media Preview Modal â•â• -->
<div id="mediaPreviewModal" class="hidden fixed inset-0 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-md z-[9999] flex items-center justify-center p-4">
    <div class="bg-dark-card border border-white/10 rounded-2xl p-5 max-w-sm w-full relative">
        <button onclick="closeMediaPreview()" class="absolute top-3 right-3 w-8 h-8 rounded-full border border-white/10 flex items-center justify-center text-tx-3 hover:text-tx-1 hover:bg-white/5 transition-colors">
            <i class="fa-solid fa-xmark text-xs"></i>

            class="w-full bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-3 py-2.5 text-sm text-tx-1 placeholder-tx-3/50 focus:border-emerald-500/40 focus:ring-0 focus:outline-none mb-3 transition-colors"

        <button onclick="sendMediaWithCaption()" class="btn btn-primary w-full shadow-glow-emerald font-bold tracking-wider">

<script>
const teamId = '<%= team ? team._id : "" %>';
if (teamId && typeof socket !== 'undefined') {
    socket.emit('joinRoom', `Team_${teamId}`);
    socket.on('newTeamMessage', function(msg) {
        appendMessage(msg);
        scrollChat();
    });
}

function renderContent(content) {
    if (!content) return '';
    if (content.startsWith('[image]')) {
        const url = content.replace('[image]', '');
        return `<img src="${url}" class="max-w-[200px] max-h-[180px] rounded-lg cursor-pointer hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity mt-1" onclick="window.open('${url}','_blank')">`;
    }
    if (content.startsWith('[video]')) {
        const url = content.replace('[video]', '');
        return `<video src="${url}" controls class="max-w-[200px] rounded-lg mt-1"></video>`;
    }
    return content
        .replace(/&/g, '&amp;').replace(/</g, '&lt;').replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
        .replace(/@(\w+\s?\w+)/g, '<span class="text-emerald-400 font-bold">@$1</span>');
}

function appendMessage(msg) {
    const container = document.getElementById('chatMessages');
    if (!container) return;
    const initials = (msg.sender_name || '?').split(' ').map(n => n[0]).join('').slice(0, 2).toUpperCase();
    const time = new Date(msg.timestamp).toLocaleTimeString('en-KE', { hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit' });
    const div = document.createElement('div');
    div.className = 'flex gap-3 items-start';
    div.innerHTML = `
        <div style="width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;overflow:hidden;flex-shrink:0;">
            ${msg.photo_url ? `<img src="${msg.photo_url}" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;">` : `<div style="width:100%;height:100%;background:var(--emerald);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:700;color:#fff;">${initials}</div>`}
        </div>
        <div class="flex-1 min-w-0">
            <div class="text-[0.65rem] text-tx-3 font-mono mb-1">
                <strong class="text-tx-1 font-bold">${msg.sender_name}</strong>
                <span class="opacity-60 ml-1">Â· ${time}</span>
            </div>
            <div class="bg-white/5 border border-white/5 rounded-xl rounded-tl-sm px-3 py-2 text-xs text-tx-1 leading-relaxed break-words">
                ${renderContent(msg.message_content)}
            </div>
        </div>`;
    container.appendChild(div);
}

function toggleEmoji() {
    const p = document.getElementById('emojiPicker');
    p.classList.toggle('hidden');
    p.classList.toggle('flex');
}
function insertEmoji(emoji) { const i = document.getElementById('chatInput'); i.value += emoji; i.focus(); }
function handleChatKey(e) { if (e.key === 'Enter') { sendChatMessage(); return; } if (e.key === 'Escape') document.getElementById('mentionDropdown').classList.add('hidden'); }

function handleMentionInput(input) {
    const val = input.value;
    const atPos = val.lastIndexOf('@');
    const dropdown = document.getElementById('mentionDropdown');
    if (atPos !== -1 && atPos === val.length - 1) {
        dropdown.classList.remove('hidden');
    } else if (atPos !== -1) {
        const query = val.slice(atPos + 1).toLowerCase();
        const items = dropdown.querySelectorAll('.mention-item');
        let any = false;
        items.forEach(item => {
            const match = item.dataset.name.toLowerCase().includes(query);
            item.style.display = match ? 'flex' : 'none';
            if (match) any = true;
        });
        dropdown.classList.toggle('hidden', !any);
    } else { dropdown.classList.add('hidden'); }
}

function insertMention(name) {
    const input = document.getElementById('chatInput');
    const val = input.value;
    const atPos = val.lastIndexOf('@');
    input.value = val.slice(0, atPos) + '@' + name + ' ';
    document.getElementById('mentionDropdown').classList.add('hidden');
    input.focus();
}

let _pendingFile = null;
function previewChatFile(input) {
    if (!input.files || !input.files[0]) return;
    _pendingFile = input.files[0];
    const isVideo = _pendingFile.type.startsWith('video/');
    const url = URL.createObjectURL(_pendingFile);
    const content = document.getElementById('mediaPreviewContent');
    content.innerHTML = isVideo
        ? `<video src="${url}" controls class="max-w-full rounded-lg"></video>`
        : `<img src="${url}" class="max-w-full rounded-lg">`;
    document.getElementById('mediaCaptionInput').value = '';
    document.getElementById('mediaPreviewModal').classList.remove('hidden');
    document.getElementById('mediaPreviewModal').classList.add('flex');
    input.value = '';
}
function closeMediaPreview() {
    document.getElementById('mediaPreviewModal').classList.add('hidden');
    document.getElementById('mediaPreviewModal').classList.remove('flex');
    _pendingFile = null;
}

async function sendMediaWithCaption() {
    if (!_pendingFile) return;
    const caption = document.getElementById('mediaCaptionInput').value.trim();
    const formData = new FormData();
    formData.append('file', _pendingFile);
    formData.append('caption', caption);
    closeMediaPreview();
    try {
        const csrf = document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '';
        const r = await fetch('/portal/staff/team/message/upload', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'CSRF-Token': csrf }, body: formData });
        const d = await r.json();
        if (!d.success) showToast(d.error || 'Upload failed', 'error');
    } catch(err) { showToast('Transmit failed', 'error'); }
}

function scrollChat() { const c = document.getElementById('chatMessages'); if(c) c.scrollTop = c.scrollHeight; }

async function sendChatMessage() {
    const input = document.getElementById('chatInput');
    if (!input) return;
    const message = input.value.trim();
    if (!message) return;
    input.value = '';
    input.disabled = true;
    try {
        const csrf = document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '';
        const r = await fetch('/portal/staff/team/message', {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'CSRF-Token': csrf },
            body: JSON.stringify({ message })
        });
        const d = await r.json();
        if (!d.success) { showToast(d.error || 'Failed to send', 'error'); input.value = message; }
    } catch(err) { showToast('Transmit failed', 'error'); input.value = message; }
    finally { input.disabled = false; input.focus(); }
}

scrollChat();
</script>

<!-- â•â• Remove/Replace Member Modal â•â• -->
<div id="replacementModal" class="hidden fixed inset-0 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-md z-[9999] flex items-center justify-center p-4">
    <div class="bg-dark-card border border-red-500/30 rounded-2xl shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(239,68,68,0.1)] max-w-md w-full">

                <input type="hidden" id="replaceMemberId">
                <div>
                    <label class="block text-[0.65rem] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-tx-3 mb-2">Reason for Removal <span class="text-red-400">*</span></label>
                    <input type="text" id="replaceReason" required placeholder="e.g., No Show, Sick, Underperforming"
                        class="w-full bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-sm text-tx-1 placeholder-tx-3/50 focus:border-red-500/40 focus:ring-0 focus:outline-none transition-colors">
                </div>
                <div>
                    <label class="block text-[0.65rem] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-tx-3 mb-1.5 flex items-center gap-1.5">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-lightbulb text-gold-400"></i> Suggest Replacement <span class="opacity-60 font-normal normal-case tracking-normal">(optional)</span>
                    </label>
                    <p class="text-[0.6rem] text-tx-3 mb-2 opacity-70">Select an available staff member to recommend as a replacement.</p>
                    <select id="replaceSuggestion" class="w-full bg-black/40 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-sm text-tx-2 focus:border-gold-500/40 focus:ring-0 focus:outline-none transition-colors">
                        <option value="">â€” No suggestion / Do not replace â€”</option>
                    </select>
                </div>
                <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary w-full bg-gradient-to-r from-red-700 to-red-500 border-none text-white font-bold shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(239,68,68,0.2)] tracking-wider">
                    <i class="fa-solid fa-paper-plane mr-2"></i> Submit to Admin
                </button>
            </form>
        </div>

<script>
    function removeMember(teamId, memberId, name) {
        document.getElementById('replaceTeamId').value = teamId;
        document.getElementById('replaceMemberId').value = memberId;
        document.getElementById('replaceModalTitle').innerHTML = `<i class="fa-solid fa-user-minus mr-1"></i> Remove ${name}?`;
        document.getElementById('replaceReason').value = '';

        fetch(`/supervisor/teams/${teamId}/suggest-replacements`)
            .then(r => r.json())
            .then(res => {
                const select = document.getElementById('replaceSuggestion');
                select.innerHTML = '<option value="">â€” No suggestion â€”</option>';
                if (res.success && res.data.length > 0) {
                    res.data.forEach(staff => {
                        const opt = document.createElement('option');
                        opt.value = staff._id;
                        opt.innerText = staff.name;
                        select.appendChild(opt);
                    });
                }
                document.getElementById('replacementModal').classList.remove('hidden');
                document.getElementById('replacementModal').classList.add('flex');
            });
    }

    function closeReplacementModal() {
        document.getElementById('replacementModal').classList.add('hidden');
        document.getElementById('replacementModal').classList.remove('flex');
    }

    function submitReplacement(e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        const teamId = document.getElementById('replaceTeamId').value;
        const memberId = document.getElementById('replaceMemberId').value;
        const reason = document.getElementById('replaceReason').value;
        const suggestedReplacementId = document.getElementById('replaceSuggestion').value;

        fetch(`/supervisor/teams/${teamId}/remove-member`, {
            method: 'POST',
            headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
            body: JSON.stringify({ memberId, reason, suggestedReplacementId })
        })
        .then(res => res.json())
        .then(data => {
            if (data.success) {
                closeReplacementModal();
                showToast('Replacement request sent to Admin.', 'success');
                const row = document.getElementById(`member-row-${memberId}`);
                if (row) row.style.opacity = '0.4';
            } else { showToast('Error: ' + data.error, 'error'); }
        });
    }

    function refreshReadiness(teamId) {
        fetch(`/supervisor/teams/${teamId}/readiness`, { method: 'POST' })
            .then(res => res.json())
            .then(data => {
                if (data.success) {
                    document.getElementById(`readiness-${teamId}`).innerText = `${data.readiness}%`;
                    showToast('Readiness score refreshed.', 'success');
                }
            });
    }

    function broadcastMessage(teamId) {
        const msg = prompt('Broadcast to all team members:');
        if (msg) {
            if (typeof socket !== 'undefined') {
                socket.emit('teamMessage', { team_id: teamId, type: 'announcement', content: msg });
                showToast('Announcement broadcasted!', 'success');
            }
        }
    }

    if (typeof socket !== 'undefined') {
        socket.on('teamAttendanceUpdate', () => { location.reload(); });
    }
</script>

        %>

                        <% if(asn.start_time) { %><span><i class="fa-regular fa-clock mr-1 opacity-60"></i><%= asn.start_time %> â€“ <%= asn.end_time||'?' %></span><% } %>
                        <% if(asn.location) { %><span class="hidden sm:inline"><i class="fa-solid fa-location-dot mr-1 opacity-60"></i><%= asn.location %></span><% } %>
                    </div>

                <% var stBadge = aSnStatus === 'Active' ? 'text-emerald-400 border-emerald-500/30 bg-emerald-500/10 animate-pulse' : aSnStatus === 'Completed' ? 'text-blue-400 border-blue-500/30 bg-blue-500/10' : 'text-red-400 border-red-500/30 bg-red-500/10'; %>

                    </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Pay Info -->
                <% if(asn.pay_rate) { %>
                    <% 
                        function pHM(t) { if(!t) return null; var p=t.split(':').map(Number); return p[0]+p[1]/60; }
                        var sh = pHM(asn.start_time), eh = pHM(asn.end_time);
                        var hrs = sh && eh && eh > sh ? Math.round((eh-sh)*10)/10 : null;
                        var tpay = hrs ? Math.round((asn.pay_rate||0)*hrs) : null;
                    %>
                    <div class="bg-emerald-500/10 border border-emerald-500/20 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 flex items-center justify-between gap-4 flex-wrap">

                            </div>

<script>
    navigator.geolocation.watchPosition(pos => {
        document.getElementById('profileGpsDot').className = 'gps-dot active';
        document.getElementById('profileGpsText').textContent = `GPS active (Â±${Math.round(pos.coords.accuracy)}m)`;
        document.getElementById('profileGpsText').style.color = 'var(--emerald)';
    }, err => {
        document.getElementById('profileGpsDot').className = 'gps-dot denied';
        document.getElementById('profileGpsText').textContent = 'GPS denied';
        document.getElementById('profileGpsText').style.color = 'var(--danger)';
    }, { enableHighAccuracy: true });
</script>

<script>
    let currentRating = 0;
    const stars = document.querySelectorAll('#starRating .fa-star');
    function hoverStars(val) { stars.forEach((s, i) => s.style.color = i < val ? '#f59e0b' : ''); }
    function resetStars() { stars.forEach((s, i) => s.style.color = i < currentRating ? '#f59e0b' : ''); }
    function setRating(val) { currentRating = val; document.getElementById('ratingInput').value = val; resetStars(); }
</script>

<!-- â•â• Header â•â• -->
<div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-5 animate-fade-up">

        </h1>
        <p class="text-[0.7rem] text-tx-3 mt-1 uppercase tracking-widest font-mono">Unit Deployment & Roster Control</p>
    </div>
</div>

<% if (!(teams && teams.length)) { %>
    <div class="glass-card p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-tx-3 opacity-60 text-center animate-fade-up">
        <i class="fa-solid fa-people-arrows text-4xl mb-4"></i>
        <h4 class="text-sm font-bold text-tx-1 mb-1">No Units Assigned</h4>
        <p class="text-xs">No teams have been assigned to you yet.</p>
    </div>
<% } else { %>
    <div class="space-y-4 mb-[80px]">
        <% teams.forEach(function(team) { %>
        <% var asn = team.assignment_id || {}; %>
        <div class="glass-card animate-fade-up <%= asn.vip_flag ? 'border-l-2 border-gold-500' : 'border-l-2 border-emerald-500' %>">
            <!-- Team Header -->
            <div class="px-4 sm:px-5 py-4 border-b border-white/5 flex items-start justify-between gap-3">
                <div class="min-w-0">
                    <h3 class="text-sm font-bold text-tx-1 flex items-center gap-2 flex-wrap mb-1">
                        <%= asn.title || 'Event' %>
                        <% if(asn.vip_flag) { %><span class="badge-gold text-[0.55rem] font-bold px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded uppercase tracking-widest"><i class="fa-solid fa-crown text-[0.5rem] mr-0.5"></i>VIP</span><% } %>
                    </h3>
                    <% if(asn.date) { %>
                        <div class="text-[0.65rem] text-tx-3 font-mono">
                            <i class="fa-solid fa-calendar mr-1 opacity-60"></i>
                            <%= new Date(asn.date).toLocaleDateString('en-GB',{weekday:'short',day:'2-digit',month:'short',year:'numeric'}) %>
                        </div>
                    <% } %>
                </div>
                <% var tsBadge = asn.status === 'Active' ? 'text-emerald-400 border-emerald-500/30 bg-emerald-500/10 animate-pulse' : asn.status === 'Completed' ? 'text-blue-400 border-blue-500/30 bg-blue-500/10' : 'text-tx-3 border-white/10 bg-white/5'; %>
                <span class="text-[0.55rem] font-bold tracking-widest uppercase border px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded shrink-0 <%= tsBadge %>"><%= asn.status || 'â€”' %></span>
            </div>

            <!-- Members -->
            <div class="px-4 sm:px-5 py-3">
                <div class="flex items-center justify-between mb-3">
                    <div class="text-[0.6rem] font-bold uppercase tracking-widest text-tx-3 opacity-70">Unit Members</div>
                    <span class="badge-blue text-[0.55rem] font-bold px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded"><%= (team.member_ids||[]).length %></span>
                </div>

                <% if((team.member_ids||[]).length === 0) { %>
                    <div class="text-center py-5 text-tx-3 opacity-50">
                        <i class="fa-solid fa-user-slash text-xl mb-2 block"></i>
                        <p class="text-xs">No members yet</p>
                    </div>
                <% } else { %>
                    <div class="divide-y divide-white/5">
                        <% (team.member_ids||[]).forEach(function(m) { 
                            var isAccepted = asn.accepted_staff_ids && asn.accepted_staff_ids.some(function(a){ return a && m && a.toString() === m._id.toString(); });
                            var avail = m.availability_status || 'Unknown';
                            var availClass = avail === 'Available' ? 'text-emerald-400' : avail === 'On Shift' ? 'text-gold-400' : 'text-tx-3';
                        %>
                            <div class="py-3 flex items-center justify-between gap-3">
                                <div class="flex items-center gap-2.5 min-w-0">
                                    <div class="w-9 h-9 rounded-xl bg-gradient-to-br from-gray-700 to-gray-600 flex items-center justify-center text-[0.6rem] font-bold text-white flex-shrink-0">
                                        <%= m.name ? m.name.split(' ').map(n=>n[0]).join('').toUpperCase().slice(0,2) : '??' %>
                                    </div>
                                    <div class="min-w-0">
                                        <div class="text-xs font-bold text-tx-1 truncate"><%= m.name %></div>
                                        <div class="text-[0.6rem] font-mono flex items-center gap-1 <%= availClass %>">
                                            <i class="fa-solid fa-circle text-[0.35rem]"></i>
                                            <%= avail %>
                                        </div>
                                    </div>
                                </div>
                                <div class="flex items-center gap-2 shrink-0">
                                    <% if(isAccepted) { %>
                                        <span class="text-[0.55rem] font-bold tracking-widest uppercase border border-emerald-500/30 bg-emerald-500/10 text-emerald-400 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded">
                                            <i class="fa-solid fa-circle-check text-[0.5rem] mr-0.5"></i> Accepted
                                        </span>
                                    <% } else { %>
                                        <span class="text-[0.55rem] font-bold tracking-widest uppercase border border-gold-500/30 bg-gold-500/10 text-gold-400 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded">
                                            <i class="fa-solid fa-hourglass text-[0.5rem] mr-0.5"></i> Pending
                                        </span>
                                    <% } %>
                                    <button onclick="removeRequest('<%= m._id %>', '<%= m.name %>')"
                                        class="w-7 h-7 flex items-center justify-center rounded-lg border border-red-500/30 text-red-400 hover:bg-red-500/10 transition-colors text-xs">
                                        <i class="fa-solid fa-user-minus"></i>
                                    </button>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        <% }); %>
                    </div>
                <% } %>
            </div>
        </div>
        <% }); %>
    </div>
<% } %>

<script>
    async function removeRequest(staffId, name) {
        if (!confirm(`Send removal request for ${name}?`)) return;
        const r = await fetch('/portal/supervisor/team/remove', {
            method: 'POST', headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
            body: JSON.stringify({ staffId })
        });
        const d = await r.json();
        if (d.success) showToast('Removal request submitted.', 'success');
        else showToast(d.error || 'Error', 'error');
    }
</script>

// Global avatar helper
window.avatarHtml = function(name, photoUrl, size, bg) {
  size = size || '36px';
  bg = bg || 'var(--emerald,#1a6b3c)';
  const initials = (name||'?').split(' ').map(n=>n[0]).join('').slice(0,2).toUpperCase();
  const s = `width:${size};height:${size};border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;flex-shrink:0;`;
  if (photoUrl) {
    return `<img src="${photoUrl}" alt="${initials}" style="${s}" onerror="this.outerHTML='<div style=\\'${s}background:${bg};display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:700;color:#fff;\\'>${initials}</div>'">`;
  }
  return `<div style="${s}background:${bg};display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:700;color:#fff;">${initials}</div>`;
};

// ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½ Sidebar CSS (inline to avoid extra file) ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½

// ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½ Sidebar toggle ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½
function toggleSidebar() {
  const sb = document.getElementById('sidebar');
  const main = document.getElementById('mainContent');
  const hdr = document.getElementById('topHeader');
  if (window.innerWidth <= 900) {
    sb.classList.toggle('mobile-open');
    document.getElementById('sidebarOverlay').classList.toggle('hidden');
  } else {
    const isCollapsed = sb.classList.toggle('sidebar-collapsed');
    if (main) main.style.marginLeft = isCollapsed ? '64px' : '220px';
    if (hdr) hdr.style.left = isCollapsed ? '64px' : '220px';
    localStorage.setItem('sidebarCollapsed', isCollapsed);
  }
}

function closeSidebar() {
  document.getElementById('sidebar')?.classList.remove('mobile-open');
  document.getElementById('sidebarOverlay')?.classList.add('hidden');
}

window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
  if (localStorage.getItem('sidebarCollapsed') === 'true' && window.innerWidth > 900) {
    const sb = document.getElementById('sidebar');
    const main = document.getElementById('mainContent');
    const hdr = document.getElementById('topHeader');
    if (sb) sb.classList.add('sidebar-collapsed');
    if (main) main.style.marginLeft = '64px';
    if (hdr) hdr.style.left = '64px';
  }
});

// ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½ Toast ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½
function showToast(message, type = 'success') {
  const container = document.getElementById('toast-container');
  const toast = document.createElement('div');
  const icons = { success: 'fa-circle-check', error: 'fa-circle-xmark', warning: 'fa-triangle-exclamation', info: 'fa-circle-info' };
  toast.className = 'toast ' + (type === 'error' ? 'error' : type === 'warning' ? 'warning' : type === 'info' ? 'info' : 'success');
  toast.innerHTML = '<i class="fa-solid ' + (icons[type] || icons.success) + '"></i> <span>' + message + '</span>';
  container.appendChild(toast);
  setTimeout(() => { toast.style.animation = 'toastOut 0.35s ease forwards'; setTimeout(() => toast.remove(), 350); }, 3500);
}

// ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½ GPS (Supervisor / Admin location broadcast) ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½
<% if (_role !== 'Staff') { %>
(function() {
  if (!navigator.geolocation) return;
  navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(function(pos) {
    fetch('<%= _role === "Admin" ? "/portal/admin-staff/location" : "/portal/supervisor/location" %>', {
      method: 'POST',
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'CSRF-Token': document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '' },
      body: JSON.stringify({ lat: pos.coords.latitude, lng: pos.coords.longitude })
    }).catch(function(){});
  }, function(){}, { enableHighAccuracy: true });
})();
<% } %>

// ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½ Modal helpers ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½
function openModal(id) { const m = document.getElementById(id); if (m) m.classList.add('open'); }
function closeModal(id) { const m = document.getElementById(id); if (m) m.classList.remove('open'); }
document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
  if (e.key === 'Escape') document.querySelectorAll('.modal-overlay.open').forEach(m => m.classList.remove('open'));
});

// ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½ Socket.IO ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½
try {
  const socket = io();
  socket.on('notification', d => showToast(d.message, d.type || 'info'));
} catch(e) {}

// ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½ Staff Drawer ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½
  // Welcome toast
  window.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', () => {
    const toast = document.getElementById('welcomeToast');
    if (toast) {
      setTimeout(() => { toast.style.opacity = '1'; toast.style.transform = 'translateX(-50%) translateY(0)'; }, 300);
      setTimeout(() => { toast.style.opacity = '0'; }, 3500);
    }
  });
function toggleStaffDrawer() {
  const drawer = document.getElementById('staffDrawer');
  const backdrop = document.getElementById('staffDrawerBackdrop');
  const icon = document.getElementById('drawerHamburgerIcon');
  if (!drawer) return;
  const isOpen = !drawer.classList.contains('-translate-x-full');
  if (isOpen) {
    drawer.classList.add('-translate-x-full');
    backdrop.classList.add('hidden');
    if (icon) { icon.classList.remove('fa-xmark'); icon.classList.add('fa-bars'); }
  } else {
    drawer.classList.remove('-translate-x-full');
    backdrop.classList.remove('hidden');
    if (icon) { icon.classList.remove('fa-bars'); icon.classList.add('fa-xmark'); }
  }
}

// ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½ Real notification count ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½
async function loadNotifCount() {
  try {
    const r = await fetch('/portal/staff/notifications/count');
    if (!r.ok) return;
    const d = await r.json();
    const count = d.count || 0;
    const badge = document.getElementById('drawerNotifBadge');
    const headerBadge = document.getElementById('hdr-notif-badge');
    if (count > 0) {
      if (badge) { badge.textContent = count; badge.classList.remove('hidden'); }
      if (headerBadge) { headerBadge.textContent = count; headerBadge.classList.remove('hidden'); }
    } else {
      if (badge) badge.classList.add('hidden');
      if (headerBadge) headerBadge.classList.add('hidden');
    }
  } catch(e) {}
}

// Load on staff pages
if (document.getElementById('staffDrawer')) {
  loadNotifCount();
}

// ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½ Close dropdowns on outside click ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½
document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
  const dd = document.getElementById('userDropdown');
  if (dd && !dd.parentElement.contains(e.target)) dd.classList.add('hidden');
});

// ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½ Animated counters ï¿½ï¿½ï¿½
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
  document.querySelectorAll('[data-count]').forEach(function(el) {
    const target = parseInt(el.getAttribute('data-count')) || 0;
    if (target === 0) return;
    let current = 0;
    const step = Math.ceil(target / 30);
    const interval = setInterval(function() {
      current += step;
      if (current >= target) { current = target; clearInterval(interval); }
      el.textContent = current.toLocaleString();
    }, 35);
  });
});
</script>

<!-- Notification panel -->
<script>
function toggleNotificationsPanel() {
  let p = document.getElementById('_notifPanel');
  if (!p) {
    p = document.createElement('div');
    p.id = '_notifPanel';
    p.className = 'glass-card depth-3 animate-slide-right';
    p.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;top:60px;right:16px;width:340px;z-index:9999;overflow:hidden;';
    p.innerHTML = `
      <div class="flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 border-b border-white/5">
        <div class="text-sm font-bold text-tx-1">Notifications</div>
        <button onclick="document.getElementById('_notifPanel').remove()" class="text-tx-3 hover:text-tx-1 transition-colors"><i class="fa-solid fa-xmark"></i></button>
      </div>
      <div id="_notifList" class="max-h-[360px] overflow-y-auto p-3">
        <div class="text-center py-8 text-tx-3 text-sm"><i class="fa-solid fa-spinner animate-spin text-lg block mb-2"></i>Loadingï¿½Çª</div>
      </div>`;
    document.body.appendChild(p);
    fetch('/portal/admin-staff/notifications').then(r=>r.json()).then(d=>{
      const list = document.getElementById('_notifList');
      if (!list) return;
      const items = d.data || d.notifications || d || [];
      if (!items.length) { list.innerHTML = '<div class="text-center py-8 text-tx-3 text-sm"><i class="fa-regular fa-bell-slash text-lg block mb-2 opacity-40"></i>No notifications</div>'; return; }
      list.innerHTML = items.slice(0,15).map(n=>`
        <div class="p-3 rounded-xl mb-2 bg-white/[.02] border border-white/5 hover:border-white/10 transition-colors">
          <div class="text-xs text-tx-1 font-medium leading-relaxed">${n.message||n.title||'Notification'}</div>
          <div class="text-[0.65rem] text-tx-3 mt-1">${n.createdAt ? new Date(n.createdAt).toLocaleString('en-KE') : ''}</div>
        </div>`).join('');
      const badge = document.getElementById('hdr-notif-badge');
      if (badge) badge.style.display = 'none';
    }).catch(()=>{
      const list = document.getElementById('_notifList');
      if (list) list.innerHTML = '<div class="p-4 text-tx-3 text-xs">Could not load notifications</div>';
    });
    setTimeout(()=>{ document.addEventListener('click', function _c(e){ if(!p.contains(e.target) && !e.target.closest('button[title="Notifications"]')){ p.remove(); document.removeEventListener('click',_c); } }); }, 100);
  } else { p.remove(); }
}
</script>

<% if (locals.forceStaffLayout || (_role !== 'Admin' && _role !== 'Supervisor')) { %>
<script>
if (typeof window.registerPush !== 'function') {
  async function registerPush() {
    if (!('serviceWorker' in navigator) || !('PushManager' in window)) return;
    try {
      const reg = await navigator.serviceWorker.register('/sw.js');
      await navigator.serviceWorker.ready;
      let sub = await reg.pushManager.getSubscription();
      if (!sub) {
        const vapidKey = '<%= locals.vapidPublicKey || "" %>';
        if (!vapidKey) return;
        const padding = '='.repeat((4 - vapidKey.length % 4) % 4);
        const base64 = (vapidKey + padding).replace(/-/g, '+').replace(/_/g, '/');
        const raw = atob(base64);
        const key = Uint8Array.from([...raw].map(c => c.charCodeAt(0)));
        sub = await reg.pushManager.subscribe({ userVisibleOnly: true, applicationServerKey: key });
      }
      const csrf = document.querySelector('meta[name="csrf-token"]')?.content || '';
      await fetch('/portal/staff/push-subscribe', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'CSRF-Token': csrf },
        body: JSON.stringify({ subscription: sub })
      });
    } catch (e) {}
  }
  window.registerPush = registerPush;
  window.addEventListener('load', () => registerPush().catch(() => {}));
}
</script>
<% } %>

===== C:\My Web Sites\school\live.themewild.com\emerald\staff-system\auth_test.js =====
const http = require('http');

const postData = JSON.stringify({
    email: 'teststaff@emerald.com',
    password: 'TestStaff123!'
});

const options = {
    hostname: 'localhost',
    port: 3001,
    path: '/portal/auth/login',
    method: 'POST',
    headers: {
        'Content-Type': 'application/json',
        'Content-Length': Buffer.byteLength(postData)
    }
};

const req = http.request(options, (res) => {
    let rawData = '';
    res.on('data', (chunk) => { rawData += chunk; });
    res.on('end', () => {
        console.log(`STATUS: ${res.statusCode}`);
        console.log(`HEADERS: ${JSON.stringify(res.headers, null, 2)}`);
        console.log(`BODY: ${rawData}`);
    });
});

req.on('error', (e) => {
    console.error(`problem with request: ${e.message}`);
});

req.write(postData);
req.end();

===== C:\My Web Sites\school\live.themewild.com\emerald\staff-system\backfill-invoices.js =====
const mongoose = require('mongoose');
require('dotenv').config();

mongoose.connect(process.env.MONGO_URI).then(async () => {
    const ClientInvoice = require('./models/ClientInvoice');
    const invoices = await ClientInvoice.find({ $or: [{ totalAmount: 0 }, { totalAmount: { $exists: false } }] });
    console.log('Invoices to fix:', invoices.length);
    for (const inv of invoices) {
        // Handle legacy snake_case data mapping
        if (!inv.invoiceNumber) inv.invoiceNumber = inv.invoice_number || `INV-BACKFILL-${Date.now()}`;
        if (!inv.clientName) inv.clientName = inv.client_name || 'Unknown Client';
        if (!inv.clientEmail) inv.clientEmail = inv.client_email || 'no-email@example.com';
        if (!inv.eventName) inv.eventName = inv.event_name || 'Legacy Event';
        
        if (inv.services && inv.services.length > 0) {
            const subtotal = inv.services.reduce((s, sv) => {
                if (!sv.name) sv.name = sv.description || 'Service';
                return s + (sv.total || sv.unitPrice * sv.quantity || 0);
            }, 0);
            const vatRate = inv.vatRate || 16;
            const vatAmount = Math.round(subtotal * vatRate / 100);
            inv.subtotal = subtotal;
            inv.vatAmount = vatAmount;
            inv.totalAmount = subtotal + vatAmount;
            
            try {
                await inv.save();
                console.log('Fixed:', inv.invoiceNumber, '-> KSh', inv.totalAmount);
            } catch(e) { console.error('Error saving', inv.invoiceNumber, e.message); }
        }
    }
    process.exit();
}).catch(err => {
    console.error('DB Connection error:', err);
    process.exit(1);
});

===== C:\My Web Sites\school\live.themewild.com\emerald\staff-system\backfill-rates.js =====
const mongoose = require('mongoose');
require('dotenv').config();

// Both portals use the same Atlas cluster, different env var names
const URI = process.env.MONGO_URI;

mongoose.connect(URI).then(async () => {
  const Assignment = require('./models/Assignment');
  
  // Load PricingSettings directly from the same DB
  const pricingSchema = new mongoose.Schema({ categories: [{ name: String, staffPayRate: Number, isActive: Boolean }] }, { strict: false });
  const PricingSettings = mongoose.models.PricingSettings || mongoose.model('PricingSettings', pricingSchema);
  const pricing = await PricingSettings.findOne().lean();
  
  if (!pricing || !pricing.categories?.length) {
    console.log('No pricing found in DB');
    process.exit();
  }
  console.log('Pricing loaded:', pricing.categories.length, 'categories');
  
  const assignments = await Assignment.find({ booking_ref: { $exists: true, $ne: null } });
  console.log('Assignments to update:', assignments.length);
  
  for (const a of assignments) {
    const title = (a.title || '').toLowerCase();
    const match = pricing.categories.find(c => {
      if (!c.isActive) return false;
      const parts = c.name.toLowerCase().split('/');
      return parts.some(p => title.includes(p.trim()) || p.trim().includes(title.split(' ')[0]));
    });
    if (match) {
      a.pay_rate = match.staffPayRate || a.pay_rate;
      await a.save();
      console.log('Updated:', a.title, '-> KSh', a.pay_rate);
    } else {
      console.log('No match:', a.title);
    }
  }
  process.exit();
});

===== C:\My Web Sites\school\live.themewild.com\emerald\staff-system\fix-phones.js =====
const mongoose = require('mongoose');
require('dotenv').config();
mongoose.connect(process.env.MONGO_URI).then(async () => {
  const Assignment = require('./models/Assignment');
  const Staff = require('./models/Staff');
  const assignments = await Assignment.find({ 'staff_payments.0': { $exists: true } });
  console.log('Assignments with staff_payments:', assignments.length);
  for (const a of assignments) {
    let updated = false;
    for (const sp of a.staff_payments) {
      if (!sp.phone || sp.phone === '') {
        const staff = await Staff.findById(sp.staff_id).select('phone').lean();
        if (staff && staff.phone) {
          sp.phone = staff.phone;
          updated = true;
          console.log('Fixed phone for:', sp.staff_name, '->', staff.phone);
        }
      }
    }
    if (updated) await a.save();
  }
  console.log('Done');
  process.exit();
});

===== C:\My Web Sites\school\live.themewild.com\emerald\staff-system\generate_token.js =====
const mongoose = require('mongoose');
require('dotenv').config();
const jwt = require('jsonwebtoken');

const Staff = require('./models/Staff');

async function getAuthToken() {
    try {
        await mongoose.connect(process.env.MONGO_URI);
        const user = await Staff.findOne({ email: 'teststaff@emerald.com' });
        
        if (!user) {
            console.error('Test staff user not found!');
            process.exit(1);
        }

        const token = jwt.sign({ id: user._id }, process.env.JWT_SECRET || 'fallback_secret_key', {
            expiresIn: process.env.JWT_EXPIRE || '30d'
        });

        console.log('JWT_TOKEN=' + token);
        process.exit(0);
    } catch (err) {
        console.error(err);
        process.exit(1);
    }
}

getAuthToken();

===== C:\My Web Sites\school\live.themewild.com\emerald\staff-system\get_supervisor_token.js =====
const { chromium } = require('playwright');

(async () => {
    const browser = await chromium.launch({ headless: true });
    const context = await browser.newContext();
    const page = await context.newPage();

    try {
        await page.goto('http://localhost:3001/portal/auth/login');
        await page.fill('input[name="email"]', 'testsupervisor@emerald.com');
        await page.fill('input[name="password"]', 'TestSupervisor123!');
        
        await Promise.all([
            page.waitForNavigation({ waitUntil: 'networkidle' }),
            page.click('button[type="submit"]')
        ]);
        
        const cookies = await context.cookies();
        const portalTokenCookie = cookies.find(c => c.name === 'portal_token');
        
        if (portalTokenCookie) {
            console.log('JWT_TOKEN=' + portalTokenCookie.value);
        } else {
            console.log('NO_TOKEN_FOUND');
            console.log('Current URL:', page.url());
            console.log('Cookies:', cookies.map(c => c.name));
        }
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Error:', error.message);
    } finally {
        await browser.close();
    }
})();

===== C:\My Web Sites\school\live.themewild.com\emerald\staff-system\get_token_playwright.js =====
const { chromium } = require('playwright');

(async () => {
    const browser = await chromium.launch({ headless: true });
    const context = await browser.newContext();
    const page = await context.newPage();

    try {
        await page.goto('http://localhost:3001/portal/auth/login');
        await page.fill('input[name="email"]', 'teststaff@emerald.com');
        await page.fill('input[name="password"]', 'TestStaff123!');
        
        await Promise.all([
            page.waitForURL('**/portal/auth/change-password'), // it redirects here on first login
            page.click('button[type="submit"]')
        ]);
        
        const cookies = await context.cookies();
        const portalTokenCookie = cookies.find(c => c.name === 'portal_token');
        
        if (portalTokenCookie) {
            console.log('JWT_TOKEN=' + portalTokenCookie.value);
        } else {
            console.log('Failed to find portal_token cookie.');
            console.log(cookies.map(c => c.name)); // show what cookies we got
        }
    } catch (error) {
        console.error('Playwright Error:', error);
    } finally {
        await browser.close();
    }
})();

===== C:\My Web Sites\school\live.themewild.com\emerald\staff-system\regen-pdf.js =====
const mongoose = require('mongoose');
require('dotenv').config();
mongoose.connect(process.env.MONGO_URI).then(async () => {
  const ClientInvoice = require('./models/ClientInvoice');
  const { generateInvoicePDF } = require('./controllers/invoiceController');
  const invoice = await ClientInvoice.findOne({ invoiceNumber: 'EPE-INV-2026-0004' });
  if (!invoice) { console.log('Not found'); process.exit(); }
  // Clear old PDF so it regenerates
  invoice.pdfUrl = null;
  await invoice.save();
  const pdfPath = await generateInvoicePDF(invoice);
  await ClientInvoice.findByIdAndUpdate(invoice._id, { pdfUrl: pdfPath });
  console.log('PDF regenerated:', pdfPath);
  process.exit();
});
